        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        
        # Visual projection to common space
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Text projection to common space
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            dropout=0.1,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            dropout=0.1,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Self-attention for refined fusion
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim * 2,
            num_heads=8,
            dropout=0.1,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for adaptive fusion
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 4, self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 2, 4)
        
        # Initialize weights
        self._init_weights()
    
    def _init_weights(self):
        for m in self.modules():
            if isinstance(m, nn.Linear):
                nn.init.xavier_uniform_(m.weight)
                if m.bias is not None:
                    nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
            elif isinstance(m, nn.LayerNorm):
                nn.init.ones_(m.weight)
                nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Pool visual features (B, 256, 1024) -> (B, 256, 1024) keep spatial
        # Project visual features
        visual_proj = self.visual_proj(visual)  # (B, 256, hidden_dim)
        
        # Project text features
        text_proj = self.text_proj(text)  # (B, 77, hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual queries attend to text keys/values
        v2t_out, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(
            query=visual_proj,
            key=text_proj,
            value=text_proj
        )  # (B, 256, hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries attend to visual keys/values
        t2v_out, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(
            query=text_proj,
            key=visual_proj,
            value=visual_proj
        )  # (B, 77, hidden_dim)
        
        # Global average pooling
        v_pooled = v2t_out.mean(dim=1)  # (B, hidden_dim)
        t_pooled = t2v_out.mean(dim=1)  # (B, hidden_dim)
        
        # Concatenate pooled features
        fused = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # (B, hidden_dim * 2)
        
        # Expand for self-attention (treat as sequence of 1)
        fused_seq = fused.unsqueeze(1)  # (B, 1, hidden_dim * 2)
        
        # Self-attention refinement
        refined, _ = self.self_attn(fused_seq, fused_seq, fused_seq)
        refined = refined.squeeze(1)  # (B, hidden_dim * 2)
        
        # Residual connection
        refined = refined + fused
        
        # Compute adaptive gate
        gate_input = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled, v_pooled * t_pooled, v_pooled - t_pooled], dim=-1)
        gate = self.gate(gate_input)  # (B, hidden_dim * 2)
        
        # Apply gating
        gated = refined * gate
        
        # Final fusion and classification
        output = self.fusion_mlp(gated)  # (B, hidden_dim // 2)
        logits = self.classifier(output)  # (B, 4)
        
        return logits

        )
        
        # Self-attention for fused features

            embed_dim=self.common_dim * 2,

            batch_first=True,

        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for feature fusion
        self.gate_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim, self.common_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim // 2, 128),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
        # Learnable temperature for attention scaling
        self.temperature = nn.Parameter(torch.ones(1))
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Project visual features: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, 512]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)
        
        # Project text features: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, 512]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Cross-attention: visual queries attend to text keys/values
        v_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(
            query=v_feat,
            key=t_feat,
            value=t_feat,
            need_weights=False
        )
        
        # Cross-attention: text queries attend to visual keys/values
        t_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(
            query=t_feat,
            key=v_feat,
            value=v_feat,
            need_weights=False
        )
        
        # Global average pooling
        v_pooled = v_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        t_pooled = t_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Concatenate cross-attended features
        fused = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Compute gating weights
        gate = self.gate_proj(fused)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Apply gating with residual connection
        v_gated = v_pooled * gate
        t_gated = t_pooled * (1 - gate)
        
        # Re-fuse with gating
        gated_fusion = torch.cat([v_gated, t_gated], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Add sequence dimension for self-attention
        gated_fusion = gated_fusion.unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, 1024]
        
        # Self-attention on fused representation
        attended_fusion, _ = self.self_attn(
            query=gated_fusion,
            key=gated_fusion,
            value=gated_fusion,
            need_weights=False
        )
        
        # Remove sequence dimension and process
        attended_fusion = attended_fusion.squeeze(1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Final fusion with skip connection
        combined = attended_fusion + gated_fusion.squeeze(1)
        
        # MLP processing
        hidden = self.fusion_mlp(combined)
        
        # Classification
        output = self.classifier(hidden)
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768
        self.visual_seq_len = 256
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_seq_len = 77
        self.text_dim = 768
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.common_dim = 512
        
        # Visual projection (spatial pooling + linear)
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Text projection
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Self-attention for fused features
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim * 2,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for feature fusion
        self.gate_net = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Output MLP
        self.output_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.LayerNorm(256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 4)
        )
        
        # Layer norms
        self.ln_v = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim)
        self.ln_t = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim)
        self.ln_fused = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim * 2)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Project visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, 512]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)
        
        # Project text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, 512]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Cross-attention: visual queries attend to text keys/values
        v_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(
            query=v_feat,
            key=t_feat,
            value=t_feat
        )
        v_enhanced = self.ln_v(v_feat + v_enhanced)  # Residual
        
        # Cross-attention: text queries attend to visual keys/values
        t_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(
            query=t_feat,
            key=v_feat,
            value=v_feat
        )
        t_enhanced = self.ln_t(t_feat + t_enhanced)  # Residual
        
        # Global average pooling
        v_pooled = v_enhanced.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        t_pooled = t_enhanced.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Concatenate pooled features
        fused = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Apply gating
        gate = self.gate_net(fused)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Modulate visual and text features with gate
        v_gated = v_pooled * gate
        t_gated = t_pooled * (1 - gate)
        
        # Final fused representation
        final_fused = torch.cat([v_gated, t_gated], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Output prediction
        output = self.output_mlp(final_fused)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768
        self.visual_seq_len = 256
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_seq_len = 77
        self.text_dim = 768
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.common_dim = 512
        
        # Visual projection (spatial pooling + linear)
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Text projection
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        self.cross_attn_text_to_visual = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text  
        self.cross_attn_visual_to_text = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Self-attention for fused features
        self.fusion_self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim * 2,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for adaptive fusion
        self.gate_net = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 4, self.common_dim * 2),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Final classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, 1024),
            nn.LayerNorm(1024),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(1024, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(512, 4)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Project visual features: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, 512]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)
        
        # Project text features: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, 512]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Cross-attention: text queries attend to visual keys/values
        # [B, 77, 512] x [B, 256, 512] -> [B, 77, 512]
        t_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn_text_to_visual(
            query=t_feat,
            key=v_feat,
            value=v_feat
        )
        
        # Cross-attention: visual queries attend to text keys/values
        # [B, 256, 512] x [B, 77, 512] -> [B, 256, 512]
        v_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn_visual_to_text(
            query=v_feat,
            key=t_feat,
            value=t_feat
        )
        
        # Global average pooling for both modalities
        v_pooled = v_enhanced.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        t_pooled = t_enhanced.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Also get max pooled features for diversity
        v_max = v_enhanced.max(dim=1)[0]   # [B, 512]
        t_max = t_enhanced.max(dim=1)[0]   # [B, 512]
        
        # Concatenate pooled features
        concat_feat = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Compute adaptive gate based on all pooled features
        gate_input = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled, v_max, t_max], dim=-1)  # [B, 2048]
        gate = self.gate_net(gate_input)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Apply gating
        gated_feat = gate * concat_feat  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Reshape for self-attention (treat as sequence of 1)
        # Actually use MLP on gated features directly for efficiency
        
        # Final classification
        output = self.classifier(gated_feat)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.visual_proj = nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.text_proj = nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Self-attention for refined fusion
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism
        self.gate_visual = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 4),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 4, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        self.gate_text = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 4),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 4, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 2, 4)
        
        # Layer norms
        self.ln_visual = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.ln_text = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.ln_fused = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # visual: [B, 256, 1024], text: [B, 77, 768]
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project to common space
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)       # [B, 77, 512]
        
        v_feat = self.ln_visual(v_feat)
        t_feat = self.ln_text(t_feat)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries visual
        t_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn(
            query=t_feat,
            key=v_feat,
            value=v_feat
        )  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Self-attention on enhanced text
        t_refined, _ = self.self_attn(t_enhanced, t_enhanced, t_enhanced)
        t_refined = self.ln_fused(t_refined + t_enhanced)
        
        # Global average pooling
        t_pooled = t_refined.mean(dim=1)   # [B, 512]
        v_pooled = v_feat.mean(dim=1)       # [B, 512]
        
        # Gating
        g_v = self.gate_visual(v_pooled)
        g_t = self.gate_text(t_pooled)
        
        v_gated = v_pooled * g_v
        t_gated = t_pooled * g_t
        
        # Concatenate and fuse
        fused = torch.cat([v_gated, t_gated], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused)                  # [B, 256]
        
        # Output
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims=None):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.output_dim = 4
        
        # Project to common space
        self.visual_proj = nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.text_proj = nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        self.cross_attn_visual = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        self.cross_attn_text = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for feature fusion
        self.gate_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Feature processing after gating
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 2, self.hidden_dim // 4),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 4, self.output_dim)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # visual: [B, 256, 1024], text: [B, 77, 768]
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project to common dimension
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)       # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual queries attend to text keys/values
        v_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_visual(
            query=v_feat, key=t_feat, value=t_feat
        )  # [B, 256, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries attend to visual keys/values  
        t_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_text(
            query=t_feat, key=v_feat, value=v_feat
        )  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Global average pooling
        v_pooled = v_attended.mean(dim=1)   # [B, 512]
        t_pooled = t_attended.mean(dim=1)   # [B, 512]
        
        # Concatenate for gating
        concat_feat = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Learnable gate
        gate = self.gate_proj(concat_feat)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Apply gate to combine features
        fused = gate * v_pooled + (1 - gate) * t_pooled  # [B, 512]
        
        # Process through MLP
        processed = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, 256]
        
        # Final classification
        output = self.classifier(processed)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        
        # Visual projection to common space
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Text projection to common space
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            dropout=0.1,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            dropout=0.1,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Self-attention for fused features
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim * 2,
            num_heads=8,
            dropout=0.1,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for feature fusion
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 4, self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 4, self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2)
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 2, 4)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Pool visual features (B, 256, 1024) -> (B, 256, hidden_dim)
        v_tokens = self.visual_proj(visual)  # (B, 256, hidden_dim)
        
        # Project text features (B, 77, 768) -> (B, 77, hidden_dim)
        t_tokens = self.text_proj(text)  # (B, 77, hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual queries attend to text keys/values
        v_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(v_tokens, t_tokens, t_tokens)  # (B, 256, hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries attend to visual keys/values
        t_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(t_tokens, v_tokens, v_tokens)  # (B, 77, hidden_dim)
        
        # Global average pooling
        v_pooled = v_enhanced.mean(dim=1)  # (B, hidden_dim)
        t_pooled = t_enhanced.mean(dim=1)  # (B, hidden_dim)
        
        # Concatenate pooled features
        concat_feat = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # (B, hidden_dim*2)
        
        # Expand for self-attention (treat as sequence of 1)
        concat_seq = concat_feat.unsqueeze(1)  # (B, 1, hidden_dim*2)
        
        # Self-attention on concatenated features
        attn_out, _ = self.self_attn(concat_seq, concat_seq, concat_seq)  # (B, 1, hidden_dim*2)
        attn_out = attn_out.squeeze(1)  # (B, hidden_dim*2)
        
        # Residual connection
        attn_out = attn_out + concat_feat
        
        # Gating mechanism
        gate_input = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled, v_pooled * t_pooled, torch.abs(v_pooled - t_pooled)], dim=-1)
        gate = self.gate(gate_input)  # (B, hidden_dim*2)
        
        # Apply gate
        gated_feat = gate * attn_out  # (B, hidden_dim*2)
        
        # Final fusion with skip connection
        fusion_input = torch.cat([gated_feat, concat_feat], dim=-1)  # (B, hidden_dim*4)
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fusion_input)  # (B, hidden_dim)
        
        # Classify
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # (B, 4)
        
        return output

import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 256
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.visual_proj = nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.text_proj = nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        self.cross_attn_visual = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim, 
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        self.cross_attn_text = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for feature fusion
        self.gate_visual = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        self.gate_text = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project inputs: visual [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, hidden], text [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)      # [B, 77, hidden]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        v_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_visual(v_feat, t_feat, t_feat)  # [B, 256, hidden]
        t_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_text(t_feat, v_feat, v_feat)    # [B, 77, hidden]
        
        # Global average pooling
        v_pooled = v_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden]
        t_pooled = t_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden]
        
        # Concatenate for gating
        concat_feat = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden*2]
        
        # Compute gates
        v_gate = self.gate_visual(concat_feat)  # [B, hidden]
        t_gate = self.gate_text(concat_feat)    # [B, hidden]
        
        # Apply gates and fuse
        v_gated = v_pooled * v_gate  # [B, hidden]
        t_gated = t_pooled * t_gate  # [B, hidden]
        
        # Concatenate gated features
        fused = torch.cat([v_gated, t_gated], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden*2]
        
        # Fusion processing
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, fused_dim]
        
        # Classify
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024 -> project to 512
        # Text: 77x768 -> project to 512
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(1024, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(768, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries attend to visual keys/values
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(embed_dim=512, num_heads=8, dropout=0.1, batch_first=True)
        
        # Self-attention for fused features
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(embed_dim=512, num_heads=8, dropout=0.1, batch_first=True)
        
        # Gating mechanism for feature fusion
        self.gate_visual = nn.Linear(512, 512)
        self.gate_text = nn.Linear(512, 512)
        self.gate_fusion = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(1024, 512),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Feature-wise modulation
        self.film_scale = nn.Linear(512, 512)
        self.film_shift = nn.Linear(512, 512)
        
        # Final classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.LayerNorm(256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(256, 128),
            nn.LayerNorm(128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
        # Pooling weights
        self.attn_pool = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(512, 64),
            nn.Tanh(),
            nn.Linear(64, 1)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project inputs
        # visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, 512]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)
        
        # text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, 512]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        # t_feat as query, v_feat as key/value
        cross_out, _ = self.cross_attn(t_feat, v_feat, v_feat)  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Global pooling with attention
        attn_weights = F.softmax(self.attn_pool(cross_out), dim=1)  # [B, 77, 1]
        t_pooled = (cross_out * attn_weights).sum(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Visual pooling
        v_weights = F.softmax(self.attn_pool(v_feat), dim=1)  # [B, 256, 1]
        v_pooled = (v_feat * v_weights).sum(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Gated fusion
        gate_input = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        gate = self.gate_fusion(gate_input)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Feature-wise gated combination
        v_gate = torch.sigmoid(self.gate_visual(v_pooled))
        t_gate = torch.sigmoid(self.gate_text(t_pooled))
        
        # FiLM-style modulation
        scale = self.film_scale(t_pooled)
        shift = self.film_shift(t_pooled)
        v_modulated = v_pooled * (1 + scale) + shift
        
        # Final fusion with gating
        fused = gate * v_modulated + (1 - gate) * t_pooled  # [B, 512]
        
        # Add residual and normalize
        fused = F.layer_norm(fused + 0.5 * v_pooled + 0.5 * t_pooled, fused.shape[-1:])
        
        # Classify
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768
        self.visual_seq_len = 256
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_seq_len = 77
        self.text_dim = 768
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.common_dim = 512
        
        # Visual projection with spatial reduction
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Text projection
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries visual
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Self-attention for refined fusion
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for feature-wise modulation
        self.gate_visual = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        self.gate_text = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim, self.common_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim // 2, 128),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, 512]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)
        
        # Project text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, 512]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: use text as query, visual as key/value
        # Output: [B, 77, 512]
        cross_out, _ = self.cross_attn(
            query=t_feat,
            key=v_feat,
            value=v_feat
        )
        
        # Self-attention on cross-modal features
        attended, _ = self.self_attn(cross_out, cross_out, cross_out)
        
        # Global average pooling over sequence
        t_pooled = attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Also pool visual features
        v_pooled = v_feat.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Gated fusion
        v_gate = self.gate_visual(t_pooled)  # [B, 512]
        t_gate = self.gate_text(v_pooled)    # [B, 512]
        
        v_gated = v_pooled * v_gate
        t_gated = t_pooled * t_gate
        
        # Concatenate gated features
        fused = torch.cat([v_gated, t_gated], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Fusion processing
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, 256]
        
        # Classification
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        self.text_to_visual_query = nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.visual_key = nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.visual_value = nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        self.visual_to_text_query = nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.text_key = nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.text_value = nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Gating mechanism for feature fusion
        self.gate_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2 + self.visual_dim + self.text_dim, 256),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(256, 2),
            nn.Softmax(dim=-1)
        )
        
        # Feature aggregation projections
        self.visual_pool_proj = nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.text_pool_proj = nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Final classifier with residual connections
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.LayerNorm(256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 4)
        )
        
        # Temperature-scaled attention
        self.temperature = nn.Parameter(torch.ones(1) * 0.07)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Pool visual features (mean pooling over sequence)
        visual_pooled = visual.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Cross-attention: text queries attend to visual keys/values
        text_cls = text[:, 0, :]  # [B, 768] - use CLS token
        
        # Text -> Visual attention
        Q_tv = self.text_to_visual_query(text_cls).unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, hidden]
        K_v = self.visual_key(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden]
        V_v = self.visual_value(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden]
        
        attn_tv = torch.matmul(Q_tv, K_v.transpose(-2, -1)) / (self.hidden_dim ** 0.5)
        attn_tv = F.softmax(attn_tv, dim=-1)  # [B, 1, 256]
        text_attended_visual = torch.matmul(attn_tv, V_v).squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden]
        
        # Visual -> Text attention
        Q_vt = self.visual_to_text_query(visual_pooled).unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, hidden]
        K_t = self.text_key(text)  # [B, 77, hidden]
        V_t = self.text_value(text)  # [B, 77, hidden]
        
        attn_vt = torch.matmul(Q_vt, K_t.transpose(-2, -1)) / (self.hidden_dim ** 0.5)
        attn_vt = F.softmax(attn_vt, dim=-1)  # [B, 1, 77]
        visual_attended_text = torch.matmul(attn_vt, V_t).squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden]
        
        # Project pooled features
        visual_proj = self.visual_pool_proj(visual_pooled)  # [B, hidden]
        text_proj = self.text_pool_proj(text_cls)  # [B, hidden]
        
        # Concatenate all features for gating
        gate_input = torch.cat([
            text_attended_visual,
            visual_attended_text,
            visual_pooled,
            text_cls
        ], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden*2 + 1024 + 768]
        
        gates = self.gate_proj(gate_input)  # [B, 2]
        
        # Apply soft gating to cross-attended features
        gated_visual = gates[:, 0:1] * text_attended_visual + gates[:, 1:2] * visual_proj
        gated_text = gates[:, 0:1] * visual_attended_text + gates[:, 1:2] * text_proj
        
        # Combine features
        fused = torch.cat([gated_visual, gated_text], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden*2]
        
        # Final classification
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768
        self.visual_seq_len = 256
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_seq_len = 77
        self.text_dim = 768
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.common_dim = 512
        
        # Visual projection (spatial pooling + linear)
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Text projection
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries visual
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Self-attention for fused features
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for feature fusion
        self.gate_visual = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        self.gate_text = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 3, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.LayerNorm(256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 64),
            nn.LayerNorm(64),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Output head
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(64, 32),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Linear(32, 4)
        )
        
        # Layer norms
        self.norm_cross = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim)
        self.norm_self = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, 512]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)
        
        # Project text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, 512]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Pool visual to match text sequence for cross-attn alternative
        # Use mean pooling for global visual feature
        v_global = v_feat.mean(dim=1, keepdim=True)  # [B, 1, 512]
        
        # Expand to create queries from text, keys/values from visual
        # Cross-attention: text attends to visual
        t_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn(
            query=t_feat,      # [B, 77, 512]
            key=v_feat,        # [B, 256, 512]
            value=v_feat       # [B, 256, 512]
        )
        t_enhanced = self.norm_cross(t_enhanced + t_feat)
        
        # Self-attention on enhanced text
        t_fused, _ = self.self_attn(t_enhanced, t_enhanced, t_enhanced)
        t_fused = self.norm_self(t_fused + t_enhanced)
        
        # Pool sequences
        v_pooled = v_feat.mean(dim=1)   # [B, 512]
        t_pooled = t_fused.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Concatenate pooled features for gating
        concat_for_gate = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Compute gates
        g_v = self.gate_visual(concat_for_gate)  # [B, 512]
        g_t = self.gate_text(concat_for_gate)    # [B, 512]
        
        # Apply gates
        v_gated = v_pooled * g_v
        t_gated = t_pooled * g_t
        
        # Element-wise interaction
        interaction = v_gated * t_gated  # [B, 512]
        
        # Final fusion with all components
        fused = torch.cat([v_gated, t_gated, interaction], dim=-1)  # [B, 1536]
        
        # Process through MLP
        hidden = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, 64]
        
        # Output
        output = self.output_head(hidden)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768
        self.visual_seq_len = 256
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_seq_len = 77
        self.text_dim = 768
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.common_dim = 512
        
        # Visual projection (spatial pooling + linear)
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Text projection
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries visual
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Self-attention for fused features
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for feature fusion
        self.gate_visual = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        self.gate_text = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 3, self.common_dim * 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Output head
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim, 128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Project visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, 512]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)
        
        # Project text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, 512]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Global average pooling for initial representations
        v_global = v_feat.mean(dim=1, keepdim=True)  # [B, 1, 512]
        t_global = t_feat.mean(dim=1, keepdim=True)  # [B, 1, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        # Use text as query, visual as key/value
        t_query = t_feat  # [B, 77, 512]
        cross_attn_out, _ = self.cross_attn(t_query, v_feat, v_feat)  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Pool cross-attended features
        cross_pooled = cross_attn_out.mean(dim=1, keepdim=True)  # [B, 1, 512]
        
        # Concatenate global features for gating
        concat_global = torch.cat([v_global, t_global], dim=-1)  # [B, 1, 1024]
        concat_global = concat_global.squeeze(1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Compute gates
        gate_v = self.gate_visual(concat_global).unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, 512]
        gate_t = self.gate_text(concat_global).unsqueeze(1)    # [B, 1, 512]
        
        # Apply gating
        v_gated = v_global * gate_v  # [B, 1, 512]
        t_gated = t_global * gate_t  # [B, 1, 512]
        
        # Combine all features
        combined = torch.cat([
            v_gated.squeeze(1),      # [B, 512]
            t_gated.squeeze(1),      # [B, 512]
            cross_pooled.squeeze(1), # [B, 512]
        ], dim=-1)  # [B, 1536]
        
        # Fusion MLP
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(combined)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Final output
        output = self.output_head(fused)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        
        # Visual feature projection with adaptive pooling
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Text feature projection
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention layers
        self.cross_attn_visual_to_text = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        self.cross_attn_text_to_visual = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Self-attention for refinement
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Fusion network
        self.fusion_net = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        
        # Classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 2, 4)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Project visual features: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, hidden]
        visual_proj = self.visual_proj(visual)
        
        # Project text features: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden]
        text_proj = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Cross-attention: visual attends to text
        visual_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_visual_to_text(
            query=visual_proj,
            key=text_proj,
            value=text_proj
        )  # [B, 256, hidden]
        
        # Cross-attention: text attends to visual
        text_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_text_to_visual(
            query=text_proj,
            key=visual_proj,
            value=visual_proj
        )  # [B, 77, hidden]
        
        # Adaptive pooling to get single vector per modality
        # Use mean pooling across sequence dimension
        visual_pooled = visual_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden]
        text_pooled = text_attended.mean(dim=1)      # [B, hidden]
        
        # Concatenate pooled features
        fused_features = torch.cat([visual_pooled, text_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden*2]
        
        # Fusion network
        fused = self.fusion_net(fused_features)  # [B, hidden//2]
        
        # Output classification
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768
        self.visual_seq_len = 256
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_seq_len = 77

        self.common_dim = 512

        )

        )

            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )

        self.gate_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )

            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim // 2, 128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Project visual features: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, 512]
        visual_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)
        
        # Project text features: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, 512]
        text_feat = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Cross-attention: visual queries attend to text keys/values
        v2t_attn, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(
            query=visual_feat,
            key=text_feat,
            value=text_feat
        )  # [B, 256, 512]
        
        # Cross-attention: text queries attend to visual keys/values
        t2v_attn, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(
            query=text_feat,
            key=visual_feat,
            value=visual_feat
        )  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Global average pooling
        v_pooled = v2t_attn.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        t_pooled = t2v_attn.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Concatenate cross-modal features
        fused = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Reshape for self-attention (treat as sequence of 1)
        fused_seq = fused.unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, 1024]
        
        # Self-attention
        fused_seq, _ = self.self_attn(fused_seq, fused_seq, fused_seq)
        fused = fused_seq.squeeze(1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Gating mechanism
        gate = self.gate_proj(fused)  # [B, 512]
        v_gated = v_pooled * gate
        t_gated = t_pooled * (1 - gate)
        
        # Combine gated features
        gated_fused = torch.cat([v_gated, t_gated], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Final fusion and classification
        output = self.fusion_mlp(gated_fused)  # [B, 256]
        output = self.classifier(output)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768
        self.visual_seq_len = 256
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_seq_len = 77
        self.text_dim = 768
        
        # Common dimension for fusion
        self.common_dim = 512
        
        # Visual projection and pooling
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        
        # Text projection and pooling
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        
        # Adaptive pooling to fixed sequence length
        self.visual_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(16)
        self.text_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(16)
        
        # Cross-modal attention with correct dimensions
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Fusion network
        self.fusion_net = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim, self.common_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim // 2, 128),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
        # Modality importance weights
        self.modality_gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, 2),
            nn.Softmax(dim=-1)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, 512]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)
        
        # Project text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, 512]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Transpose for pooling: [B, C, L]
        v_transposed = v_feat.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 512, 256]
        t_transposed = t_feat.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 512, 77]
        
        # Adaptive pooling to same length
        v_pooled_seq = self.visual_pool(v_transposed)  # [B, 512, 16]
        t_pooled_seq = self.text_pool(t_transposed)    # [B, 512, 16]
        
        # Transpose back: [B, 16, 512]
        v_pooled_seq = v_pooled_seq.transpose(1, 2)
        t_pooled_seq = t_pooled_seq.transpose(1, 2)
        
        # Concatenate for joint processing: [B, 32, 512]
        joint_seq = torch.cat([v_pooled_seq, t_pooled_seq], dim=1)
        
        # Self-attention on joint representation
        attn_out, _ = self.cross_attn(joint_seq, joint_seq, joint_seq)
        
        # Global pooling
        joint_pooled = attn_out.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Also get individual pooled features
        v_global = v_feat.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        t_global = t_feat.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Compute modality weights
        combined = torch.cat([v_global, t_global], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        weights = self.modality_gate(combined)  # [B, 2]
        
        # Weighted combination
        weighted_v = v_global * weights[:, 0:1]
        weighted_t = t_global * weights[:, 1:2]
        
        # Final feature fusion
        fused = torch.cat([weighted_v, weighted_t], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Add residual from joint attention
        fused = fused + torch.cat([joint_pooled, joint_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Process through fusion network
        hidden = self.fusion_net(fused)  # [B, 256]
        
        # Classification
        output = self.classifier(hidden)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        
        # Visual projection to common space
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Text projection to common space
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            dropout=0.1,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            dropout=0.1,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Self-attention for fused features
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim * 2,
            num_heads=8,
            dropout=0.1,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for feature fusion
        self.gate_fc = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 4, self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 2, 128),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Pool visual features (B, 256, 1024) -> (B, 1024) using attention pooling
        visual_pooled = visual.mean(dim=1)  # (B, 1024)
        
        # Project to common space
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual_pooled)  # (B, hidden_dim)
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)  # (B, 77, hidden_dim)
        
        # Expand visual for cross-attention
        v_expanded = v_feat.unsqueeze(1)  # (B, 1, hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual queries attend to text keys/values
        v_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(v_expanded, t_feat, t_feat)  # (B, 1, hidden_dim)
        v_attended = v_attended.squeeze(1)  # (B, hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text pooled queries attend to visual
        t_pooled = t_feat.mean(dim=1).unsqueeze(1)  # (B, 1, hidden_dim)
        t_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(t_pooled, v_expanded, v_expanded)  # (B, 1, hidden_dim)
        t_attended = t_attended.squeeze(1)  # (B, hidden_dim)
        
        # Concatenate attended features
        fused = torch.cat([v_attended, t_attended], dim=-1)  # (B, hidden_dim * 2)
        fused = fused.unsqueeze(1)  # (B, 1, hidden_dim * 2) for self-attention
        
        # Self-attention on fused representation
        fused_attended, _ = self.self_attn(fused, fused, fused)  # (B, 1, hidden_dim * 2)
        fused_attended = fused_attended.squeeze(1)  # (B, hidden_dim * 2)
        
        # Compute gates based on original and attended features
        gate_input = torch.cat([
            v_attended, t_attended, 
            fused_attended[:, :self.hidden_dim], 
            fused_attended[:, self.hidden_dim:]
        ], dim=-1)
        gates = self.gate_fc(gate_input)  # (B, hidden_dim * 2)
        
        # Apply gating
        gated_fused = gates * fused_attended  # (B, hidden_dim * 2)
        
        # Final fusion and classification
        output = self.fusion_mlp(gated_fused)  # (B, hidden_dim // 2)
        output = self.classifier(output)  # (B, 4)
        
        return output

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):

        self.text_dim = 768

        self.common_dim = 512
        
        # Visual projection (spatial pooling + projection)
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Text projection
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Self-attention for fused features
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim * 2,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for feature fusion
        self.gate_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim, self.common_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim // 2, 128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Project visual features: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, 512]
        visual_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)
        
        # Project text features: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, 512]
        text_feat = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual queries attend to text keys/values
        v2t_attn, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(
            query=visual_feat,
            key=text_feat,
            value=text_feat
        )  # [B, 256, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries attend to visual keys/values
        t2v_attn, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(
            query=text_feat,
            key=visual_feat,
            value=visual_feat
        )  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Pool attended features
        v2t_pooled = v2t_attn.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        t2v_pooled = t2v_attn.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Concatenate cross-modal features
        cross_fused = torch.cat([v2t_pooled, t2v_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Apply gating
        gate = self.gate_proj(cross_fused)  # [B, 512]
        gated_visual = v2t_pooled * gate
        gated_text = t2v_pooled * (1 - gate)
        
        # Re-fuse with gating
        gated_fusion = torch.cat([gated_visual, gated_text], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Final fusion MLP
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(gated_fusion)  # [B, 256]
        
        # Classify
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768
        self.visual_seq_len = 256
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_seq_len = 77
        self.text_dim = 768
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.common_dim = 512
        
        # Visual projection (spatial pooling + linear)
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Text projection
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Self-attention for fused features
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim * 2,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for feature fusion
        self.gate_net = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Final classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, 1024),
            nn.LayerNorm(1024),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.3),
            nn.Linear(1024, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(512, 4)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Project inputs
        # visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, 512]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)
        
        # text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, 512]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual queries attend to text keys/values
        v_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(
            query=v_feat,
            key=t_feat,
            value=t_feat
        )  # [B, 256, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries attend to visual keys/values
        t_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(
            query=t_feat,
            key=v_feat,
            value=v_feat
        )  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Global average pooling
        v_pooled = v_enhanced.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        t_pooled = t_enhanced.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Concatenate for gating
        concat_feat = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Compute gate
        gate = self.gate_net(concat_feat)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Apply gated fusion
        v_gated = gate * v_pooled
        t_gated = (1 - gate) * t_pooled
        
        # Final fused representation
        fused = torch.cat([v_gated, t_gated], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Classification
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        self.visual_seq_len = 256
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_seq_len = 77
        self.text_dim = 768
        
        # Common dimension for fusion
        self.common_dim = 512
        
        # Visual projection: reduce 1024 -> 512
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Text projection: reduce 768 -> 512
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention with correct dimensions
        # Visual attends to text
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Text attends to visual  
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Self-attention operates on concatenated features (512 + 512 = 1024)
        # But we need to project first or use separate heads
        self.fusion_proj = nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim)
        self.fusion_norm = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim)
        
        # Self-attention on fused representation
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism
        self.gate_net = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Output MLP
        self.output_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim, 256),
            nn.LayerNorm(256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 128),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Project to common dimension
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)      # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Cross-attention: visual queries attend to text
        v_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(
            query=v_feat,
            key=t_feat,
            value=t_feat,
            need_weights=False
        )  # [B, 256, 512]
        
        # Cross-attention: text queries attend to visual
        t_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(
            query=t_feat,
            key=v_feat,
            value=v_feat,
            need_weights=False
        )  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Global pooling
        v_pooled = v_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        t_pooled = t_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Concatenate and project
        fused = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        fused_proj = self.fusion_proj(fused)  # [B, 512]
        fused_proj = self.fusion_norm(fused_proj)
        
        # Add sequence dimension for self-attention [B, 1, 512]
        fused_seq = fused_proj.unsqueeze(1)
        
        # Self-attention
        attended, _ = self.self_attn(
            query=fused_seq,
            key=fused_seq,
            value=fused_seq,
            need_weights=False
        )  # [B, 1, 512]
        
        # Remove sequence dimension
        attended = attended.squeeze(1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Gating
        gate = self.gate_net(attended)
        gated = attended * gate
        
        # Output
        output = self.output_mlp(gated)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
