            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Output head
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim, 128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Project visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, 512]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)
        
        # Project text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, 512]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Cross-attention: text attends to visual
        # Query from text, Key/Value from visual
        cross_out, _ = self.cross_attn(
            query=t_feat,
            key=v_feat,
            value=v_feat
        )  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Self-attention on cross-modal features
        attended, _ = self.self_attn(cross_out, cross_out, cross_out)  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Global pooling
        t_pooled = attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Visual global pooling
        v_pooled = v_feat.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Gated fusion
        concat_feats = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        gate_v = self.gate_visual(concat_feats)  # [B, 512]
        gate_t = self.gate_text(concat_feats)  # [B, 512]
        
        gated_v = gate_v * v_pooled
        gated_t = gate_t * t_pooled
        
        # Combine all features
        combined = torch.cat([gated_v, gated_t, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, 1536]
        
        # Fusion and output
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(combined)  # [B, 512]
        output = self.output_head(fused)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 768
        
        # Project visual features to sequence
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Project text features
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        self.cross_attn_visual = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            dropout=0.1,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        self.cross_attn_text = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            dropout=0.1,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Self-attention for fused features
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim * 2,
            num_heads=8,
            dropout=0.1,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism
        self.gate_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 256),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.3),
            nn.Linear(256, 4)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Pool visual features from spatial to sequence (B, 256, 1024) -> (B, 64, hidden)
        # Use adaptive pooling approach
        visual_pooled = F.adaptive_avg_pool1d(visual.transpose(1, 2), 64).transpose(1, 2)  # (B, 64, 1024)
        visual_feat = self.visual_proj(visual_pooled)  # (B, 64, hidden)
        
        # Project text
        text_feat = self.text_proj(text)  # (B, 77, hidden)
        
        # Cross-attention: visual queries attend to text keys/values
        visual_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_visual(
            query=visual_feat,
            key=text_feat,
            value=text_feat
        )  # (B, 64, hidden)
        
        # Cross-attention: text queries attend to visual keys/values  
        text_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_text(
            query=text_feat,
            key=visual_feat,
            value=visual_feat
        )  # (B, 77, hidden)
        
        # Global average pooling
        visual_global = visual_attended.mean(dim=1)  # (B, hidden)
        text_global = text_attended.mean(dim=1)  # (B, hidden)
        
        # Concatenate
        fused = torch.cat([visual_global, text_global], dim=-1)  # (B, hidden*2)
        
        # Gating
        gate = self.gate_proj(fused)  # (B, hidden)
        gated_visual = visual_global * gate
        gated_fused = torch.cat([gated_visual, text_global], dim=-1)  # (B, hidden*2)
        
        # Final fusion
        fused_out = self.fusion_mlp(gated_fused)  # (B, fused_dim)
        
        # Classify
        output = self.classifier(fused_out)  # (B, 4)
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 768
        
        # Visual projection and pooling
        self.visual_proj = nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.visual_pool = nn.Sequential(
            nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(1),
            nn.Flatten(start_dim=1)
        )
        
        # Text projection and pooling (using CLS-like attention)
        self.text_proj = nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.text_attention = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 64),
            nn.Tanh(),
            nn.Linear(64, 1)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal gating
        self.gate_visual = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.gate_text = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.gate_fusion = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Cross-attention fusion
        self.cross_attn_q = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.cross_attn_k = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.cross_attn_v = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Final fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 3, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim // 2, 4)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Process visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, hidden_dim]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_pooled = self.visual_pool(v_feat.transpose(1, 2))  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Process text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, hidden_dim]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        # Attention-based pooling for text
        attn_weights = F.softmax(self.text_attention(t_feat), dim=1)  # [B, 77, 1]
        t_pooled = (t_feat * attn_weights).sum(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Gated fusion
        gate_input = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)
        gate = self.gate_fusion(gate_input)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Apply gates
        v_gated = v_pooled * torch.sigmoid(self.gate_visual(v_pooled))
        t_gated = t_pooled * torch.sigmoid(self.gate_text(t_pooled))
        
        # Cross-modal attention (visual queries text)
        q = self.cross_attn_q(v_gated).unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, hidden_dim]
        k = self.cross_attn_k(t_gated).unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, hidden_dim]
        v = self.cross_attn_v(t_gated).unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, hidden_dim]
        
        cross_attn = F.scaled_dot_product_attention(q, k, v).squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Combine all representations
        combined = torch.cat([
            v_gated,           # gated visual
            t_gated,           # gated text  
            cross_attn         # cross-modal attention
        ], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim * 3]
        
        output = self.fusion_mlp(combined)  # [B, 4]
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768
        self.visual_seq_len = 256
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_seq_len = 77
        self.text_dim = 768
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.common_dim = 512
        
        # Visual projection (spatial pooling + projection)
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Text projection
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Self-attention for fused features
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim * 2,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for feature fusion
        self.gate_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim, self.common_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim // 2, 128),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
        # Learnable temperature for attention scaling
        self.temperature = nn.Parameter(torch.ones(1))
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Project visual features: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, 512]
        visual_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)
        
        # Project text features: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, 512]
        text_feat = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Cross-modal attention with temperature scaling
        # Visual attends to text
        v_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(
            query=visual_feat,
            key=text_feat,
            value=text_feat
        )
        
        # Text attends to visual
        t_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(
            query=text_feat,
            key=visual_feat,
            value=visual_feat
        )
        
        # Global average pooling
        v_pooled = v_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        t_pooled = t_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Concatenate cross-modal features
        fused = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Gating mechanism
        gate = self.gate_proj(fused)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Apply gate to modulate visual features
        v_gated = v_pooled * gate
        t_gated = t_pooled * (1 - gate)
        
        # Re-fuse with gating
        gated_fusion = torch.cat([v_gated, t_gated], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Add residual and process through MLP
        fused_out = self.fusion_mlp(gated_fusion + fused)  # [B, 256]
        
        # Final classification
        output = self.classifier(fused_out)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768
        self.visual_seq_len = 256
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_seq_len = 77
        self.text_dim = 768
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.common_dim = 512
        
        # Visual projection (spatial pooling + linear)
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(

            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),

        )

        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries visual
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Self-attention for fused features
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for feature fusion
        self.gate_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim, self.common_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim // 2, 128),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Project visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, 512]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)
        
        # Project text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, 512]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Cross-attention: text attends to visual
        # t_feat as query, v_feat as key/value
        cross_out, _ = self.cross_attn(
            query=t_feat,
            key=v_feat,
            value=v_feat
        )  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Pool cross-attended features
        t_pooled = cross_out.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Pool visual features
        v_pooled = v_feat.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Concatenate for gating
        concat_feat = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Compute gate based on visual
        gate = self.gate_proj(torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1))  # [B, 512]
        
        # Apply gate to text features, add residual from visual
        gated_text = gate * t_pooled
        fused = torch.cat([v_pooled, gated_text], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Fusion processing
        fused_out = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, 256]
        
        # Classification
        output = self.classifier(fused_out)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.visual_proj = nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.text_proj = nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Self-attention for fused features
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism
        self.gate_visual = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 4),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 4, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        self.gate_text = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 4),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 4, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 2, 128),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project inputs
        v_proj = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        t_proj = self.text_proj(text)       # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries visual
        t_attended, _ = self.cross_attn(
            query=t_proj,
            key=v_proj,
            value=v_proj
        )  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Global pooling with attention weights
        t_pooled = t_attended.mean(dim=1)   # [B, 512]
        v_pooled = v_proj.mean(dim=1)       # [B, 512]
        
        # Apply gating
        v_gate = self.gate_visual(v_pooled)
        t_gate = self.gate_text(t_pooled)
        
        v_gated = v_pooled * v_gate
        t_gated = t_pooled * t_gate
        
        # Concatenate and fuse
        fused = torch.cat([v_gated, t_gated], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # MLP fusion
        fused_out = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, 256]
        
        # Classify
        output = self.classifier(fused_out)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        
        # Visual projection to common space
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Text projection to common space
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            dropout=0.1,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            dropout=0.1,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for feature fusion
        self.gate_visual = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        self.gate_text = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 2, 4)
        
        # Initialize weights
        self._init_weights()
    
    def _init_weights(self):
        for m in self.modules():
            if isinstance(m, nn.Linear):
                nn.init.xavier_uniform_(m.weight)
                if m.bias is not None:
                    nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Pool visual features (B, 256, 1024) -> (B, 256, hidden_dim)
        visual_pooled = self.visual_proj(visual)  # (B, 256, 512)
        
        # Project text features (B, 77, 768) -> (B, 77, hidden_dim)
        text_projected = self.text_proj(text)  # (B, 77, 512)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual queries attend to text keys/values
        attn_v2t, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(
            query=visual_pooled,
            key=text_projected,
            value=text_projected
        )  # (B, 256, 512)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries attend to visual keys/values
        attn_t2v, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(
            query=text_projected,
            key=visual_pooled,
            value=visual_pooled
        )  # (B, 77, 512)
        
        # Global average pooling
        visual_repr = attn_v2t.mean(dim=1)  # (B, 512)
        text_repr = attn_t2v.mean(dim=1)  # (B, 512)
        
        # Concatenate for gating
        concat_repr = torch.cat([visual_repr, text_repr], dim=-1)  # (B, 1024)
        
        # Compute gates
        gate_v = self.gate_visual(concat_repr)  # (B, 512)
        gate_t = self.gate_text(concat_repr)  # (B, 512)
        
        # Apply gates
        gated_visual = gate_v * visual_repr
        gated_text = gate_t * text_repr
        
        # Final fusion
        fused = torch.cat([gated_visual, gated_text], dim=-1)  # (B, 1024)
        
        # Process through fusion MLP
        features = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # (B, 256)
        
        # Classify
        output = self.classifier(features)  # (B, 4)
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768
        self.visual_seq_len = 256
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_seq_len = 77
        self.text_dim = 768
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.common_dim = 512
        
        # Visual projection (spatial pooling + projection)
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Text projection
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        self.cross_attn_text_to_visual = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text  
        self.cross_attn_visual_to_text = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Self-attention for fused features
        self.fusion_self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim * 2,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for adaptive fusion
        self.gate_net = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 4, self.common_dim * 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim * 2),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Final classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, 1024),
            nn.LayerNorm(1024),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(1024, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(512, 4)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Project visual features: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, 512]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)
        
        # Project text features: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, 512]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Cross-attention: text queries visual
        t_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn_text_to_visual(
            query=t_feat,
            key=v_feat,
            value=v_feat
        )  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Cross-attention: visual queries text
        v_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn_visual_to_text(
            query=v_feat,
            key=t_feat,
            value=t_feat
        )  # [B, 256, 512]
        
        # Global pooling with attention weights
        v_pooled = v_enhanced.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        t_pooled = t_enhanced.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Also compute max pooling for diversity
        v_max = v_enhanced.max(dim=1)[0]  # [B, 512]
        t_max = t_enhanced.max(dim=1)[0]  # [B, 512]
        
        # Concatenate multiple views
        concat_feat = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        concat_max = torch.cat([v_max, t_max], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Compute gating signal
        gate_input = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled, v_max, t_max], dim=-1)  # [B, 2048]
        gates = self.gate_net(gate_input)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Apply gating
        gated_feat = gates * concat_feat + (1 - gates) * concat_max  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Add sequence dimension for self-attention
        gated_seq = gated_feat.unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, 1024]
        
        # Self-attention refinement
        refined, _ = self.fusion_self_attn(gated_seq, gated_seq, gated_seq)
        refined = refined.squeeze(1) + gated_feat  # Residual connection [B, 1024]
        
        # Final classification
        output = self.classifier(refined)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims=None):
        super().__init__()
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 256
        self.output_dim = 4
        
        # Project visual features
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        
        # Project text features
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        
        # Cross-attention: text attends to visual
        self.cross_attn_tv = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=4,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Cross-attention: visual attends to text
        self.cross_attn_vt = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=4,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 2, self.output_dim)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        """
        visual: [B, 256, 1024]
        text: [B, 77, 768]
        """
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project to common dimension
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 256]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, 256]
        
        # Cross-attention: text queries visual
        t_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_tv(
            query=t_feat,
            key=v_feat,
            value=v_feat,
            need_weights=False
        )  # [B, 77, 256]
        
        # Cross-attention: visual queries text
        v_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_vt(
            query=v_feat,
            key=t_feat,
            value=t_feat,
            need_weights=False
        )  # [B, 256, 256]
        
        # Global average pooling
        t_pooled = t_cross.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 256]
        v_pooled = v_cross.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 256]
        
        # Concatenate instead of stack + self-attn
        fused = torch.cat([t_pooled, v_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Final processing
        features = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, 256]
        output = self.classifier(features)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        self.text_to_visual_query = nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.text_to_visual_key = nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.text_to_visual_value = nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        self.visual_to_text_query = nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.visual_to_text_key = nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.visual_to_text_value = nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        
        self.scale = self.hidden_dim ** -0.5
        
        # Feature-wise gating for fusion
        self.gate_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Pooling projections
        self.visual_pool_proj = nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.text_pool_proj = nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Final classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 256),
            nn.LayerNorm(256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 64),
            nn.LayerNorm(64),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Linear(64, 4)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Mean pool visual features: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 1024]
        visual_pooled = visual.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Text features: [B, 77, 768]
        
        # Cross-attention: text queries attend to visual keys/values
        # Use pooled visual as key/value source, but expand for attention
        visual_for_attn = visual  # [B, 256, 1024]
        text_queries = self.text_to_visual_query(text)  # [B, 77, hidden]
        visual_keys = self.text_to_visual_key(visual_for_attn)  # [B, 256, hidden]
        visual_values = self.text_to_visual_value(visual_for_attn)  # [B, 256, hidden]
        
        attn_scores = torch.bmm(text_queries, visual_keys.transpose(1, 2)) * self.scale  # [B, 77, 256]
        attn_weights = F.softmax(attn_scores, dim=-1)
        text_attended = torch.bmm(attn_weights, visual_values)  # [B, 77, hidden]
        text_fused = text_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden]
        
        # Cross-attention: visual queries attend to text keys/values
        visual_queries = self.visual_to_text_query(visual_pooled).unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, hidden]
        text_keys = self.visual_to_text_key(text)  # [B, 77, hidden]
        text_values = self.visual_to_text_value(text)  # [B, 77, hidden]
        
        attn_scores_v = torch.bmm(visual_queries, text_keys.transpose(1, 2)) * self.scale  # [B, 1, 77]
        attn_weights_v = F.softmax(attn_scores_v, dim=-1)
        visual_attended = torch.bmm(attn_weights_v, text_values).squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden]
        
        # Concatenate both attended features
        fused = torch.cat([text_fused, visual_attended], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden*2]
        
        # Feature-wise gating
        gates = self.gate_proj(fused)  # [B, hidden*2]
        gate1, gate2 = gates.chunk(2, dim=-1)
        
        # Apply gates and combine
        gated_text = text_fused * gate1
        gated_visual = visual_attended * gate2
        combined = gated_text + gated_visual  # [B, hidden]
        
        # Output
        output = self.classifier(combined)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768
        self.visual_seq_len = 256
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_seq_len = 77
        self.text_dim = 768
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.common_dim = 512
        
        # Visual projection with spatial pooling
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Text projection
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Learnable queries for cross-modal attention
        self.num_queries = 8
        self.query_embed = nn.Parameter(torch.randn(1, self.num_queries, self.common_dim))
        
        # Cross-attention layers
        self.cross_attn_visual = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            dropout=0.1,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        self.cross_attn_text = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            dropout=0.1,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Self-attention on fused tokens
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            dropout=0.1,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for modality importance
        self.gate_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Feed-forward network
        self.ffn = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim, self.common_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
        )
        
        # Layer norms
        self.norm1 = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim)
        self.norm2 = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim)
        self.norm3 = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim)
        
        # Final classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * self.num_queries, 1024),
            nn.LayerNorm(1024),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(1024, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(512, 4)
        )
        
        self._init_weights()
    
    def _init_weights(self):
        nn.init.normal_(self.query_embed, std=0.02)
        for m in self.modules():
            if isinstance(m, nn.Linear):
                nn.init.xavier_uniform_(m.weight)
                if m.bias is not None:
                    nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project visual features: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, 512]
        visual_tokens = self.visual_proj(visual)
        
        # Project text features: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, 512]
        text_tokens = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Expand queries: [B, num_queries, 512]
        queries = self.query_embed.expand(B, -1, -1)
        
        # Cross-attention: queries attend to visual
        visual_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_visual(
            queries, visual_tokens, visual_tokens
        )
        visual_attended = self.norm1(visual_attended)
        
        # Cross-attention: queries attend to text
        text_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_text(
            queries, text_tokens, text_tokens
        )
        text_attended = self.norm2(text_attended)
        
        # Concatenate for gating
        combined = torch.cat([visual_attended, text_attended], dim=-1)  # [B, num_queries, 1024]
        
        # Compute gates and fuse
        gates = self.gate_proj(combined)  # [B, num_queries, 512]
        fused = gates * visual_attended + (1 - gates) * text_attended
        
        # Self-attention on fused representation
        fused, _ = self.self_attn(fused, fused, fused)
        fused = self.norm3(fused)
        
        # Feed-forward
        fused = fused + self.ffn(fused)
        
        # Flatten and classify
        fused_flat = fused.view(B, -1)  # [B, num_queries * 512]
        output = self.classifier(fused_flat)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768
        self.visual_seq_len = 256
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_seq_len = 77
        self.text_dim = 768
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.common_dim = 512
        
        # Visual projection (spatial pooling + linear)
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Text projection
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries visual
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Self-attention for fused features
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for feature fusion
        self.gate_visual = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        self.gate_text = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 3, self.common_dim * 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim, 128),
            nn.LayerNorm(128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Project visual features: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, 512]
        visual_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)
        
        # Project text features: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, 512]
        text_feat = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Cross-attention: text attends to visual
        # Query: text, Key/Value: visual
        cross_out, _ = self.cross_attn(
            query=text_feat,
            key=visual_feat,
            value=visual_feat
        )  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Self-attention on cross-modal features
        fused_seq, _ = self.self_attn(cross_out, cross_out, cross_out)  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Global pooling with attention weights
        attn_weights = torch.softmax(fused_seq.mean(dim=-1, keepdim=True), dim=1)  # [B, 77, 1]
        pooled_cross = (fused_seq * attn_weights).sum(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Also pool visual and text separately
        visual_pooled = visual_feat.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        text_pooled = text_feat.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Gated fusion
        combined = torch.cat([visual_pooled, text_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        gate_v = self.gate_visual(combined)  # [B, 512]
        gate_t = self.gate_text(combined)  # [B, 512]
        
        gated_visual = gate_v * visual_pooled
        gated_text = gate_t * text_pooled
        
        # Final fusion with all three representations
        final_input = torch.cat([gated_visual, gated_text, pooled_cross], dim=-1)  # [B, 1536]
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(final_input)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Residual connection
        fused = fused + 0.5 * (visual_pooled + text_pooled)
        
        # Classify
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.visual_proj = nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.text_proj = nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Self-attention for fused features
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism
        self.gate_visual = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 4),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 4, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        self.gate_text = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 4),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 4, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 2, 128),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
        # Layer norms
        self.ln_visual = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.ln_text = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.ln_fused = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project to common space
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)       # [B, 77, 512]
        
        v_feat = self.ln_visual(v_feat)
        t_feat = self.ln_text(t_feat)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries attend to visual keys/values
        t_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn(
            query=t_feat,
            key=v_feat,
            value=v_feat
        )  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Self-attention on enhanced text features
        t_fused, _ = self.self_attn(t_feat, t_feat, t_feat)
        t_enhanced = t_enhanced + t_fused
        
        # Global pooling with attention weights
        v_pooled = v_feat.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        t_pooled = t_enhanced.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Gating
        v_gate = self.gate_visual(v_pooled)
        t_gate = self.gate_text(t_pooled)
        
        v_gated = v_pooled * v_gate
        t_gated = t_pooled * t_gate
        
        # Concatenate and fuse
        fused = torch.cat([v_gated, t_gated], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Final processing
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, 256]
        
        # Classify
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768
        self.visual_seq_len = 256
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_seq_len = 77
        self.text_dim = 768
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.common_dim = 512
        
        # Visual projection (spatial pooling + projection)
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Text projection (with cls token emphasis)
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries visual
        self.cross_attn_text_to_visual = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual queries text  
        self.cross_attn_visual_to_text = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for fusion
        self.gate_net = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Self-attention on fused features
        self.fusion_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Output MLP with residual connections
        self.output_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim, 256),
            nn.LayerNorm(256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 64),
            nn.LayerNorm(64),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Linear(64, 4)
        )
        
        # Layer norms
        self.norm_fused = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Project visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, 512]
        visual_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)
        
        # Project text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, 512]
        text_feat = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        # Query=text, Key/Value=visual
        text_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn_text_to_visual(
            query=text_feat,
            key=visual_feat,
            value=visual_feat
        )  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        # Query=visual, Key/Value=text
        visual_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn_visual_to_text(
            query=visual_feat,
            key=text_feat,
            value=text_feat
        )  # [B, 256, 512]
        
        # Global pooling with attention weights
        # Visual: mean pool then max pool
        visual_pooled = visual_enhanced.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        visual_max = visual_enhanced.max(dim=1)[0]   # [B, 512]
        
        # Text: focus on CLS-like behavior (first few tokens)
        text_pooled = text_enhanced[:, :5, :].mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        text_max = text_enhanced.max(dim=1)[0]  # [B, 512]
        
        # Combine pooling strategies
        visual_repr = visual_pooled + 0.5 * visual_max  # [B, 512]
        text_repr = text_pooled + 0.5 * text_max  # [B, 512]
        
        # Concatenate for gating
        combined = torch.cat([visual_repr, text_repr], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Learned gate
        gate = self.gate_net(combined)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Gated fusion
        fused = gate * visual_repr + (1 - gate) * text_repr  # [B, 512]
        fused = self.norm_fused(fused)
        
        # Add residual from both modalities
        fused = fused + 0.3 * visual_repr + 0.3 * text_repr
        
        # Final prediction
        output = self.output_mlp(fused)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.visual_proj = nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.text_proj = nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Self-attention for fused features
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism
        self.gate_visual = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 4),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 4, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        self.gate_text = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 4),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 4, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 2, 128),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project to common space
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)       # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries visual
        t_attended, _ = self.cross_attn(
            query=t_feat,
            key=v_feat,
            value=v_feat
        )  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Pool attended features
        t_pooled = t_attended.mean(dim=1)   # [B, 512]
        
        # Pool visual features
        v_pooled = v_feat.mean(dim=1)       # [B, 512]
        
        # Apply gating
        v_gate = self.gate_visual(v_pooled)
        t_gate = self.gate_text(t_pooled)
        
        v_gated = v_pooled * v_gate
        t_gated = t_pooled * t_gate
        
        # Concatenate and fuse
        fused = torch.cat([v_gated, t_gated], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused)                  # [B, 256]
        
        # Classify
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768
        self.visual_seq_len = 256
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_seq_len = 77
        self.text_dim = 768
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.common_dim = 512
        
        # Visual projection (spatial pooling + linear)
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Text projection
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries visual
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Self-attention for fused features
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for modality fusion
        self.gate_visual = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        self.gate_text = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim, self.common_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim // 2, 128),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, 512]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)
        
        # Text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, 512]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Cross-attention: text attends to visual
        # Query: text, Key/Value: visual
        t_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn(
            query=t_feat,
            key=v_feat,
            value=v_feat
        )  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Pool text features (mean pooling)
        t_pooled = t_enhanced.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Pool visual features (mean pooling)
        v_pooled = v_feat.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Concatenate for gating
        combined = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Compute gates
        gate_v = self.gate_visual(combined)  # [B, 512]
        gate_t = self.gate_text(combined)    # [B, 512]
        
        # Apply gates and combine
        v_gated = gate_v * v_pooled  # [B, 512]
        t_gated = gate_t * t_pooled  # [B, 512]
        
        # Concatenate gated features
        fused = torch.cat([v_gated, t_gated], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Fusion processing
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, 256]
        
        # Classification
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        
        # Visual projection to common space
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Text projection to common space
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            dropout=0.1,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            dropout=0.1,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Self-attention for fused features
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim * 2,
            num_heads=8,
            dropout=0.1,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for feature fusion
        self.gate_fc = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 4, self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2)
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 2, 128),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.3),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Pool visual features (B, 256, 1024) -> (B, 1024) using attention pooling
        visual_pooled = visual.mean(dim=1)  # (B, 1024)
        
        # Project to common space
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual_pooled)  # (B, hidden_dim)
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)  # (B, 77, hidden_dim)
        
        # Expand visual for cross-attention
        v_expanded = v_feat.unsqueeze(1)  # (B, 1, hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual queries attend to text keys/values
        v_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(
            query=v_expanded,
            key=t_feat,
            value=t_feat
        )  # (B, 1, hidden_dim)
        v_enhanced = v_enhanced.squeeze(1)  # (B, hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text tokens attend to visual
        t_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(
            query=t_feat,
            key=v_expanded,
            value=v_expanded
        )  # (B, 77, hidden_dim)
        t_pooled = t_enhanced.mean(dim=1)  # (B, hidden_dim)
        
        # Concatenate enhanced features
        concat_feat = torch.cat([v_enhanced, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # (B, hidden_dim*2)
        
        # Apply gating mechanism
        gate_input = torch.cat([
            v_enhanced, t_pooled, 
            v_enhanced * t_pooled,  # element-wise product
            torch.abs(v_enhanced - t_pooled)  # difference
        ], dim=-1)  # (B, hidden_dim*4)
        
        gate = self.gate_fc(gate_input)  # (B, hidden_dim*2)
        gated_feat = concat_feat * gate  # (B, hidden_dim*2)
        
        # Self-attention on gated features (treat as sequence of 1)
        gated_expanded = gated_feat.unsqueeze(1)  # (B, 1, hidden_dim*2)
        attn_out, _ = self.self_attn(gated_expanded, gated_expanded, gated_expanded)
        attn_out = attn_out.squeeze(1) + gated_feat  # residual connection
        
        # Final fusion and classification
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(attn_out)  # (B, hidden_dim//2)
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # (B, 4)
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        
        # Visual processing: reduce sequence length then project
        self.visual_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(64)  # [B, 1024, 64]
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Text processing
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention for fusion
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Self-attention for refined fusion
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim * 2, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Output head with residual connections
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 2, 128),
            nn.LayerNorm(128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.05),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
        # Learnable modality weights
        self.modality_gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, 2),
            nn.Softmax(dim=-1)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 64, 1024] -> [B, 64, hidden_dim]
        v = visual.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 1024, 256]
        v = self.visual_pool(v)  # [B, 1024, 64]
        v = v.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 64, 1024]
        v = self.visual_proj(v)  # [B, 64, hidden_dim]
        
        # Process text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        v_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(v, t, t)  # [B, 64, hidden_dim]
        t_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(t, v, v)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        
        # Pool attended features
        v_pooled = v_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        t_pooled = t_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Concatenate for fusion
        fused = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim*2]
        
        # Modality gating for adaptive fusion
        gate_weights = self.modality_gate(fused)  # [B, 2]
        
        # Apply gating
        v_weighted = v_pooled * gate_weights[:, 0:1]
        t_weighted = t_pooled * gate_weights[:, 1:2]
        gated_fusion = torch.cat([v_weighted, t_weighted], dim=-1)
        
        # Residual connection with original concatenation
        fused = fused + gated_fusion
        
        # Final fusion and output
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, hidden_dim//2]
        output = self.output_head(fused)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 384
        
        # Visual processing with attention pooling
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        self.visual_attn = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 64),
            nn.Tanh(),
            nn.Linear(64, 1)
        )
        
        # Text processing with attention pooling
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        self.text_attn = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 64),
            nn.Tanh(),
            nn.Linear(64, 1)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        self.cross_q = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.fused_dim)
        self.cross_k = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.fused_dim)
        self.cross_v = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.fused_dim)
        self.cross_scale = self.fused_dim ** -0.5
        
        # Gated fusion
        self.gate_visual = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.fused_dim)
        self.gate_text = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.fused_dim)
        self.gate_bias = nn.Parameter(torch.zeros(self.fused_dim))
        
        # Deep fusion network
        self.fusion_net = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        
        # Output head with residual connections
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim // 2, 128),
            nn.LayerNorm(128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.05),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
        # Initialize weights
        self._init_weights()
    
    def _init_weights(self):
        for m in self.modules():
            if isinstance(m, nn.Linear):
                nn.init.xavier_uniform_(m.weight)
                if m.bias is not None:
                    nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
            elif isinstance(m, nn.LayerNorm):
                nn.init.ones_(m.weight)
                nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual features [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, hidden_dim]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_attn = self.visual_attn(v_feat).squeeze(-1)  # [B, 256]
        v_attn = F.softmax(v_attn, dim=-1)
        v_pooled = torch.bmm(v_attn.unsqueeze(1), v_feat).squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Process text features [B, 77, 768] -> [B, hidden_dim]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_attn = self.text_attn(t_feat).squeeze(-1)  # [B, 77]
        t_attn = F.softmax(t_attn, dim=-1)
        t_pooled = torch.bmm(t_attn.unsqueeze(1), t_feat).squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        q = self.cross_q(v_pooled).unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, fused_dim]
        k = self.cross_k(t_pooled).unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, fused_dim]
        v = self.cross_v(t_pooled).unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, fused_dim]
        
        cross_attn = torch.bmm(q, k.transpose(1, 2)) * self.cross_scale  # [B, 1, 1]
        cross_attn = F.softmax(cross_attn, dim=-1)
        cross_out = torch.bmm(cross_attn, v).squeeze(1)  # [B, fused_dim]
        
        # Gated fusion
        v_gate = torch.sigmoid(self.gate_visual(v_pooled) + self.gate_bias)
        t_gate = torch.sigmoid(self.gate_text(t_pooled))
        
        v_fused = v_gate * self.cross_q(v_pooled)
        t_fused = t_gate * self.cross_k(t_pooled)
        
        # Combine all features
        combined = torch.cat([
            v_fused + t_fused,  # Gated interaction
            cross_out           # Cross-attention output
        ], dim=-1)  # [B, fused_dim * 2]
        
        # Deep fusion
        fused = self.fusion_net(combined)  # [B, fused_dim // 2]
        
        # Output
        output = self.output_head(fused)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 768
        
        # Visual processing with attention pooling
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        self.visual_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.visual_pool = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 1),
        )
        
        # Text processing with attention pooling
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        self.text_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.text_pool = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 1),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention for fusion
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Fusion layers
        self.fusion_norm1 = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim * 2)
        self.fusion_mlp1 = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        
        # Deep fusion with residual connections
        self.fusion_block1 = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        self.fusion_block2 = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        
        # Output head
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 256),
            nn.LayerNorm(256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 64),
            nn.LayerNorm(64),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Linear(64, 4),
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual features [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_feat, _ = self.visual_attn(v_feat, v_feat, v_feat)  # Self-attention
        v_weights = F.softmax(self.visual_pool(v_feat).squeeze(-1), dim=1)  # [B, 256]
        v_pooled = torch.bmm(v_weights.unsqueeze(1), v_feat).squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Process text features [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_feat, _ = self.text_attn(t_feat, t_feat, t_feat)  # Self-attention
        t_weights = F.softmax(self.text_pool(t_feat).squeeze(-1), dim=1)  # [B, 77]
        t_pooled = torch.bmm(t_weights.unsqueeze(1), t_feat).squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Expand for cross-attention
        v_expanded = v_feat  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        t_expanded = t_feat  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        v_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(v_expanded, t_expanded, t_expanded)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        t_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(t_expanded, v_expanded, v_expanded)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        
        # Pool cross-attended features
        v_cross_weights = F.softmax(self.visual_pool(v_cross).squeeze(-1), dim=1)
        v_cross_pooled = torch.bmm(v_cross_weights.unsqueeze(1), v_cross).squeeze(1)
        
        t_cross_weights = F.softmax(self.text_pool(t_cross).squeeze(-1), dim=1)
        t_cross_pooled = torch.bmm(t_cross_weights.unsqueeze(1), t_cross).squeeze(1)
        
        # Combine all features
        combined = torch.cat([
            v_pooled + v_cross_pooled,
            t_pooled + t_cross_pooled
        ], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim * 2]
        
        # Fusion with MLP
        fused = self.fusion_norm1(combined)
        fused = self.fusion_mlp1(fused)  # [B, fused_dim]
        
        # Deep fusion blocks with residuals
        fused = fused + self.fusion_block1(fused)
        fused = fused + self.fusion_block2(fused)
        
        # Final output [B, 4]
        output = self.output_head(fused)
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 384
        
        # Visual processing with pooling attention
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Text processing
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention for visual->text and text->visual
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Self-attention for refinement
        self.self_attn_fused = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim * 2, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim // 2, 128),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
        # Learnable temperature for attention scaling
        self.temperature = nn.Parameter(torch.ones(1) * 0.07)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project visual features [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)
        
        # Project text features [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        v_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(
            query=v_feat,
            key=t_feat,
            value=t_feat
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        t_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(
            query=t_feat,
            key=v_feat,
            value=v_feat
        )
        
        # Global average pooling with learned weights
        v_pooled = v_enhanced.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        t_pooled = t_enhanced.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Concatenate pooled features
        fused = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim*2]
        
        # Expand for self-attention across modalities
        fused_expanded = fused.unsqueeze(1).expand(-1, 2, -1)  # [B, 2, hidden_dim*2]
        
        # Self-attention refinement
        fused_refined, _ = self.self_attn_fused(fused_expanded, fused_expanded, fused_expanded)
        fused_refined = fused_refined.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim*2]
        
        # Residual connection
        fused_final = fused + fused_refined
        
        # Fusion MLP
        fused_out = self.fusion_mlp(fused_final)
        
        # Classifier
        output = self.classifier(fused_out)
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
