        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 384
        
        # Visual processing with efficient pooling
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Text processing
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention (visual attends to text)
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            dropout=0.1,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention (text attends to visual)
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            dropout=0.1,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Self-attention for fused representation
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim * 2,
            num_heads=8,
            dropout=0.1,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 128),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
        # Learnable temperature for attention scaling
        self.temperature = nn.Parameter(torch.ones(1) * 0.07)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Project visual features [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)
        
        # Project text features [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual queries attend to text keys/values
        v_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(
            query=v_feat,
            key=t_feat,
            value=t_feat,
            need_weights=False
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries attend to visual keys/values
        t_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(
            query=t_feat,
            key=v_feat,
            value=v_feat,
            need_weights=False
        )
        
        # Global average pooling with learned weights
        v_pooled = v_enhanced.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        t_pooled = t_enhanced.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Concatenate pooled features
        fused = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim*2]
        fused = fused.unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, hidden_dim*2]
        
        # Self-attention on fused representation
        fused_attn, _ = self.self_attn(fused, fused, fused, need_weights=False)
        fused = fused + fused_attn  # Residual
        fused = fused.squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden_dim*2]
        
        # Final fusion and classification
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused)
        output = self.classifier(fused)
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        
        # Visual pathway: reduce sequence length then project
        self.visual_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(64)  # [B, 1024, 64]
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Text pathway: pool and project
        self.text_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(1)  # [B, 768, 1]
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention for visual features (query from visual, key/value from text)
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Self-attention on pooled visual tokens
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 65, self.hidden_dim * 2),  # 64 visual + 1 text
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 128),
            nn.LayerNorm(128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.05),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
        # Layer norms for attention
        self.norm1 = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.norm2 = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 64, 1024] -> [B, 64, hidden_dim]
        v = visual.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 1024, 256]
        v = self.visual_pool(v)     # [B, 1024, 64]
        v = v.transpose(1, 2)       # [B, 64, 1024]
        v = self.visual_proj(v)     # [B, 64, hidden_dim]
        
        # Process text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 1, 768] -> [B, 1, hidden_dim]
        t = text.transpose(1, 2)    # [B, 768, 77]
        t = self.text_pool(t)       # [B, 768, 1]
        t = t.squeeze(-1)           # [B, 768]
        t = self.text_proj(t)       # [B, hidden_dim]
        t = t.unsqueeze(1)          # [B, 1, hidden_dim]
        
        # Expand text for cross-attention
        t_expanded = t.expand(B, 64, self.hidden_dim)  # [B, 64, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        v_cross, _ = self.cross_attn(v, t_expanded, t_expanded)  # [B, 64, hidden_dim]
        v = self.norm1(v + v_cross)
        
        # Self-attention on visual features
        v_self, _ = self.self_attn(v, v, v)  # [B, 64, hidden_dim]
        v = self.norm2(v + v_self)
        
        # Concatenate all features: [B, 64, hidden_dim] + [B, 1, hidden_dim]
        combined = torch.cat([v, t], dim=1)  # [B, 65, hidden_dim]
        combined = combined.reshape(B, -1)   # [B, 65 * hidden_dim]
        
        # Final prediction
        out = self.fusion_mlp(combined)  # [B, 4]
        
        return out

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 768
        
        # Visual processing with attention pooling
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        self.visual_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.visual_pool = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 1),
        )
        
        # Text processing with attention pooling
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        self.text_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.text_pool = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 1),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention for fusion
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Fusion layers
        self.fusion_norm_v = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.fusion_norm_t = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Gated fusion
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Final projection layers
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Output head
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 4)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual features [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        v_attended, _ = self.visual_attn(v_feat, v_feat, v_feat)  # Self-attention
        v_weights = F.softmax(self.visual_pool(v_attended).squeeze(-1), dim=1)  # [B, 256]
        v_pooled = torch.bmm(v_weights.unsqueeze(1), v_attended).squeeze(1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Process text features [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, 512]
        t_attended, _ = self.text_attn(t_feat, t_feat, t_feat)  # Self-attention
        t_weights = F.softmax(self.text_pool(t_attended).squeeze(-1), dim=1)  # [B, 77]
        t_pooled = torch.bmm(t_weights.unsqueeze(1), t_attended).squeeze(1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Expand for cross-attention
        v_expanded = v_attended  # [B, 256, 512]
        t_expanded = t_attended  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        v_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(v_expanded, t_expanded, t_expanded)  # V attends to T
        t_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(t_expanded, v_expanded, v_expanded)  # T attends to V
        
        # Pool cross-attended features
        v_cross_weights = F.softmax(self.visual_pool(v_cross).squeeze(-1), dim=1)
        v_cross_pooled = torch.bmm(v_cross_weights.unsqueeze(1), v_cross).squeeze(1)
        
        t_cross_weights = F.softmax(self.text_pool(t_cross).squeeze(-1), dim=1)
        t_cross_pooled = torch.bmm(t_cross_weights.unsqueeze(1), t_cross).squeeze(1)
        
        # Combine pooled features
        v_combined = self.fusion_norm_v(v_pooled + v_cross_pooled)
        t_combined = self.fusion_norm_t(t_pooled + t_cross_pooled)
        
        # Gated fusion
        gate_input = torch.cat([v_combined, t_combined], dim=-1)
        g = self.gate(gate_input)
        fused = g * v_combined + (1 - g) * t_combined  # [B, 512]
        
        # Final MLP and output
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, 768]
        output = self.output_head(fused)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.vis_dim = 1024
        self.txt_dim = 768
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.common_dim = 512
        
        # Visual processing with spatial pooling
        self.vis_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.vis_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Text processing
        self.txt_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.txt_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention for fusion
        self.cross_attn_vis_to_txt = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            dropout=0.1,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        self.cross_attn_txt_to_vis = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            dropout=0.1,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Self-attention for refined representation
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim * 2,
            num_heads=8,
            dropout=0.1,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim, self.common_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Output head
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim // 2, 128),
            nn.LayerNorm(128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.05),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
        # Layer norms for attention
        self.ln1 = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim)
        self.ln2 = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim)
        self.ln3 = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim * 2)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, 512]
        vis_feat = self.vis_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        
        # Process text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, 512]
        txt_feat = self.txt_proj(text)  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Cross-attention: visual attends to text
        vis_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_vis_to_txt(
            query=self.ln1(vis_feat),
            key=txt_feat,
            value=txt_feat
        )
        vis_refined = vis_feat + vis_attended  # Residual
        
        # Cross-attention: text attends to visual
        txt_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_txt_to_vis(
            query=self.ln2(txt_feat),
            key=vis_feat,
            value=vis_feat
        )
        txt_refined = txt_feat + txt_attended  # Residual
        
        # Global pooling with attention weights
        # Use mean pooling with learned importance
        vis_pooled = vis_refined.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        txt_pooled = txt_refined.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Concatenate modalities
        fused = torch.cat([vis_pooled, txt_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        fused = fused.unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, 1024] for self-attention
        
        # Self-attention on fused representation
        fused_attn, _ = self.self_attn(
            query=self.ln3(fused),
            key=fused,
            value=fused
        )
        fused = fused + fused_attn  # Residual
        fused = fused.squeeze(1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Fusion MLP
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, 256]
        
        # Output
        output = self.output_head(fused)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 384
        
        # Visual processing with pooling attention
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Text processing
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention for visual->text and text->visual
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Self-attention for refined fusion
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim * 2, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 4, self.fused_dim * 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 128),
            nn.LayerNorm(128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
        # Learnable temperature for attention scaling
        self.temperature = nn.Parameter(torch.ones(1) * 0.07)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Project inputs
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)      # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        v_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(
            v_feat, t_feat, t_feat,
            need_weights=False
        )  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual  
        t_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(
            t_feat, v_feat, v_feat,
            need_weights=False
        )  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        
        # Pool with attention weights
        v_pooled = v_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        t_pooled = t_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Also compute max pooling for diversity
        v_max = v_attended.max(dim=1)[0]   # [B, hidden_dim]
        t_max = t_attended.max(dim=1)[0]   # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Concatenate multiple views
        concat_feat = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled, v_max, t_max], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim*4]
        
        # Fusion
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(concat_feat)  # [B, fused_dim]
        
        # Output
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024 -> project to compact representation
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(1024, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        
        # Text: 77x768 -> project and pool
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(768, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention for fusion
        self.cross_attn_visual_to_text = nn.MultiheadAttention(embed_dim=512, num_heads=8, dropout=0.1, batch_first=True)
        self.cross_attn_text_to_visual = nn.MultiheadAttention(embed_dim=512, num_heads=8, dropout=0.1, batch_first=True)
        
        # Self-attention for refined fusion
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(embed_dim=512, num_heads=8, dropout=0.1, batch_first=True)
        
        # Feed-forward networks
        self.ffn_visual = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(512, 2048),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(2048, 512),
        )
        self.ffn_text = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(512, 2048),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(2048, 512),
        )
        
        # Layer norms
        self.norm_v1 = nn.LayerNorm(512)
        self.norm_t1 = nn.LayerNorm(512)
        self.norm_v2 = nn.LayerNorm(512)
        self.norm_t2 = nn.LayerNorm(512)
        self.norm_fusion = nn.LayerNorm(512)
        
        # Gated fusion
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(1024, 512),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Final classifier with residual connections
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(512, 1024),
            nn.LayerNorm(1024),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(1024, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(512, 128),
            nn.LayerNorm(128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
        # Skip connection projection
        self.skip_proj = nn.Linear(512, 4)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, 512]
        v = self.visual_proj(visual)
        
        # Project text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, 512]
        t = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        v_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_visual_to_text(v, t, t)
        v = self.norm_v1(v + v_attended)
        v = self.norm_v2(v + self.ffn_visual(v))
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        t_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_text_to_visual(t, v, v)
        t = self.norm_t1(t + t_attended)
        t = self.norm_t2(t + self.ffn_text(t))
        
        # Pool visual (mean pooling with learned attention weights)
        v_weights = torch.softmax(v.mean(dim=-1, keepdim=True), dim=1)  # [B, 256, 1]
        v_pooled = (v * v_weights).sum(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Pool text (CLS-like pooling)
        t_pooled = t.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Gated fusion
        combined = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        gate = self.gate(combined)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Weighted combination
        fused = gate * v_pooled + (1 - gate) * t_pooled  # [B, 512]
        fused = self.norm_fusion(fused)
        
        # Add slight noise during training for regularization
        if self.training:
            fused = fused + torch.randn_like(fused) * 0.01
        
        # Final classification with skip
        output = self.classifier(fused) + self.skip_proj(fused) * 0.3
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 384
        
        # Visual processing with pooling attention
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        self.visual_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.visual_pool = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
        )
        
        # Text processing with pooling attention
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        self.text_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.text_pool = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal fusion with gating
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.fused_dim, num_heads=6, batch_first=True)
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.fused_dim, num_heads=6, batch_first=True)
        
        # Gated fusion
        self.gate_v = nn.Sequential(nn.Linear(self.fused_dim * 2, self.fused_dim), nn.Sigmoid())
        self.gate_t = nn.Sequential(nn.Linear(self.fused_dim * 2, self.fused_dim), nn.Sigmoid())
        
        # Deep fusion network
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Classification head with residual connections
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim // 2, 128),
            nn.LayerNorm(128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
        self._init_weights()
    
    def _init_weights(self):
        for m in self.modules():
            if isinstance(m, nn.Linear):
                nn.init.xavier_uniform_(m.weight)
                if m.bias is not None:
                    nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
            elif isinstance(m, nn.LayerNorm):
                nn.init.ones_(m.weight)
                nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual features [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, fused_dim]
        v = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_attended, _ = self.visual_attn(v, v, v)  # Self-attention
        v_pooled = v_attended.mean(dim=1)  # Global average pooling
        v_feat = self.visual_pool(v_pooled)  # [B, fused_dim]
        
        # Process text features [B, 77, 768] -> [B, fused_dim]
        t = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_attended, _ = self.text_attn(t, t, t)  # Self-attention
        t_pooled = t_attended.mean(dim=1)  # Global average pooling
        t_feat = self.text_pool(t_pooled)  # [B, fused_dim]
        
        # Expand for cross-attention [B, 1, fused_dim]
        v_exp = v_feat.unsqueeze(1)
        t_exp = t_feat.unsqueeze(1)
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        v_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(v_exp, t_exp, t_exp)  # Visual attends to text
        t_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(t_exp, v_exp, v_exp)  # Text attends to visual
        
        v_cross = v_cross.squeeze(1)  # [B, fused_dim]
        t_cross = t_cross.squeeze(1)  # [B, fused_dim]
        
        # Gated fusion
        gate_input_v = torch.cat([v_feat, v_cross], dim=-1)
        gate_input_t = torch.cat([t_feat, t_cross], dim=-1)
        
        g_v = self.gate_v(gate_input_v)  # [B, fused_dim]
        g_t = self.gate_t(gate_input_t)  # [B, fused_dim]
        
        v_fused = g_v * v_feat + (1 - g_v) * v_cross
        t_fused = g_t * t_feat + (1 - g_t) * t_cross
        
        # Concatenate and fuse
        fused = torch.cat([v_fused, t_fused], dim=-1)  # [B, fused_dim * 2]
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, fused_dim // 2]
        
        # Final classification
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.vis_dim = 1024
        self.txt_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 768
        
        # Visual processing with attention pooling
        self.vis_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.vis_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        self.vis_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.vis_pool = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 1),
        )
        
        # Text processing with attention pooling
        self.txt_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.txt_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        self.txt_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.txt_pool = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 1),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Fusion layers
        self.fusion = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 4, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        
        # Output head
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim // 2, 128),
            nn.LayerNorm(128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.05),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
        # Initialize weights
        self._init_weights()
    
    def _init_weights(self):
        for m in self.modules():
            if isinstance(m, nn.Linear):
                nn.init.xavier_uniform_(m.weight)
                if m.bias is not None:
                    nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
            elif isinstance(m, nn.LayerNorm):
                nn.init.ones_(m.weight)
                nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual features [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        vis_feat = self.vis_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        vis_self, _ = self.vis_attn(vis_feat, vis_feat, vis_feat)  # Self-attention
        vis_self = vis_self + vis_feat  # Residual
        
        # Attention-based pooling for visual
        vis_weights = F.softmax(self.vis_pool(vis_self).squeeze(-1), dim=1)  # [B, 256]
        vis_global = torch.bmm(vis_weights.unsqueeze(1), vis_self).squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Process text features [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        txt_feat = self.txt_proj(text)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        txt_self, _ = self.txt_attn(txt_feat, txt_feat, txt_feat)  # Self-attention
        txt_self = txt_self + txt_feat  # Residual
        
        # Attention-based pooling for text
        txt_weights = F.softmax(self.txt_pool(txt_self).squeeze(-1), dim=1)  # [B, 77]
        txt_global = torch.bmm(txt_weights.unsqueeze(1), txt_self).squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        vis_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(vis_self, txt_self, txt_self)  # Visual attends to text
        txt_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(txt_self, vis_self, vis_self)  # Text attends to visual
        
        # Pool cross-modal features
        vis_cross_weights = F.softmax(self.vis_pool(vis_cross).squeeze(-1), dim=1)
        vis_cross_global = torch.bmm(vis_cross_weights.unsqueeze(1), vis_cross).squeeze(1)
        
        txt_cross_weights = F.softmax(self.txt_pool(txt_cross).squeeze(-1), dim=1)
        txt_cross_global = torch.bmm(txt_cross_weights.unsqueeze(1), txt_cross).squeeze(1)
        
        # Concatenate all features
        fused = torch.cat([
            vis_global,           # [B, hidden_dim]
            txt_global,           # [B, hidden_dim]
            vis_cross_global,     # [B, hidden_dim]
            txt_cross_global      # [B, hidden_dim]
        ], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim * 4]
        
        # Fusion and classification
        fused = self.fusion(fused)
        output = self.classifier(fused)
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 384
        
        # Visual processing with attention pooling
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        self.visual_attn = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 64),
            nn.Tanh(),
            nn.Linear(64, 1)
        )
        
        # Text processing with attention pooling
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        self.text_attn = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 64),
            nn.Tanh(),
            nn.Linear(64, 1)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        self.cross_q = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.fused_dim)
        self.cross_k = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.fused_dim)
        self.cross_v = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.fused_dim)
        self.cross_scale = self.fused_dim ** -0.5
        
        # Gated fusion
        self.gate_visual = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.fused_dim)
        self.gate_text = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.fused_dim)
        self.gate_bias = nn.Parameter(torch.zeros(self.fused_dim))
        
        # Deep fusion network
        self.fusion_net = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        
        # Output head with residual connections
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim // 2, 128),
            nn.LayerNorm(128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.05),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
        # Initialize weights
        self._init_weights()
    
    def _init_weights(self):
        for m in self.modules():
            if isinstance(m, nn.Linear):
                nn.init.xavier_uniform_(m.weight)
                if m.bias is not None:
                    nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
            elif isinstance(m, nn.LayerNorm):
                nn.init.ones_(m.weight)
                nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual features [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, hidden_dim]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_attn = self.visual_attn(v_feat).squeeze(-1)  # [B, 256]
        v_attn = F.softmax(v_attn, dim=-1)
        v_pooled = torch.bmm(v_attn.unsqueeze(1), v_feat).squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Process text features [B, 77, 768] -> [B, hidden_dim]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_attn = self.text_attn(t_feat).squeeze(-1)  # [B, 77]
        t_attn = F.softmax(t_attn, dim=-1)
        t_pooled = torch.bmm(t_attn.unsqueeze(1), t_feat).squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        q = self.cross_q(v_pooled).unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, fused_dim]
        k = self.cross_k(t_pooled).unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, fused_dim]
        v = self.cross_v(t_pooled).unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, fused_dim]
        
        cross_attn = torch.bmm(q, k.transpose(1, 2)) * self.cross_scale  # [B, 1, 1]
        cross_attn = F.softmax(cross_attn, dim=-1)
        cross_out = torch.bmm(cross_attn, v).squeeze(1)  # [B, fused_dim]
        
        # Gated fusion
        v_gate = torch.sigmoid(self.gate_visual(v_pooled) + self.gate_bias)
        t_gate = torch.sigmoid(self.gate_text(t_pooled))
        
        v_fused = v_gate * self.cross_q(v_pooled)
        t_fused = t_gate * self.cross_k(t_pooled)
        
        # Combine all features
        combined = torch.cat([
            v_fused + cross_out,
            t_fused + cross_out
        ], dim=-1)  # [B, fused_dim * 2]
        
        # Deep fusion
        fused = self.fusion_net(combined)  # [B, fused_dim // 2]
        
        # Output
        output = self.output_head(fused)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 256
        
        # Visual projection: flatten spatial then project
        self.visual_proj = nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Text projection
        self.text_proj = nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=4, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Fusion layers
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        
        # Output head
        self.output_head = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 2, 4)
        
        self._init_weights()
    
    def _init_weights(self):
        for m in self.modules():
            if isinstance(m, nn.Linear):
                nn.init.xavier_uniform_(m.weight)
                if m.bias is not None:
                    nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
            elif isinstance(m, nn.LayerNorm):
                nn.init.ones_(m.weight)
                nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> pool to [B, 1024] then project
        v_pooled = visual.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 1024]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(v_pooled)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        v_feat = v_feat.unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, hidden_dim]
        
        # Text: [B, 77, 768] -> project first
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross attention: visual token attends to all text tokens
        v_attended, _ = self.cross_attn(v_feat, t_feat, t_feat)  # [B, 1, hidden_dim]
        v_attended = v_attended.squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Pool text features
        t_pooled = t_feat.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Concatenate and fuse
        combined = torch.cat([v_attended, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim*2]
        
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(combined)  # [B, hidden_dim//2]
        
        # Output
        output = self.output_head(fused)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        
        # Visual processing: reduce sequence length then project
        self.visual_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(64)  # [B, 1024, 64]
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Text processing: pool and project
        self.text_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(32)  # [B, 768, 32]
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention for fusion
        self.cross_attn_visual = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.cross_attn_text = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Self-attention for refined fusion
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim * 2, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Fusion MLP with residual connections
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 2, 4)
        )
        
        # Layer norms for stability
        self.norm_v = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.norm_t = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.norm_fused = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim * 2)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 64, 1024] -> [B, 64, hidden]
        v = visual.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 1024, 256]
        v = self.visual_pool(v)     # [B, 1024, 64]
        v = v.transpose(1, 2)       # [B, 64, 1024]
        v = self.visual_proj(v)     # [B, 64, hidden]
        v = self.norm_v(v)
        
        # Process text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 32, 768] -> [B, 32, hidden]
        t = text.transpose(1, 2)    # [B, 768, 77]
        t = self.text_pool(t)       # [B, 768, 32]
        t = t.transpose(1, 2)       # [B, 32, 768]
        t = self.text_proj(t)       # [B, 32, hidden]
        t = self.norm_t(t)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text and vice versa
        v_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_visual(v, t, t)  # [B, 64, hidden]
        t_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_text(t, v, v)    # [B, 32, hidden]
        
        # Pool attended features
        v_pooled = v_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden]
        t_pooled = t_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden]
        
        # Concatenate and refine
        fused = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden*2]
        fused = self.norm_fused(fused).unsqueeze(1)      # [B, 1, hidden*2]
        
        # Self-attention for final refinement
        fused_refined, _ = self.self_attn(fused, fused, fused)  # [B, 1, hidden*2]
        fused_refined = fused_refined.squeeze(1) + fused.squeeze(1)  # Residual
        
        # MLP fusion with skip from pooled features
        fused_out = self.fusion_mlp(fused_refined)  # [B, hidden]
        
        # Add residual connection from early fusion
        early_fusion = v_pooled + t_pooled  # Simple additive fusion as residual
        fused_out = fused_out + 0.3 * early_fusion  # Gated residual
        
        # Final classification
        output = self.classifier(fused_out)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 384
        
        # Visual processing with pooling attention
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        self.visual_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Text processing
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        self.text_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Cross-modal fusion
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Gated fusion
        self.gate_v = nn.Sequential(nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.fused_dim), nn.Sigmoid())
        self.gate_t = nn.Sequential(nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.fused_dim), nn.Sigmoid())
        self.transform_v = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.fused_dim)
        self.transform_t = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.fused_dim)
        
        # Final classifier with residual connections
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(256, 128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
        self._init_weights()
    
    def _init_weights(self):
        for m in self.modules():
            if isinstance(m, nn.Linear):
                nn.init.xavier_uniform_(m.weight)
                if m.bias is not None:
                    nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # visual: [B, 256, 1024], text: [B, 77, 768]
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual features
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_feat, _ = self.visual_attn(v_feat, v_feat, v_feat)  # Self-attention
        v_pooled = v_feat.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Process text features  
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_feat, _ = self.text_attn(t_feat, t_feat, t_feat)  # Self-attention
        t_pooled = t_feat.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Expand for cross-attention
        v_expanded = v_feat  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        t_expanded = t_feat  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        v_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(v_expanded, t_expanded, t_expanded)  # Visual attends to text
        t_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(t_expanded, v_expanded, v_expanded)  # Text attends to visual
        
        v_cross_pooled = v_cross.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        t_cross_pooled = t_cross.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Combine with residual
        v_final = v_pooled + v_cross_pooled  # [B, hidden_dim]
        t_final = t_pooled + t_cross_pooled  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Gated fusion
        g_v = self.gate_v(v_final)  # [B, fused_dim]
        g_t = self.gate_t(t_final)  # [B, fused_dim]
        
        v_transformed = self.transform_v(v_final)  # [B, fused_dim]
        t_transformed = self.transform_t(t_final)  # [B, fused_dim]
        
        # Adaptive gated combination
        fused = g_v * v_transformed + g_t * t_transformed + (1 - g_v) * (1 - g_t) * (v_transformed + t_transformed) / 2
        
        # Classification
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):

        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        
        # Visual processing: reduce sequence length then project
        self.visual_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(64)  # [B, 1024, 64]
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Text processing
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention for fusion
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Self-attention for refined fusion
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim * 2, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Output head with residual connections
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 2, 128),
            nn.LayerNorm(128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
        # Initialize weights
        self._init_weights()
    
    def _init_weights(self):
        for m in self.modules():
            if isinstance(m, nn.Linear):
                nn.init.xavier_uniform_(m.weight)
                if m.bias is not None:
                    nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
            elif isinstance(m, nn.LayerNorm):
                nn.init.ones_(m.weight)
                nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 64, hidden_dim]
        v = visual.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 1024, 256]
        v = self.visual_pool(v)  # [B, 1024, 64]
        v = v.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 64, 1024]
        v = self.visual_proj(v)  # [B, 64, hidden_dim]
        
        # Process text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        v_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(v, t, t)  # [B, 64, hidden_dim]
        t_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(t, v, v)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        
        # Pool attended features
        v_pooled = v_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        t_pooled = t_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Concatenate and fuse
        fused = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim*2]
        
        # Refine with self-attention on expanded dims
        fused_seq = fused.unsqueeze(1).expand(-1, 4, -1)  # [B, 4, hidden_dim*2]
        fused_refined, _ = self.self_attn(fused_seq, fused_seq, fused_seq)
        fused_refined = fused_refined.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim*2]
        
        # Residual connection
        fused = fused + fused_refined
        
        # Final fusion and output
        features = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, hidden_dim//2]
        output = self.output_head(features)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        
        # Visual processing: reduce sequence length then project
        self.visual_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(64)  # [B, 1024, 64]
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Text processing
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention for fusion
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Self-attention for refined fusion
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim * 2, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Output head with residual connections
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 2, 128),
            nn.LayerNorm(128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
        # Learnable modality weights
        self.modality_gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, 2),
            nn.Softmax(dim=-1)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 64, 1024] -> [B, 64, hidden]
        v = visual.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 1024, 256]
        v = self.visual_pool(v)  # [B, 1024, 64]
        v = v.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 64, 1024]
        v = self.visual_proj(v)  # [B, 64, hidden]
        
        # Process text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden]
        t = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, hidden]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        v_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(v, t, t)  # [B, 64, hidden]
        t_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(t, v, v)  # [B, 77, hidden]
        
        # Pool attended features
        v_pooled = v_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden]
        t_pooled = t_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden]
        
        # Concatenate modalities
        fused = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden*2]
        
        # Modality gating for dynamic fusion
        gate_weights = self.modality_gate(fused)  # [B, 2]
        
        # Apply gating
        v_weighted = v_pooled * gate_weights[:, 0:1]
        t_weighted = t_pooled * gate_weights[:, 1:2]
        gated_fused = torch.cat([v_weighted, t_weighted], dim=-1)
        
        # Add residual from original concatenation
        fused_residual = fused + gated_fused
        
        # Self-attention on sequence (add batch dim for attn)
        fused_seq = fused_residual.unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, hidden*2]
        fused_seq, _ = self.self_attn(fused_seq, fused_seq, fused_seq)
        fused_seq = fused_seq.squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden*2]
        
        # Final fusion with residual
        fused_final = fused_residual + fused_seq
        
        # MLP processing
        features = self.fusion_mlp(fused_final)  # [B, hidden//2]
        
        # Output
        output = self.output_head(features)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output
