import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 384
        
        # Visual processing with efficient pooling
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Text processing
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention (visual attends to text)
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            dropout=0.1,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention (text attends to visual)
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            dropout=0.1,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Self-attention for refined fusion
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim * 2,
            num_heads=8,
            dropout=0.1,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim // 2, 128),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
        # Layer norms for stability
        self.ln_v = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.ln_t = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.ln_fused = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim * 2)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project and pool visual features [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 64, hidden_dim]
        v_tokens = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        # Adaptive pooling to reduce sequence length
        v_pooled = F.adaptive_avg_pool1d(v_tokens.transpose(1, 2), 64).transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 64, hidden_dim]
        v_pooled = self.ln_v(v_pooled)
        
        # Project text features [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_tokens = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_tokens = self.ln_t(t_tokens)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual queries attend to text keys/values
        v_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(
            query=v_pooled, key=t_tokens, value=t_tokens
        )  # [B, 64, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries attend to visual keys/values  
        t_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(
            query=t_tokens, key=v_pooled, value=v_pooled
        )  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        
        # Pool both modalities
        v_feat = v_enhanced.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        t_feat = t_enhanced.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Concatenate features
        fused = torch.cat([v_feat, t_feat], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim*2]
        fused = fused.unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, hidden_dim*2]
        fused = self.ln_fused(fused)
        
        # Self-attention for feature interaction
        fused_attended, _ = self.self_attn(fused, fused, fused)  # [B, 1, hidden_dim*2]
        fused_attended = fused_attended + fused  # Residual
        
        # Final fusion and classification
        fused_out = fused_attended.squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden_dim*2]
        fused_out = self.fusion_mlp(fused_out)  # [B, fused_dim//2]
        
        # Output
        output = self.classifier(fused_out)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        
        # Visual processing: reduce sequence length then project
        self.visual_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(64)  # [B, 1024, 64]
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Text processing
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention for fusion
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Self-attention for refined fusion
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim * 2, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Output head with residual connections
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 2, 128),
            nn.LayerNorm(128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
        # Initialize weights
        self._init_weights()
    
    def _init_weights(self):
        for m in self.modules():
            if isinstance(m, nn.Linear):
                nn.init.xavier_uniform_(m.weight)
                if m.bias is not None:
                    nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
            elif isinstance(m, nn.LayerNorm):
                nn.init.ones_(m.weight)
                nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 64, hidden_dim]
        v = visual.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 1024, 256]
        v = self.visual_pool(v)  # [B, 1024, 64]
        v = v.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 64, 1024]
        v = self.visual_proj(v)  # [B, 64, hidden_dim]
        
        # Process text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        v_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(v, t, t)  # [B, 64, hidden_dim]
        t_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(t, v, v)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        
        # Pool attended features
        v_pooled = v_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        t_pooled = t_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Concatenate and fuse
        fused = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim*2]
        
        # Self-attention on expanded sequence for richer interaction
        fused_seq = fused.unsqueeze(1).expand(-1, 4, -1)  # [B, 4, hidden_dim*2]
        fused_seq, _ = self.self_attn(fused_seq, fused_seq, fused_seq)
        fused_refined = fused_seq.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim*2]
        
        # Residual connection
        fused_final = fused + fused_refined
        
        # Final fusion and output
        features = self.fusion_mlp(fused_final)  # [B, hidden_dim//2]
        output = self.output_head(features)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 384
        
        # Visual processing with pooling attention
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Text processing
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention for visual->text and text->visual
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Self-attention for refined fusion
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim * 2, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 4, self.fused_dim * 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 128),
            nn.LayerNorm(128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
        # Learnable temperature for gating
        self.temp = nn.Parameter(torch.ones(1))
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project inputs
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)      # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        v_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(v_feat, t_feat, t_feat)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual  
        t_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(t_feat, v_feat, v_feat)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        
        # Pool with attention weights
        v_pooled = v_enhanced.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        t_pooled = t_enhanced.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Concatenate for joint representation
        joint = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim*2]
        
        # Self-attention on stacked features (reshape for attention)
        joint_seq = joint.unsqueeze(1).expand(-1, 2, -1)  # [B, 2, hidden_dim*2]
        joint_refined, _ = self.self_attn(joint_seq, joint_seq, joint_seq)
        joint_refined = joint_refined.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim*2]
        
        # Gated combination of original and refined
        gate = torch.sigmoid(self.temp)
        combined = torch.cat([
            gate * joint + (1 - gate) * joint_refined,
            v_pooled * t_pooled,  # element-wise interaction
            torch.abs(v_pooled - t_pooled)  # difference feature
        ], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim*4]
        
        # Final fusion and classification
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(combined)
        output = self.classifier(fused)
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 384
        
        # Visual processing with pooling attention
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        self.visual_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Text processing
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        self.text_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Cross-modal fusion
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Gated fusion
        self.gate_v = nn.Sequential(nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim), nn.Sigmoid())
        self.gate_t = nn.Sequential(nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim), nn.Sigmoid())
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Output head
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim // 2, 128),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
        self._init_weights()
    
    def _init_weights(self):
        for m in self.modules():
            if isinstance(m, nn.Linear):
                nn.init.xavier_uniform_(m.weight)
                if m.bias is not None:
                    nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
            elif isinstance(m, nn.LayerNorm):
                nn.init.ones_(m.weight)
                nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project and process visual features [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, hidden]
        v = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        v_attended, _ = self.visual_attn(v, v, v)  # Self-attention on visual
        v_pooled = v_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Project and process text features [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden]
        t = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, 512]
        t_attended, _ = self.text_attn(t, t, t)  # Self-attention on text
        t_pooled = t_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Expand for cross-attention
        v_expanded = v_attended  # [B, 256, 512]
        t_expanded = t_attended  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        v_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(v_expanded, t_expanded, t_expanded)  # Visual attends to text
        t_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(t_expanded, v_expanded, v_expanded)  # Text attends to visual
        
        # Pool cross-attended features
        v_cross_pooled = v_cross.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        t_cross_pooled = t_cross.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Gated fusion
        gate_input_v = torch.cat([v_pooled, v_cross_pooled], dim=-1)
        gate_input_t = torch.cat([t_pooled, t_cross_pooled], dim=-1)
        
        g_v = self.gate_v(gate_input_v)  # [B, 512]
        g_t = self.gate_t(gate_input_t)  # [B, 512]
        
        v_fused = g_v * v_pooled + (1 - g_v) * v_cross_pooled
        t_fused = g_t * t_pooled + (1 - g_t) * t_cross_pooled
        
        # Final fusion
        fused = torch.cat([v_fused, t_fused], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, 192]
        
        # Output
        output = self.output_head(fused)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 384
        
        # Visual processing with attention pooling
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        self.visual_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Text processing with attention pooling
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        self.text_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Cross-modal fusion
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Fusion layers
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 4, self.fused_dim * 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        
        # Output head
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 128),
            nn.LayerNorm(128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
        # Learnable query tokens for pooling
        self.visual_query = nn.Parameter(torch.randn(1, 1, self.hidden_dim))
        self.text_query = nn.Parameter(torch.randn(1, 1, self.hidden_dim))
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual features [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)
        v_query = self.visual_query.expand(B, -1, -1)
        v_pooled, _ = self.visual_attn(v_query, v_feat, v_feat)  # [B, 1, hidden_dim]
        v_pooled = v_pooled.squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Process text features [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)
        t_query = self.text_query.expand(B, -1, -1)
        t_pooled, _ = self.text_attn(t_query, t_feat, t_feat)  # [B, 1, hidden_dim]
        t_pooled = t_pooled.squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        v_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(v_feat, t_feat, t_feat)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        t_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(t_feat, v_feat, v_feat)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        
        # Pool cross features
        v_cross_pooled, _ = self.visual_attn(v_query, v_cross, v_cross)
        v_cross_pooled = v_cross_pooled.squeeze(1)
        t_cross_pooled, _ = self.text_attn(t_query, t_cross, t_cross)
        t_cross_pooled = t_cross_pooled.squeeze(1)
        
        # Concatenate all representations
        fused = torch.cat([
            v_pooled,           # [B, hidden_dim]
            t_pooled,           # [B, hidden_dim]
            v_cross_pooled,     # [B, hidden_dim]
            t_cross_pooled      # [B, hidden_dim]
        ], dim=-1)              # [B, hidden_dim * 4]
        
        # Fusion and classification
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, fused_dim]
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        
        # Visual processing: reduce sequence length then project
        self.visual_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(64)  # [B, 1024, 64]
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Text processing
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention for fusion
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Self-attention for refined fusion
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim * 2, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Output head
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 2, 128),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
        # Learnable modality weights
        self.modality_gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, 2),
            nn.Softmax(dim=-1)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 64, 1024] -> [B, 64, hidden]
        visual = visual.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 1024, 256]
        visual = self.visual_pool(visual)  # [B, 1024, 64]
        visual = visual.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 64, 1024]
        visual_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 64, hidden]
        
        # Process text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden]
        text_feat = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, hidden]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        v2t, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(text_feat, visual_feat, visual_feat)  # [B, 77, hidden]
        t2v, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(visual_feat, text_feat, text_feat)  # [B, 64, hidden]
        
        # Pool and concatenate
        v_pooled = t2v.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden]
        t_pooled = v2t.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden]
        
        # Modality gating
        concat_feat = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden*2]
        gate_weights = self.modality_gate(concat_feat)  # [B, 2]
        
        # Weighted combination
        gated_visual = v_pooled * gate_weights[:, 0:1]
        gated_text = t_pooled * gate_weights[:, 1:2]
        fused = torch.cat([gated_visual, gated_text], dim=-1)
        
        # Final processing
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused)
        output = self.output_head(fused)
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        
        # Visual pathway: reduce sequence length then project
        self.visual_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(64)  # [B, 1024, 64]
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Text pathway: pool and project
        self.text_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(32)  # [B, 768, 32]
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention for fusion
        self.cross_attn_visual = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.cross_attn_text = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Self-attention on fused features
        self.fusion_dim = self.hidden_dim * 2
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.fusion_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Gated fusion
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fusion_dim, self.fusion_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Output head with residual connections
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fusion_dim, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.LayerNorm(256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 4)
        )
        
        # Skip connection projection
        self.skip_proj = nn.Linear(self.fusion_dim, 4)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 64, hidden_dim]
        v = visual.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 1024, 256]
        v = self.visual_pool(v)  # [B, 1024, 64]
        v = v.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 64, 1024]
        v = self.visual_proj(v)  # [B, 64, hidden_dim]
        
        # Process text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 32, hidden_dim]
        t = text.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 768, 77]
        t = self.text_pool(t)  # [B, 768, 32]
        t = t.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 32, 768]
        t = self.text_proj(t)  # [B, 32, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        v_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_visual(v, t, t)  # [B, 64, hidden_dim]
        t_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_text(t, v, v)  # [B, 32, hidden_dim]
        
        # Pool attended features
        v_pooled = v_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        t_pooled = t_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Concatenate
        fused = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, fusion_dim]
        fused = fused.unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, fusion_dim]
        
        # Self-attention with residual
        attn_out, _ = self.self_attn(fused, fused, fused)
        fused = fused + attn_out
        fused = fused.squeeze(1)  # [B, fusion_dim]
        
        # Gated fusion
        gate = self.gate(fused)
        fused = gate * fused + (1 - gate) * torch.tanh(fused)
        
        # Final prediction with skip
        out = self.classifier(fused)
        skip = self.skip_proj(fused)
        return out + 0.3 * skip

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        
        # Visual processing: reduce sequence length then project
        self.visual_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(64)  # [B, 1024, 64]
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Text processing
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention for fusion
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Self-attention for refined fusion
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim * 2, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Output head
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 2, 128),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
        # Layer norms for stability
        self.norm_v = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.norm_t = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.norm_fused = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim * 2)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 64, 1024] -> [B, 64, hidden_dim]
        visual = visual.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 1024, 256]
        visual = self.visual_pool(visual)  # [B, 1024, 64]
        visual = visual.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 64, 1024]
        visual = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 64, hidden_dim]
        
        # Process text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        text = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        v_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(visual, text, text)  # visual attends to text
        t_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(text, visual, visual)  # text attends to visual
        
        v_enhanced = self.norm_v(v_enhanced + visual)
        t_enhanced = self.norm_t(t_enhanced + text)
        
        # Global pooling
        v_pooled = v_enhanced.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        t_pooled = t_enhanced.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Concatenate and refine
        fused = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim*2]
        fused = self.norm_fused(fused)
        
        # Fusion MLP
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, hidden_dim//2]
        
        # Output
        output = self.output_head(fused)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 384
        
        # Visual processing with pooling attention
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        self.visual_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Text processing
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        self.text_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Cross-modal fusion with bidirectional attention
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Gated fusion mechanism
        self.gate_v = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        self.gate_t = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion refinement
        self.fusion_norm = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim * 2)
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.fused_dim * 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        
        # Output head with residual connections
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 128),
            nn.LayerNorm(128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
        # Initialize weights
        self._init_weights()
    
    def _init_weights(self):
        for m in self.modules():
            if isinstance(m, nn.Linear):
                nn.init.xavier_uniform_(m.weight)
                if m.bias is not None:
                    nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
            elif isinstance(m, nn.LayerNorm):
                nn.init.ones_(m.weight)
                nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # visual: [B, 256, 1024], text: [B, 77, 768]
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project and process visual features
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_feat, _ = self.visual_attn(v_feat, v_feat, v_feat)  # Self-attention
        
        # Project and process text features  
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_feat, _ = self.text_attn(t_feat, t_feat, t_feat)  # Self-attention
        
        # Global pooling with attention weights
        v_global = v_feat.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        t_global = t_feat.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        v_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(v_feat, t_feat, t_feat)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        t_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(t_feat, v_feat, v_feat)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        
        v_cross_global = v_cross.mean(dim=1)
        t_cross_global = t_cross.mean(dim=1)
        
        # Gated fusion
        gate_v_input = torch.cat([v_global, v_cross_global], dim=-1)
        gate_t_input = torch.cat([t_global, t_cross_global], dim=-1)
        
        g_v = self.gate_v(gate_v_input)
        g_t = self.gate_t(gate_t_input)
        
        v_fused = g_v * v_global + (1 - g_v) * v_cross_global
        t_fused = g_t * t_global + (1 - g_t) * t_cross_global
        
        # Combine modalities
        fused = torch.cat([v_fused, t_fused], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim * 2]
        fused = self.fusion_norm(fused)
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, fused_dim]
        
        # Final prediction with residual from global features
        residual = 0.1 * (v_global[:, :self.fused_dim] + t_global[:, :self.fused_dim])
        output = self.output_head(fused + residual)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 384
        
        # Visual processing with efficient pooling
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Text processing
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention (visual attends to text)
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            dropout=0.1,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention (text attends to visual)
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            dropout=0.1,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Self-attention for refined fusion
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim * 2,
            num_heads=8,
            dropout=0.1,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim // 2, 128),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
        # Learnable temperature for attention scaling
        self.temp_v = nn.Parameter(torch.ones(1) * 0.07)
        self.temp_t = nn.Parameter(torch.ones(1) * 0.07)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project visual features [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)
        
        # Project text features [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Cross-attention: visual queries attend to text keys/values
        v_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(
            query=v_feat,
            key=t_feat,
            value=t_feat,
            need_weights=False
        )
        
        # Cross-attention: text queries attend to visual keys/values
        t_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(
            query=t_feat,
            key=v_feat,
            value=v_feat,
            need_weights=False
        )
        
        # Global pooling with attention weights
        v_pooled = v_enhanced.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        t_pooled = t_enhanced.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Concatenate pooled features
        fused = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim*2]
        fused = fused.unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, hidden_dim*2]
        
        # Self-attention refinement
        fused_refined, _ = self.self_attn(fused, fused, fused, need_weights=False)
        fused_refined = fused_refined.squeeze(1) + fused.squeeze(1)  # Residual
        
        # Final fusion and classification
        output = self.fusion_mlp(fused_refined)
        logits = self.classifier(output)
        
        return logits

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        
        # Cross-modal attention for fusion
        self.visual_to_text = nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.text_dim)
        self.text_to_visual = nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.visual_dim)
        
        # Self-attention layers
        self.visual_self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.visual_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.text_self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.text_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Cross-attention layers
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.text_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.visual_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Gated fusion
        self.gate_v = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim + self.text_dim, self.visual_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        self.gate_t = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim + self.text_dim, self.text_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Projection to common space
        self.common_dim = 512
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.LayerNorm(self.visual_dim),
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.LayerNorm(self.text_dim),
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Deep fusion network
        self.fusion = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, 768),
            nn.LayerNorm(768),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(768, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.LayerNorm(256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.05),
            nn.Linear(256, 4)
        )
        
        # Learnable temperature for attention scaling
        self.temp = nn.Parameter(torch.ones(1) * 0.07)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Self-attention on each modality
        v_self, _ = self.visual_self_attn(visual, visual, visual)
        t_self, _ = self.text_self_attn(text, text, text)
        
        # Add residual connections
        v_enhanced = visual + 0.3 * v_self
        t_enhanced = text + 0.3 * t_self
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        v_for_t = self.visual_to_text(v_enhanced)  # [B, 256, 768]
        t_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(t_enhanced, v_for_t, v_for_t)
        
        t_for_v = self.text_to_visual(t_enhanced)  # [B, 77, 1024]
        v_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(v_enhanced, t_for_v, t_for_v)
        
        # Residual and combine
        t_fused = t_enhanced + 0.3 * t_cross
        v_fused = v_enhanced + 0.3 * v_cross
        
        # Global average pooling
        v_pooled = v_fused.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 1024]
        t_pooled = t_fused.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 768]
        
        # Gated fusion
        combined = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)
        gate_v_val = self.gate_v(combined)
        gate_t_val = self.gate_t(combined)
        
        v_gated = v_pooled * gate_v_val
        t_gated = t_pooled * gate_t_val
        
        # Project to common space
        v_common = self.visual_proj(v_gated)
        t_common = self.text_proj(t_gated)
        
        # Concatenate and fuse
        fused = torch.cat([v_common, t_common], dim=-1)
        
        # Final prediction
        output = self.fusion(fused)
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 384
        
        # Visual processing: reduce spatial dimension then project
        self.visual_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(64)  # [B, 1024, 64]
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(1024, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        
        # Text processing: pool and project
        self.text_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(32)  # [B, 768, 32]
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(768, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention for fusion
        self.cross_attn_visual = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        self.cross_attn_text = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Self-attention on fused features
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Classification head with residual connections
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 128),
            nn.LayerNorm(128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
        # Initialize weights
        self._init_weights()
    
    def _init_weights(self):
        for m in self.modules():
            if isinstance(m, nn.Linear):
                nn.init.xavier_uniform_(m.weight)
                if m.bias is not None:
                    nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
            elif isinstance(m, nn.LayerNorm):
                nn.init.ones_(m.weight)
                nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 64, hidden_dim]
        # Transpose for pooling: [B, 1024, 256]
        visual_t = visual.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 1024, 256]
        visual_pooled = self.visual_pool(visual_t)  # [B, 1024, 64]
        visual_pooled = visual_pooled.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 64, 1024]
        visual_feat = self.visual_proj(visual_pooled)  # [B, 64, hidden_dim]
        
        # Process text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 32, hidden_dim]
        text_t = text.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 768, 77]
        text_pooled = self.text_pool(text_t)  # [B, 768, 32]
        text_pooled = text_pooled.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 32, 768]
        text_feat = self.text_proj(text_pooled)  # [B, 32, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        visual_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_visual(
            visual_feat, text_feat, text_feat
        )  # [B, 64, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        text_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_text(
            text_feat, visual_feat, visual_feat
        )  # [B, 32, hidden_dim]
        
        # Global average pooling
        visual_global = visual_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        text_global = text_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Concatenate and fuse
        fused = torch.cat([visual_global, text_global], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim*2]
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, fused_dim]
        
        # Final classification
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 384
        
        # Visual processing with attention pooling
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        self.visual_attn = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 64),
            nn.Tanh(),
            nn.Linear(64, 1)
        )
        
        # Text processing with attention pooling  
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        self.text_attn = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 64),
            nn.Tanh(),
            nn.Linear(64, 1)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        self.cross_q = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.fused_dim)
        self.cross_k = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.fused_dim)
        self.cross_v = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.fused_dim)
        self.cross_scale = self.fused_dim ** -0.5
        
        # Gated fusion
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Deep fusion network
        self.fusion_net = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim + self.fused_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 2, 128)
        )
        
        # Multi-scale residual connections
        self.res_proj1 = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim + self.fused_dim, 128)
        
        # Final classifier with residual ensemble
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(128, 64),
            nn.LayerNorm(64),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.05),
            nn.Linear(64, 4)
        )
        
        self._init_weights()
    
    def _init_weights(self):
        for m in self.modules():
            if isinstance(m, nn.Linear):
                nn.init.xavier_uniform_(m.weight)
                if m.bias is not None:
                    nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
            elif isinstance(m, nn.LayerNorm):
                nn.init.ones_(m.weight)
                nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual features [B, 256, 1024]
        v_proj = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_attn = self.visual_attn(v_proj).squeeze(-1)  # [B, 256]
        v_attn = F.softmax(v_attn, dim=1)
        v_pooled = torch.bmm(v_attn.unsqueeze(1), v_proj).squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Process text features [B, 77, 768]
        t_proj = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_attn = self.text_attn(t_proj).squeeze(-1)  # [B, 77]
        t_attn = F.softmax(t_attn, dim=1)
        t_pooled = torch.bmm(t_attn.unsqueeze(1), t_proj).squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        Q = self.cross_q(v_pooled).unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, fused_dim]
        K = self.cross_k(t_pooled).unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, fused_dim]
        V = self.cross_v(t_pooled).unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, fused_dim]
        
        cross_attn = torch.bmm(Q, K.transpose(1, 2)) * self.cross_scale  # [B, 1, 1]
        cross_attn = F.softmax(cross_attn, dim=-1)
        cross_feat = torch.bmm(cross_attn, V).squeeze(1)  # [B, fused_dim]
        
        # Gated fusion of pooled features
        concat_feats = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim*2]
        gate = self.gate(concat_feats)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        gated_fusion = gate * v_pooled + (1 - gate) * t_pooled  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Combine all features
        combined = torch.cat([gated_fusion, cross_feat], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim+fused_dim]
        
        # Deep processing with residual
        deep_out = self.fusion_net(combined)  # [B, 128]
        res_out = self.res_proj1(combined)  # [B, 128]
        fused_out = deep_out + 0.3 * res_out  # Residual connection
        
        # Final classification
        output = self.classifier(fused_out)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 384
        
        # Visual processing: reduce spatial tokens with attention pooling
        self.visual_query = nn.Parameter(torch.randn(1, 64, self.hidden_dim))
        self.visual_key_proj = nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.visual_value_proj = nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.visual_norm = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Text processing: preserve sequence with lightweight attention
        self.text_query = nn.Parameter(torch.randn(1, 32, self.hidden_dim))
        self.text_key_proj = nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.text_value_proj = nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.text_norm = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal fusion with gating
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Gated fusion
        self.gate_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Feature refinement
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        
        # Classification head with residual connections
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 256),
            nn.LayerNorm(256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(256, 128),
            nn.LayerNorm(128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
        # Initialize weights
        self._init_weights()
    
    def _init_weights(self):
        for m in self.modules():
            if isinstance(m, nn.Linear):
                nn.init.xavier_uniform_(m.weight)
                if m.bias is not None:
                    nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
            elif isinstance(m, nn.LayerNorm):
                nn.init.ones_(m.weight)
                nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual features: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 64, hidden_dim]
        visual_k = self.visual_key_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        visual_v = self.visual_value_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        visual_q = self.visual_query.expand(B, -1, -1)  # [B, 64, hidden_dim]
        
        # Scaled dot-product attention for visual
        visual_scores = torch.bmm(visual_q, visual_k.transpose(1, 2)) / (self.hidden_dim ** 0.5)
        visual_attn = F.softmax(visual_scores, dim=-1)
        visual_feat = torch.bmm(visual_attn, visual_v)  # [B, 64, hidden_dim]
        visual_feat = self.visual_norm(visual_feat)
        
        # Process text features: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 32, hidden_dim]
        text_k = self.text_key_proj(text)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        text_v = self.text_value_proj(text)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        text_q = self.text_query.expand(B, -1, -1)  # [B, 32, hidden_dim]
        
        text_scores = torch.bmm(text_q, text_k.transpose(1, 2)) / (self.hidden_dim ** 0.5)
        text_attn = F.softmax(text_scores, dim=-1)
        text_feat = torch.bmm(text_attn, text_v)  # [B, 32, hidden_dim]
        text_feat = self.text_norm(text_feat)
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        v2t_out, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(text_feat, visual_feat, visual_feat)  # [B, 32, hidden_dim]
        t2v_out, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(visual_feat, text_feat, text_feat)  # [B, 64, hidden_dim]
        
        # Pool and combine
        v2t_pooled = v2t_out.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        t2v_pooled = t2v_out.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Gated fusion
        combined = torch.cat([v2t_pooled, t2v_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim*2]
        gate = self.gate_proj(combined)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        fused = gate * v2t_pooled + (1 - gate) * t2v_pooled  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Refine features
        refined = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, fused_dim]
        
        # Classify
        output = self.classifier(refined)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.common_dim = 512
        
        # Visual projection with spatial pooling
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Text projection
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Cross-attention for multimodal fusion
        self.cross_attn_visual = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.common_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.cross_attn_text = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.common_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Self-attention for refined fusion
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.common_dim * 2, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Gated fusion
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim * 2),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Deep fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, 1024),
            nn.LayerNorm(1024),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(1024, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.LayerNorm(256),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Output head
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(256, 128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
        # Layer norms
        self.norm_v = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim)
        self.norm_t = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim)
        self.norm_fused = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim * 2)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project visual features: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, 512]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)
        
        # Project text features: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, 512]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Cross-attention: visual attends to text
        v_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_visual(v_feat, t_feat, t_feat)
        v_cross = self.norm_v(v_feat + v_cross)
        
        # Cross-attention: text attends to visual
        t_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_text(t_feat, v_feat, v_feat)
        t_cross = self.norm_t(t_feat + t_cross)
        
        # Global average pooling
        v_pooled = v_cross.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        t_pooled = t_cross.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Concatenate
        fused = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Gated modulation
        gate = self.gate(fused)
        fused = fused * gate
        
        # Expand for self-attention on sequence of multimodal tokens
        # Create multiple views through different projections
        fused_expanded = fused.unsqueeze(1).repeat(1, 4, 1)  # [B, 4, 1024]
        
        # Self-attention across views
        fused_attended, _ = self.self_attn(fused_expanded, fused_expanded, fused_expanded)
        fused_attended = self.norm_fused(fused_expanded + fused_attended)
        
        # Pool and process
        fused_final = fused_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Deep fusion processing
        hidden = self.fusion_mlp(fused_final)
        
        # Residual connection from early fusion
        residual = F.adaptive_avg_pool1d(fused.unsqueeze(1), 256).squeeze(1)
        hidden = hidden + 0.3 * residual[:, :256]
        
        # Output
        output = self.output_head(hidden)
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 384
        
        # Visual processing: reduce spatial dim then project
        self.visual_spatial_proj = nn.Linear(256, 128)  # Reduce 256 tokens to 128
        self.visual_feat_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Text processing: reduce sequence length then project
        self.text_spatial_proj = nn.Linear(77, 64)  # Reduce 77 tokens to 64
        self.text_feat_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Attention pooling for visual
        self.visual_attn_pool = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 128),
            nn.Tanh(),
            nn.Linear(128, 1)
        )
        
        # Attention pooling for text
        self.text_attn_pool = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 64),
            nn.Tanh(),
            nn.Linear(64, 1)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal fusion
        self.cross_transform = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15)
        )
        
        # Gated fusion
        self.gate_net = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Deep fusion network
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.05)
        )
        
        # Output head
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim // 2, 128),
            nn.LayerNorm(128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
        self._init_weights()
    
    def _init_weights(self):
        for m in self.modules():
            if isinstance(m, nn.Linear):
                nn.init.xavier_uniform_(m.weight)
                if m.bias is not None:
                    nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
            elif isinstance(m, nn.LayerNorm):
                nn.init.ones_(m.weight)
                nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> transpose -> [B, 1024, 256] -> project -> [B, 1024, 128]
        v_temp = visual.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 1024, 256]
        v_reduced = self.visual_spatial_proj(v_temp)  # [B, 1024, 128]
        v_reduced = v_reduced.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 128, 1024]
        
        # Project features: [B, 128, 1024] -> [B, 128, hidden_dim]
        v_feat = self.visual_feat_proj(v_reduced)  # [B, 128, 512]
        
        # Attention pooling on reduced visual
        v_attn = self.visual_attn_pool(v_feat).squeeze(-1)  # [B, 128]
        v_attn = F.softmax(v_attn, dim=1)
        v_pooled = torch.bmm(v_attn.unsqueeze(1), v_feat).squeeze(1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Text: [B, 77, 768] -> transpose -> [B, 768, 77] -> project -> [B, 768, 64]
        t_temp = text.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 768, 77]
        t_reduced = self.text_spatial_proj(t_temp)  # [B, 768, 64]
        t_reduced = t_reduced.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 64, 768]
        
        # Project features: [B, 64, 768] -> [B, 64, hidden_dim]
        t_feat = self.text_feat_proj(t_reduced)  # [B, 64, 512]
        
        # Attention pooling on reduced text
        t_attn = self.text_attn_pool(t_feat).squeeze(-1)  # [B, 64]
        t_attn = F.softmax(t_attn, dim=1)
        t_pooled = torch.bmm(t_attn.unsqueeze(1), t_feat).squeeze(1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Concatenate pooled features
        combined = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Cross-modal transform
        fused = self.cross_transform(combined)  # [B, 384]
        
        # Gating
        gate = self.gate_net(fused)  # [B, 384]
        gated_fused = gate * fused + (1 - gate) * fused  # [B, 384]
        
        # Deep fusion
        features = self.fusion_mlp(gated_fused)  # [B, 192]
        
        # Output
        output = self.output_head(features)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 384
        
        # Visual processing with pooling attention
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Text processing
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention for visual->text and text->visual
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Self-attention for refinement
        self.self_attn_fused = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim * 2, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Fusion MLPs
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 4, self.fused_dim * 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        
        # Output head with residual connections
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 128),
            nn.LayerNorm(128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
        # Learnable temperature for attention scaling
        self.temperature = nn.Parameter(torch.ones(1) * 0.07)
        
        # Layer norms for stability
        self.norm_v = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.norm_t = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.norm_fused = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim * 2)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Project inputs
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)       # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        v_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(
            query=self.norm_v(v_feat),
            key=t_feat,
            value=t_feat
        )  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        t_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(
            query=self.norm_t(t_feat),
            key=v_feat,
            value=v_feat
        )  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        
        # Pool with attention weights
        v_pooled = v_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        t_pooled = t_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Max pooling for salient features
        v_max = v_attended.max(dim=1)[0]   # [B, hidden_dim]
        t_max = t_attended.max(dim=1)[0]   # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Concatenate multiple representations
        fused = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled, v_max, t_max], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim*4]
        
        # Fusion MLP
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, fused_dim]
        
        # Final prediction
        output = self.output_head(fused)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
