            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Output head with residual connections
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 128),
            nn.LayerNorm(128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
        # Learnable temperature for attention scaling
        self.temperature = nn.Parameter(torch.ones(1) * 0.07)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project inputs
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)       # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        v_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(
            query=v_feat,
            key=t_feat,
            value=t_feat
        )  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        t_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(
            query=t_feat,
            key=v_feat,
            value=v_feat
        )  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        
        # Pool with attention weights
        v_pooled = v_enhanced.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        t_pooled = t_enhanced.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Concatenate for joint representation
        joint = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim*2]
        joint = joint.unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, hidden_dim*2]
        
        # Self-attention refinement
        joint_refined, _ = self.self_attn(joint, joint, joint)
        joint_refined = joint_refined.squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden_dim*2]
        
        # Combine all representations
        combined = torch.cat([
            v_pooled, 
            t_pooled, 
            joint_refined[:, :self.hidden_dim],
            joint_refined[:, self.hidden_dim:]
        ], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim*4]
        
        # Fusion and output
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(combined)
        output = self.output_head(fused)
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 384
        
        # Visual processing with efficient pooling
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Text processing
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention for fusion
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Self-attention for refined representation
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim * 2, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        
        # Output head with residual connections
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 128),
            nn.LayerNorm(128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
        # Initialize weights
        self._init_weights()
    
    def _init_weights(self):
        for m in self.modules():
            if isinstance(m, nn.Linear):
                nn.init.xavier_uniform_(m.weight)
                if m.bias is not None:
                    nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
            elif isinstance(m, nn.LayerNorm):
                nn.init.ones_(m.weight)
                nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project visual features: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)
        
        # Project text features: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        v_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(v_feat, t_feat, t_feat)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        t_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(t_feat, v_feat, v_feat)
        
        # Pool both modalities
        v_pooled = v_enhanced.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        t_pooled = t_enhanced.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Concatenate and add residual from original pooled features
        v_residual = v_feat.mean(dim=1)
        t_residual = t_feat.mean(dim=1)
        
        fused = torch.cat([v_pooled + 0.3 * v_residual, t_pooled + 0.3 * t_residual], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim*2]
        
        # Fusion MLP
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused)
        
        # Output
        output = self.output_head(fused)
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 384
        
        # Visual processing with pooling attention
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        self.visual_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.visual_pool = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
        )
        
        # Text processing with pooling attention
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        self.text_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.text_pool = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal fusion with gating
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.fused_dim, num_heads=6, batch_first=True)
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.fused_dim, num_heads=6, batch_first=True)
        
        # Gated fusion
        self.gate_v = nn.Sequential(nn.Linear(self.fused_dim * 2, self.fused_dim), nn.Sigmoid())
        self.gate_t = nn.Sequential(nn.Linear(self.fused_dim * 2, self.fused_dim), nn.Sigmoid())
        
        # Deep fusion network
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim // 2, 128),
            nn.LayerNorm(128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
        # Learnable temperature for attention scaling
        self.temp = nn.Parameter(torch.ones(1) * 0.07)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual features [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v = self.visual_proj(visual)
        v_attn, _ = self.visual_attn(v, v, v, need_weights=False)
        v = v + v_attn  # Residual
        v_pooled = v.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        v_feat = self.visual_pool(v_pooled)  # [B, fused_dim]
        
        # Process text features [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t = self.text_proj(text)
        t_attn, _ = self.text_attn(t, t, t, need_weights=False)
        t = t + t_attn  # Residual
        t_pooled = t.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        t_feat = self.text_pool(t_pooled)  # [B, fused_dim]
        
        # Expand for cross-attention [B, 1, fused_dim]
        v_seq = v_feat.unsqueeze(1)
        t_seq = t_feat.unsqueeze(1)
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        v_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(v_seq, t_seq, t_seq, need_weights=False)
        t_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(t_seq, v_seq, v_seq, need_weights=False)
        
        v_cross = v_cross.squeeze(1)
        t_cross = t_cross.squeeze(1)
        
        # Gated fusion
        gate_v = self.gate_v(torch.cat([v_feat, v_cross], dim=-1))
        gate_t = self.gate_t(torch.cat([t_feat, t_cross], dim=-1))
        
        v_fused = gate_v * v_feat + (1 - gate_v) * v_cross
        t_fused = gate_t * t_feat + (1 - gate_t) * t_cross
        
        # Combine modalities
        fused = torch.cat([v_fused, t_fused], dim=-1)
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused)
        
        # Classification
        output = self.classifier(fused)
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.common_dim = 512
        
        # Visual projection with spatial pooling preparation
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Text projection
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Cross-attention for visual attending to text
        self.cross_attn_visual = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            dropout=0.1,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Cross-attention for text attending to visual
        self.cross_attn_text = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            dropout=0.1,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Self-attention for fused representation
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim * 2,
            num_heads=8,
            dropout=0.1,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Feed-forward after attention
        self.ffn = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim * 4),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 4, self.common_dim * 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim * 2)
        )
        
        # Gated fusion
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim * 2),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Final classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(512, 128),
            nn.LayerNorm(128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
        # Learnable temperature for attention scaling
        self.temperature = nn.Parameter(torch.ones(1))
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        """
        visual: [B, 256, 1024]
        text: [B, 77, 768]
        """
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project modalities
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)       # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual queries attend to text keys/values
        v_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_visual(
            query=v_feat,
            key=t_feat,
            value=t_feat,
            need_weights=False
        )  # [B, 256, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries attend to visual keys/values
        t_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_text(
            query=t_feat,
            key=v_feat,
            value=v_feat,
            need_weights=False
        )  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Pool cross-attended features
        v_pooled = v_cross.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        t_pooled = t_cross.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Concatenate pooled features
        fused = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        fused = fused.unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, 1024] for self-attention
        
        # Self-attention on fused representation
        fused_attn, _ = self.self_attn(fused, fused, fused, need_weights=False)
        fused = fused + fused_attn  # Residual
        fused = fused.squeeze(1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Feed-forward with residual
        ffn_out = self.ffn(fused)
        fused = fused + ffn_out
        
        # Gated fusion refinement
        gate = self.gate(fused)
        fused = gate * fused + (1 - gate) * torch.tanh(fused)
        
        # Final classification
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 384
        
        # Visual processing with pooling attention
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Text processing
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention for visual (query from visual, key/value from text)
        self.cross_attn_visual = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Cross-modal attention for text (query from text, key/value from visual)
        self.cross_attn_text = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Self-attention for refined fusion
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim * 2, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 128),
            nn.LayerNorm(128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
        # Learnable temperature for attention scaling
        self.temp_visual = nn.Parameter(torch.ones(1))
        self.temp_text = nn.Parameter(torch.ones(1))
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project inputs
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)      # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-attention: visual attends to text
        v_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn_visual(
            v_feat, t_feat, t_feat,
            need_weights=False
        )
        v_enhanced = v_enhanced + v_feat  # Residual
        
        # Cross-attention: text attends to visual
        t_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn_text(
            t_feat, v_feat, v_feat,
            need_weights=False
        )
        t_enhanced = t_enhanced + t_feat  # Residual
        
        # Global pooling with attention weights
        v_pooled = v_enhanced.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        t_pooled = t_enhanced.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Concatenate and refine
        fused = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim*2]
        fused = fused.unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, hidden_dim*2]
        
        # Self-attention for final refinement
        fused_refined, _ = self.self_attn(fused, fused, fused, need_weights=False)
        fused_refined = fused_refined.squeeze(1) + fused.squeeze(1)
        
        # Final fusion and classification
        output = self.fusion_mlp(fused_refined)
        output = self.classifier(output)
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        
        # Visual: global average pooling then projection
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Text: global average pooling then projection  
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Fusion layers
        self.fusion = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15)
        )
        
        # Classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 2, 4)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # visual: [B, 256, 1024], text: [B, 77, 768]
        
        # Mean pooling over sequence dimension
        visual_pooled = visual.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 1024]
        text_pooled = text.mean(dim=1)      # [B, 768]
        
        # Project to common space
        visual_feat = self.visual_proj(visual_pooled)  # [B, 512]
        text_feat = self.text_proj(text_pooled)        # [B, 512]
        
        # Concatenate and fuse
        combined = torch.cat([visual_feat, text_feat], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        fused = self.fusion(combined)  # [B, 256]
        
        # Output
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 384
        
        # Cross-modal attention for visual -> text
        self.vis_to_text_query = nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.vis_to_text_key = nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.vis_to_text_value = nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal attention for text -> visual
        self.text_to_vis_query = nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.text_to_vis_key = nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.text_to_vis_value = nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Self-attention for refined fusion
        self.fusion_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim * 2, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Gating mechanism
        self.gate_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Feature projection
        self.vis_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim)
        )
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim)
        )
        
        # Final classifier with residual connections
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 256),
            nn.LayerNorm(256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(256, 128),
            nn.LayerNorm(128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
        # Initialize weights
        self._init_weights()
    
    def _init_weights(self):
        for m in self.modules():
            if isinstance(m, nn.Linear):
                nn.init.xavier_uniform_(m.weight)
                if m.bias is not None:
                    nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
            elif isinstance(m, nn.LayerNorm):
                nn.init.ones_(m.weight)
                nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Pool visual features spatially using attention
        vis_global = visual.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Pool text features (CLS token or mean)
        text_global = text.mean(dim=1)   # [B, 768]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: Visual attending to Text
        v2t_q = self.vis_to_text_query(vis_global).unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, hidden]
        v2t_k = self.vis_to_text_key(text)                       # [B, 77, hidden]
        v2t_v = self.vis_to_text_value(text)                     # [B, 77, hidden]
        
        v2t_scores = torch.bmm(v2t_q, v2t_k.transpose(1, 2)) / (self.hidden_dim ** 0.5)
        v2t_attn = F.softmax(v2t_scores, dim=-1)
        v2t_out = torch.bmm(v2t_attn, v2t_v).squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: Text attending to Visual
        t2v_q = self.text_to_vis_query(text_global).unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, hidden]
        t2v_k = self.text_to_vis_key(visual)                      # [B, 256, hidden]
        t2v_v = self.text_to_vis_value(visual)                    # [B, 256, hidden]
        
        t2v_scores = torch.bmm(t2v_q, t2v_k.transpose(1, 2)) / (self.hidden_dim ** 0.5)
        t2v_attn = F.softmax(t2v_scores, dim=-1)
        t2v_out = torch.bmm(t2v_attn, t2v_v).squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden]
        
        # Concatenate cross-modal features
        cross_fused = torch.cat([v2t_out, t2v_out], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden*2]
        
        # Self-attention refinement
        cross_fused_seq = cross_fused.unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, hidden*2]
        attn_out, _ = self.fusion_attn(cross_fused_seq, cross_fused_seq, cross_fused_seq)
        attn_out = attn_out.squeeze(1) + cross_fused  # Residual
        
        # Gated fusion
        gate = self.gate_proj(attn_out)
        
        # Project and fuse
        vis_feat = self.vis_proj(v2t_out)
        text_feat = self.text_proj(t2v_out)
        
        # Gated combination
        fused = gate * vis_feat + (1 - gate) * text_feat
        
        # Add residual from cross-attention
        fused_residual = self.vis_proj(attn_out[:, :self.hidden_dim]) + self.text_proj(attn_out[:, self.hidden_dim:])
        fused = fused + 0.3 * fused_residual
        
        # Final classification
        output = self.classifier(fused)
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 768
        
        # Visual processing with attention pooling
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        self.visual_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.visual_pool = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 1),
        )
        
        # Text processing with attention pooling
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        self.text_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.text_pool = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 1),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention for fusion
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Fusion layers
        self.fusion_norm_v = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.fusion_norm_t = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Gated fusion
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Final projection layers
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Output head
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 4)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual features [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        v_attended, _ = self.visual_attn(v_feat, v_feat, v_feat)  # Self-attention
        v_feat = v_feat + v_attended  # Residual
        
        # Attention-based pooling for visual
        v_weights = F.softmax(self.visual_pool(v_feat).squeeze(-1), dim=1)  # [B, 256]
        v_pooled = torch.bmm(v_weights.unsqueeze(1), v_feat).squeeze(1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Process text features [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, 512]
        t_attended, _ = self.text_attn(t_feat, t_feat, t_feat)  # Self-attention
        t_feat = t_feat + t_attended  # Residual
        
        # Attention-based pooling for text
        t_weights = F.softmax(self.text_pool(t_feat).squeeze(-1), dim=1)  # [B, 77]
        t_pooled = torch.bmm(t_weights.unsqueeze(1), t_feat).squeeze(1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Expand for cross-attention
        v_expanded = v_pooled.unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, 512]
        t_expanded = t_pooled.unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention (bidirectional)
        v_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(v_expanded, t_expanded, t_expanded)
        t_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(t_expanded, v_expanded, v_expanded)
        
        v_fused = self.fusion_norm_v(v_pooled + v_cross.squeeze(1))
        t_fused = self.fusion_norm_t(t_pooled + t_cross.squeeze(1))
        
        # Gated fusion
        gate_input = torch.cat([v_fused, t_fused], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        g = self.gate(gate_input)  # [B, 512]
        fused = g * v_fused + (1 - g) * t_fused  # [B, 512]
        
        # Final MLP and classification
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, 768]
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.vis_dim = 1024
        self.txt_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 384
        
        # Visual processing with pooling attention
        self.vis_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.vis_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        self.vis_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.vis_pool = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
        )
        
        # Text processing with pooling attention
        self.txt_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.txt_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        self.txt_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.txt_pool = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal fusion with gating
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.fused_dim, num_heads=6, batch_first=True)
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.fused_dim, num_heads=6, batch_first=True)
        
        # Gated fusion
        self.gate_vis = nn.Sequential(nn.Linear(self.fused_dim * 2, self.fused_dim), nn.Sigmoid())
        self.gate_txt = nn.Sequential(nn.Linear(self.fused_dim * 2, self.fused_dim), nn.Sigmoid())
        
        # Deep fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        
        # Output head with residual connections
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim // 2, 128),
            nn.LayerNorm(128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
        self._init_weights()
    
    def _init_weights(self):
        for m in self.modules():
            if isinstance(m, nn.Linear):
                nn.init.xavier_uniform_(m.weight)
                if m.bias is not None:
                    nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
            elif isinstance(m, nn.LayerNorm):
                nn.init.ones_(m.weight)
                nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual features [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, fused_dim]
        v = self.vis_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_attended, _ = self.vis_attn(v, v, v)  # Self-attention
        v_pooled = v_attended.mean(dim=1)  # Global average pooling
        v_feat = self.vis_pool(v_pooled)  # [B, fused_dim]
        
        # Process text features [B, 77, 768] -> [B, fused_dim]
        t = self.txt_proj(text)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_attended, _ = self.txt_attn(t, t, t)  # Self-attention
        t_pooled = t_attended.mean(dim=1)  # Global average pooling
        t_feat = self.txt_pool(t_pooled)  # [B, fused_dim]
        
        # Expand for cross-attention [B, 1, fused_dim]
        v_exp = v_feat.unsqueeze(1)
        t_exp = t_feat.unsqueeze(1)
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        v_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(v_exp, t_exp, t_exp)  # Visual attends to text
        t_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(t_exp, v_exp, v_exp)  # Text attends to visual
        
        v_cross = v_cross.squeeze(1)
        t_cross = t_cross.squeeze(1)
        
        # Gated fusion
        gate_v = self.gate_vis(torch.cat([v_feat, v_cross], dim=-1))
        gate_t = self.gate_txt(torch.cat([t_feat, t_cross], dim=-1))
        
        v_fused = gate_v * v_feat + (1 - gate_v) * v_cross
        t_fused = gate_t * t_feat + (1 - gate_t) * t_cross
        
        # Concatenate and fuse
        fused = torch.cat([v_fused, t_fused], dim=-1)
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused)
        
        # Output
        output = self.output_head(fused)
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 384
        
        # Visual processing with attention pooling
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        self.visual_attn = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 64),
            nn.Tanh(),
            nn.Linear(64, 1)
        )
        
        # Text processing with attention pooling
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        self.text_attn = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 64),
            nn.Tanh(),
            nn.Linear(64, 1)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        self.cross_q = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.fused_dim)
        self.cross_k = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.fused_dim)
        self.cross_v = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.fused_dim)
        self.cross_scale = self.fused_dim ** -0.5
        
        # Gated fusion
        self.gate_visual = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.fused_dim)
        self.gate_text = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.fused_dim)
        self.gate_bias = nn.Parameter(torch.zeros(self.fused_dim))
        
        # Deep fusion network
        self.fusion_net = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        
        # Output head
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim // 2 + self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim // 4),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim // 4),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.05),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim // 4, 4)
        )
        
        self._init_weights()
    
    def _init_weights(self):
        for m in self.modules():
            if isinstance(m, nn.Linear):
                nn.init.xavier_uniform_(m.weight)
                if m.bias is not None:
                    nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
            elif isinstance(m, nn.LayerNorm):
                nn.init.ones_(m.weight)
                nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual features [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, hidden_dim]
        v_proj = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_attn = self.visual_attn(v_proj).squeeze(-1)  # [B, 256]
        v_attn = F.softmax(v_attn, dim=1)
        v_pooled = torch.bmm(v_attn.unsqueeze(1), v_proj).squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Process text features [B, 77, 768] -> [B, hidden_dim]
        t_proj = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_attn = self.text_attn(t_proj).squeeze(-1)  # [B, 77]
        t_attn = F.softmax(t_attn, dim=1)
        t_pooled = torch.bmm(t_attn.unsqueeze(1), t_proj).squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        q = self.cross_q(v_pooled).unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, fused_dim]
        k = self.cross_k(t_pooled).unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, fused_dim]
        v = self.cross_v(t_pooled).unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, fused_dim]
        
        cross_attn = torch.bmm(q, k.transpose(1, 2)) * self.cross_scale  # [B, 1, 1]
        cross_attn = F.softmax(cross_attn, dim=-1)
        cross_feat = torch.bmm(cross_attn, v).squeeze(1)  # [B, fused_dim]
        
        # Gated fusion
        gate_v = torch.sigmoid(self.gate_visual(v_pooled))
        gate_t = torch.sigmoid(self.gate_text(t_pooled))
        gate = torch.sigmoid(gate_v + gate_t + self.gate_bias)
        
        v_gated = gate * self.cross_q(v_pooled)
        t_gated = (1 - gate) * self.cross_k(t_pooled)
        gated_fusion = v_gated + t_gated  # [B, fused_dim]
        
        # Combine features
        combined = torch.cat([gated_fusion, cross_feat], dim=-1)  # [B, fused_dim*2]
        fused_deep = self.fusion_net(combined)  # [B, fused_dim//2]
        
        # Skip connection and final classification
        skip_cat = torch.cat([fused_deep, gated_fusion], dim=-1)  # [B, fused_dim//2 + fused_dim]
        output = self.classifier(skip_cat)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        
        # Visual processing: reduce sequence length then project
        self.visual_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(64)  # [B, 1024, 64]
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(1024, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Text processing
        self.text_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(64)  # [B, 768, 64]
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(768, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention for fusion
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Self-attention for refined fusion
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim * 2, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 2, 128),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
        # Layer norms for stability
        self.norm_v = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.norm_t = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.norm_fused = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim * 2)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 64, 1024] -> [B, 64, hidden_dim]
        v = visual.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 1024, 256]
        v = self.visual_pool(v)     # [B, 1024, 64]
        v = v.transpose(1, 2)       # [B, 64, 1024]
        v = self.visual_proj(v)     # [B, 64, hidden_dim]
        
        # Process text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 64, 768] -> [B, 64, hidden_dim]
        t = text.transpose(1, 2)    # [B, 768, 77]
        t = self.text_pool(t)       # [B, 768, 64]
        t = t.transpose(1, 2)       # [B, 64, 768]
        t = self.text_proj(t)       # [B, 64, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        v_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(v, t, t)  # V attends to T
        t_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(t, v, v)  # T attends to V
        
        # Residual connections and normalization
        v_fused = self.norm_v(v + v_attended)
        t_fused = self.norm_t(t + t_attended)
        
        # Concatenate and self-attention
        fused = torch.cat([v_fused, t_fused], dim=-1)  # [B, 64, hidden_dim*2]
        fused = self.norm_fused(fused)
        
        # Global average pooling
        fused_pooled = fused.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim*2]
        
        # Final fusion and classification
        features = self.fusion_mlp(fused_pooled)
        output = self.classifier(features)
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        
        # Visual processing: reduce sequence length then project
        self.visual_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(64)  # [B, 1024, 64]
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Text processing
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention for fusion
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Self-attention for refined fusion
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim * 2, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Output head with residual connections
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 2, 128),
            nn.LayerNorm(128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
        # Initialize weights
        self._init_weights()
    
    def _init_weights(self):
        for m in self.modules():
            if isinstance(m, nn.Linear):
                nn.init.xavier_uniform_(m.weight)
                if m.bias is not None:
                    nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
            elif isinstance(m, nn.LayerNorm):
                nn.init.ones_(m.weight)
                nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 64, hidden_dim]
        v = visual.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 1024, 256]
        v = self.visual_pool(v)  # [B, 1024, 64]
        v = v.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 64, 1024]
        v = self.visual_proj(v)  # [B, 64, hidden_dim]
        
        # Process text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        v_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(v, t, t)  # [B, 64, hidden_dim]
        t_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(t, v, v)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        
        # Pool attended features
        v_pooled = v_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        t_pooled = t_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Concatenate and fuse
        fused = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim*2]
        
        # Self-attention on expanded sequence for richer interaction
        fused_seq = fused.unsqueeze(1).expand(-1, 4, -1)  # [B, 4, hidden_dim*2]
        fused_seq, _ = self.self_attn(fused_seq, fused_seq, fused_seq)
        fused_refined = fused_seq.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim*2]
        
        # Add residual from direct fusion
        fused_final = fused + fused_refined
        
        # MLP fusion
        features = self.fusion_mlp(fused_final)  # [B, hidden_dim//2]
        
        # Output
        output = self.output_head(features)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 384
        
        # Visual processing with attention pooling
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        self.visual_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.visual_pool = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Text processing with attention pooling
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        self.text_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.text_pool = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal fusion with gating
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim // 2, num_heads=4, batch_first=True)
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim // 2, num_heads=4, batch_first=True)
        
        # Gated fusion
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.fused_dim * 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim // 2, 4)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual features [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        v_attn, _ = self.visual_attn(v, v, v)  # Self-attention
        v = v + v_attn  # Residual
        v_pooled = v.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        v_feat = self.visual_pool(v_pooled)  # [B, 256]
        
        # Process text features [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, 512]
        t_attn, _ = self.text_attn(t, t, t)  # Self-attention
        t = t + t_attn  # Residual
        t_pooled = t.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        t_feat = self.text_pool(t_pooled)  # [B, 256]
        
        # Expand for cross-attention [B, 1, 256]
        v_expanded = v_feat.unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, 256]
        t_expanded = t_feat.unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, 256]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        v_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(v_expanded, t_expanded, t_expanded)  # [B, 1, 256]
        t_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(t_expanded, v_expanded, v_expanded)  # [B, 1, 256]
        
        # Concatenate and fuse
        combined = torch.cat([v_feat, t_feat], dim=-1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Gated fusion
        gate = self.gate(combined)  # [B, 384]
        
        # Apply fusion MLP
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(combined)  # [B, 384]
        
        # Modulate with gate
        fused = fused * gate  # [B, 384]
        
        # Add residual from individual modalities
        residual = torch.cat([v_feat[:, :192], t_feat[:, :192]], dim=-1)  # [B, 384]
        fused = fused + 0.3 * residual
        
        # Final classification
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        
        # Visual pathway: reduce sequence length then project
        self.visual_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(64)  # [B, 1024, 64]
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Text pathway: pool and project
        self.text_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(32)  # [B, 768, 32]
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention for fusion
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Self-attention for refined fusion
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim * 2, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Fusion MLP with residual
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim)
        )
        
        # Final classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 2, 4)
        )
        
        # Learnable modality weights
        self.modality_gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, 2),
            nn.Softmax(dim=-1)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 64, 1024] -> [B, 64, hidden]
        v = visual.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 1024, 256]
        v = self.visual_pool(v)     # [B, 1024, 64]
        v = v.transpose(1, 2)       # [B, 64, 1024]
        v = self.visual_proj(v)     # [B, 64, hidden]
        
        # Process text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 32, 768] -> [B, 32, hidden]
        t = text.transpose(1, 2)    # [B, 768, 77]
        t = self.text_pool(t)       # [B, 768, 32]
        t = t.transpose(1, 2)       # [B, 32, 768]
        t = self.text_proj(t)       # [B, 32, hidden]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        v_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(v, t, t)  # [B, 64, hidden]
        t_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(t, v, v)  # [B, 32, hidden]
        
        # Pool attended features
        v_pooled = v_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden]
        t_pooled = t_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden]
        
        # Concatenate for fusion
        fused = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden*2]
        
        # Dynamic modality weighting
        gate = self.modality_gate(fused)  # [B, 2]
        
        # Apply gating
        v_weighted = v_pooled * gate[:, 0:1]
        t_weighted = t_pooled * gate[:, 1:2]
        gated_fusion = torch.cat([v_weighted, t_weighted], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden*2]
        
        # Residual fusion with MLP
        fused_out = self.fusion_mlp(gated_fusion) + (v_pooled + t_pooled)  # [B, hidden]
        
        # Final classification
        output = self.classifier(fused_out)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 384
        
        # Visual processing with pooling attention
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Visual self-attention for spatial aggregation
        self.visual_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            dropout=0.1,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Text processing
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Text self-attention for semantic aggregation
        self.text_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            dropout=0.1,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries visual
        self.cross_attn_tv = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            dropout=0.1,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual queries text
        self.cross_attn_vt = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            dropout=0.1,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP after cross-attention
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 4, self.fused_dim * 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        
        # Gated fusion for final representation
        self.gate_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Output classifier with residual connections
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 256),
            nn.LayerNorm(256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(256, 128),
            nn.LayerNorm(128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
        # Initialize weights
        self._init_weights()
    
    def _init_weights(self):
        for m in self.modules():
            if isinstance(m, nn.Linear):
                nn.init.xavier_uniform_(m.weight)
                if m.bias is not None:
                    nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
            elif isinstance(m, nn.LayerNorm):
                nn.init.ones_(m.weight)
                nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual features [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v = self.visual_proj(visual)
        v_attn, _ = self.visual_attn(v, v, v)  # Self-attention
        v = v + v_attn  # Residual
        v_pooled = v.mean(dim=1, keepdim=True)  # [B, 1, hidden_dim]
        v_max = v.max(dim=1, keepdim=True)[0]   # [B, 1, hidden_dim]
        
        # Process text features [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t = self.text_proj(text)
        t_attn, _ = self.text_attn(t, t, t)  # Self-attention
        t = t + t_attn  # Residual
        t_pooled = t.mean(dim=1, keepdim=True)  # [B, 1, hidden_dim]
        t_max = t.max(dim=1, keepdim=True)[0]   # [B, 1, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        # Text attends to visual
        t_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_tv(t_pooled, v, v)  # [B, 1, hidden_dim]
        # Visual attends to text  
        v_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_vt(v_pooled, t, t)  # [B, 1, hidden_dim]
        
        # Concatenate all representations
        fused = torch.cat([
            v_pooled.squeeze(1),      # [B, hidden_dim]
            t_pooled.squeeze(1),      # [B, hidden_dim]
            v_cross.squeeze(1),       # [B, hidden_dim]
            t_cross.squeeze(1)        # [B, hidden_dim]
        ], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim * 4]
        
        # Fusion MLP
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, fused_dim]
        
        # Gated refinement
        gate = self.gate_proj(fused)
        fused = fused * gate + fused * (1 - gate) * 0.5  # Soft gating
        
        # Final classification
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 384
        
        # Visual processing with efficient pooling
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Text processing
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention for fusion
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Self-attention for refined representation
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Fusion layers
        self.fusion_norm1 = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim * 2)
        self.fusion_fc1 = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.fused_dim)
        self.fusion_norm2 = nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim)
        self.fusion_fc2 = nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim)
        
        # Output head with residual connections
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(256, 64),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Linear(64, 4)
        )
        
        # Initialize weights
        self._init_weights()
    
    def _init_weights(self):
        for m in self.modules():
            if isinstance(m, nn.Linear):
                nn.init.xavier_uniform_(m.weight)
                if m.bias is not None:
                    nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
            elif isinstance(m, nn.LayerNorm):
                nn.init.ones_(m.weight)
                nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)
        
        # Process text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        v_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(v_feat, t_feat, t_feat)
        v_enhanced = v_enhanced + v_feat  # Residual
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        t_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(t_feat, v_feat, v_feat)
        t_enhanced = t_enhanced + t_feat  # Residual
        
        # Global pooling with attention weights
        v_pooled = v_enhanced.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        t_pooled = t_enhanced.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Concatenate and fuse
        fused = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim*2]
        fused = self.fusion_norm1(fused)
        
        # MLP fusion with residual
        fused_out = self.fusion_fc1(fused)
        fused_out = F.gelu(fused_out)
        fused_out = self.fusion_norm2(fused_out)
        fused_out = self.fusion_fc2(fused_out)
        fused_out = F.gelu(fused_out)
        
        # Final output
        output = self.output_head(fused_out)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 384
        
        # Visual processing with pooling attention
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Text processing
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention for visual->text and text->visual
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Self-attention for refined fusion
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim * 2, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 4, self.fused_dim * 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 128),
            nn.LayerNorm(128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
        # Learnable temperature for attention scaling
        self.temperature = nn.Parameter(torch.ones(1) * 0.07)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project inputs
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)       # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        v_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(
            query=v_feat,
            key=t_feat,
            value=t_feat
        )  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual  
        t_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(
            query=t_feat,
            key=v_feat,
            value=v_feat
        )  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        
        # Pool with attention weights
        v_pooled = v_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        t_pooled = t_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Concatenate for joint representation
        joint = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim*2]
        joint = joint.unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, hidden_dim*2]
        
        # Self-attention refinement
        joint_refined, _ = self.self_attn(joint, joint, joint)
        joint_refined = joint_refined.squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden_dim*2]
        
        # Multi-scale fusion with residual connections
        fused_input = torch.cat([
            v_pooled, 
            t_pooled, 
            v_pooled * t_pooled,  # element-wise interaction
            torch.abs(v_pooled - t_pooled)  # difference feature
        ], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim*4]
        
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused_input)  # [B, fused_dim]
        
        # Final classification
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch.nn as nn

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):

        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.common_dim = 512

        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(

            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )

        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(

            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),

            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        
        # Cross-attention for multimodal fusion
        self.cross_attn_visual = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            dropout=0.1,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        self.cross_attn_text = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            dropout=0.1,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Self-attention for refined fusion
        self.fusion_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim * 2,
            num_heads=8,
            dropout=0.1,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Gated fusion
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 4, self.common_dim * 2),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim * 2),
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim, 128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
        # Initialize weights
        self._init_weights()
    
    def _init_weights(self):
        for m in self.modules():
            if isinstance(m, nn.Linear):
                nn.init.xavier_uniform_(m.weight)
                if m.bias is not None:
                    nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
            elif isinstance(m, nn.LayerNorm):
                nn.init.ones_(m.weight)
                nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        """
        Args:
            visual: [B, 256, 1024] - Visual features from CLIP-ViT-L-14
            text: [B, 77, 768] - Text features from CLIP-text-L
        Returns:
            [B, 4] - Classification logits
        """
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project to common dimension
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)      # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Cross-attention: visual attends to text
        v_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_visual(
            query=v_feat,
            key=t_feat,
            value=t_feat
        )  # [B, 256, 512]
        
        # Cross-attention: text attends to visual
        t_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_text(
            query=t_feat,
            key=v_feat,
            value=v_feat
        )  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Pool with attention weights
        v_pooled = v_cross.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        t_pooled = t_cross.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Concatenate for joint representation
        joint = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Gated fusion
        gate_input = torch.cat([
            v_pooled, t_pooled, 
            v_pooled * t_pooled,  # element-wise product
            torch.abs(v_pooled - t_pooled)  # difference
        ], dim=-1)  # [B, 2048]
        
        gate = self.gate(gate_input)  # [B, 1024]
        fused = gate * joint + (1 - gate) * joint  # refined gating
        
        # Final classification
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 384
        
        # Visual processing: reduce spatial tokens and project
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        self.visual_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(32)  # Reduce 256 -> 32 tokens
        
        # Text processing: project and pool
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        self.text_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(32)  # Reduce 77 -> 32 tokens
        
        # Cross-modal attention for fusion
        self.cross_attn_visual_to_text = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1
        )
        self.cross_attn_text_to_visual = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Self-attention on fused representation
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim * 2, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP with gating
        self.fusion_gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Final classifier with residual connections
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 128),
            nn.LayerNorm(128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
        # Skip connection projection
        self.skip_proj = nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 4)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Process visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 32, hidden_dim]
        v = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v = v.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, hidden_dim, 256]
        v = self.visual_pool(v)  # [B, hidden_dim, 32]
        v = v.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 32, hidden_dim]
        
        # Process text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 32, hidden_dim]
        t = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t = t.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, hidden_dim, 77]
        t = self.text_pool(t)  # [B, hidden_dim, 32]
        t = t.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 32, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        v_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_visual_to_text(v, t, t)  # V attends to T
        t_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_text_to_visual(t, v, v)  # T attends to V
        
        # Concatenate attended features
        fused = torch.cat([v_attended, t_attended], dim=-1)  # [B, 32, hidden_dim*2]
        
        # Self-attention on fused sequence
        fused, _ = self.self_attn(fused, fused, fused)
        
        # Global average pooling
        fused_pooled = fused.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim*2]
        
        # Gated fusion
        gate = self.fusion_gate(fused_pooled)
        fused_gated = gate * fused_pooled
        
        # Fusion MLP
        fused_out = self.fusion_mlp(fused_gated)  # [B, fused_dim]
        
        # Classifier with skip
        out = self.classifier(fused_out) + 0.1 * self.skip_proj(fused_out)
        
        return out

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        
        # Visual processing: reduce sequence length then project
        self.visual_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(64)  # [B, 1024, 64]
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Text processing
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention for fusion
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Self-attention for refined fusion
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim * 2, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Output head with residual connections
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 2, 128),
            nn.LayerNorm(128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
        # Layer norms for stability
        self.ln_v = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.ln_t = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.ln_fused = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim * 2)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 64, 1024] -> [B, 64, hidden]
        v = visual.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 1024, 256]
        v = self.visual_pool(v)     # [B, 1024, 64]
        v = v.transpose(1, 2)       # [B, 64, 1024]
        v = self.visual_proj(v)     # [B, 64, hidden]
        
        # Process text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden]
        t = self.text_proj(text)    # [B, 77, hidden]
        
        # Cross-modal attention both ways
        v_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(v, t, t)  # [B, 64, hidden]
        t_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(t, v, v)  # [B, 77, hidden]
        
        # Residual connections and layer norm
        v = self.ln_v(v + v_attended)
        t = self.ln_t(t + t_attended)
        
        # Global pooling
        v_pooled = v.mean(dim=1)    # [B, hidden]
        t_pooled = t.mean(dim=1)    # [B, hidden]
        
        # Concatenate modalities
        fused = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden*2]
        
        # Self-attention on concatenated features (reshape for attention)
        fused_seq = fused.unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, hidden*2]
        fused_attended, _ = self.self_attn(fused_seq, fused_seq, fused_seq)
        fused = self.ln_fused(fused + fused_attended.squeeze(1))
        
        # Fusion MLP
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, hidden//2]
        
        # Output
        out = self.output_head(fused)   # [B, 4]
        
        return out

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 384
        
        # Visual processing with pooling attention
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Text processing
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention for visual->text and text->visual
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Self-attention for refinement
        self.self_attn_fused = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim * 2, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 4, self.fused_dim * 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 128),
            nn.LayerNorm(128),
            nn.GELU(),
