            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
        # Learnable modality weights
        self.modality_gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, 2),
            nn.Softmax(dim=-1)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project inputs
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)       # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        v_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(v_feat, t_feat, t_feat)  # visual queries, text keys/values
        t_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(t_feat, v_feat, v_feat)  # text queries, visual keys/values
        
        # Global average pooling
        v_pooled = v_attended.mean(dim=1)   # [B, hidden_dim]
        t_pooled = t_attended.mean(dim=1)   # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Modality gating
        combined = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim*2]
        gate_weights = self.modality_gate(combined)  # [B, 2]
        
        # Weighted combination
        v_weighted = v_pooled * gate_weights[:, 0:1]
        t_weighted = t_pooled * gate_weights[:, 1:2]
        
        # Concatenate all representations
        fused_input = torch.cat([
            v_pooled, t_pooled,           # original pooled
            v_weighted, t_weighted,        # gated weighted
            v_pooled * t_pooled,           # element-wise interaction
            torch.abs(v_pooled - t_pooled) # difference
        ], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim*6] -> actually need to fix dims
        
        # Recompute: we want [B, hidden_dim*4] for fusion_mlp input
        # Let's use: [v_pooled, t_pooled, v_weighted, t_weighted, v*t, |v-t|] but project first
        interaction = torch.cat([
            v_pooled, 
            t_pooled,
            v_pooled * t_pooled,
            torch.abs(v_pooled - t_pooled)
        ], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim*4]
        
        # Fusion processing
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(interaction)  # [B, fused_dim]
        
        # Classify
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 384
        
        # Visual processing: reduce spatial tokens and project
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        self.visual_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(32)  # Reduce 256 -> 32 tokens
        
        # Text processing: project and pool
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        self.text_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(32)  # Reduce 77 -> 32 tokens
        
        # Cross-modal attention for fusion
        self.cross_attn_visual_to_text = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1
        )
        self.cross_attn_text_to_visual = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Self-attention on fused representation
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim * 2, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP with gating
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.fused_dim * 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for adaptive fusion
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 128),
            nn.LayerNorm(128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
        # Initialize weights
        self._init_weights()
    
    def _init_weights(self):
        for m in self.modules():
            if isinstance(m, nn.Linear):
                nn.init.xavier_uniform_(m.weight)
                if m.bias is not None:
                    nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
            elif isinstance(m, nn.LayerNorm):
                nn.init.ones_(m.weight)
                nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 32, hidden_dim]
        # Transpose for pooling: [B, 1024, 256] -> [B, 1024, 32] -> [B, 32, 1024]
        visual_pooled = self.visual_pool(visual.transpose(1, 2)).transpose(1, 2)
        visual_feat = self.visual_proj(visual_pooled)  # [B, 32, hidden_dim]
        
        # Process text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 32, hidden_dim]
        text_pooled = self.text_pool(text.transpose(1, 2)).transpose(1, 2)
        text_feat = self.text_proj(text_pooled)  # [B, 32, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        visual_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_visual_to_text(
            query=visual_feat, key=text_feat, value=text_feat
        )  # [B, 32, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        text_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_text_to_visual(
            query=text_feat, key=visual_feat, value=visual_feat
        )  # [B, 32, hidden_dim]
        
        # Concatenate attended features
        fused_tokens = torch.cat([visual_attended, text_attended], dim=-1)  # [B, 32, hidden_dim*2]
        
        # Self-attention on fused tokens
        fused_tokens, _ = self.self_attn(fused_tokens, fused_tokens, fused_tokens)
        
        # Global average pooling over tokens
        fused_global = fused_tokens.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim*2]
        
        # Fusion MLP
        fused_out = self.fusion_mlp(fused_global)  # [B, fused_dim]
        
        # Gating for adaptive feature selection
        gate_val = self.gate(fused_out)
        gated_out = fused_out * gate_val
        
        # Final classification
        output = self.classifier(gated_out)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 384
        
        # Visual processing: reduce spatial tokens and project
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        self.visual_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(32)  # Reduce 256 -> 32 tokens
        
        # Text processing: project and pool
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        self.text_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(32)  # Reduce 77 -> 32 tokens
        
        # Cross-modal attention for fusion
        self.cross_attn_visual_to_text = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1
        )
        self.cross_attn_text_to_visual = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Self-attention on fused representation
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim * 2, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP with gating
        self.fusion_gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.fused_dim * 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Output head with residual connections
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 128),
            nn.LayerNorm(128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 64),
            nn.LayerNorm(64),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Linear(64, 4)
        )
        
        # Layer norms for stability
        self.norm_v = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.norm_t = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.norm_fused = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim * 2)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Process visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        # Transpose for pooling: [B, hidden_dim, 256] -> [B, hidden_dim, 32]
        v = v.transpose(1, 2)
        v = self.visual_pool(v)  # [B, hidden_dim, 32]
        v = v.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 32, hidden_dim]
        v = self.norm_v(v)
        
        # Process text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        # Transpose for pooling: [B, hidden_dim, 77] -> [B, hidden_dim, 32]
        t = t.transpose(1, 2)
        t = self.text_pool(t)  # [B, hidden_dim, 32]
        t = t.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 32, hidden_dim]
        t = self.norm_t(t)
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        v_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_visual_to_text(v, t, t)  # V attends to T
        t_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_text_to_visual(t, v, v)  # T attends to V
        
        # Combine with residuals
        v_enhanced = v + v_attended
        t_enhanced = t + t_attended
        
        # Concatenate modalities
        fused = torch.cat([v_enhanced, t_enhanced], dim=-1)  # [B, 32, hidden_dim*2]
        fused = self.norm_fused(fused)
        
        # Self-attention on fused features
        fused_attended, _ = self.self_attn(fused, fused, fused)
        fused = fused + fused_attended
        
        # Gated fusion
        gate = self.fusion_gate(fused)
        fused_gated = fused * gate
        
        # Global average pooling over sequence
        pooled = fused_gated.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim*2]
        
        # Final fusion MLP
        features = self.fusion_mlp(pooled)  # [B, fused_dim]
        
        # Output prediction
        output = self.output_head(features)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        
        # Visual processing: reduce sequence length then project
        self.visual_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(64)  # [B, 1024, 64]
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Text processing
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention for fusion
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Self-attention for refined fusion
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim * 2, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Output head with residual connections
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 2, 128),
            nn.LayerNorm(128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
        # Learnable modality weights
        self.modality_gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, 2),
            nn.Softmax(dim=-1)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 64, 1024] -> [B, 64, hidden]
        v = visual.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 1024, 256]
        v = self.visual_pool(v)  # [B, 1024, 64]
        v = v.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 64, 1024]
        v = self.visual_proj(v)  # [B, 64, hidden]
        
        # Process text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden]
        t = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, hidden]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        v_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(v, t, t)  # [B, 64, hidden]
        t_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(t, v, v)  # [B, 77, hidden]
        
        # Pool attended features
        v_pooled = v_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden]
        t_pooled = t_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden]
        
        # Concatenate modalities
        fused = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden*2]
        
        # Modality gating for dynamic weighting
        gate_weights = self.modality_gate(fused)  # [B, 2]
        
        # Apply gating
        v_weighted = v_pooled * gate_weights[:, 0:1]
        t_weighted = t_pooled * gate_weights[:, 1:2]
        gated_fused = torch.cat([v_weighted, t_weighted], dim=-1)
        
        # Self-attention on sequence level (expand for attention)
        fused_seq = gated_fused.unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, hidden*2]
        refined, _ = self.self_attn(fused_seq, fused_seq, fused_seq)
        refined = refined.squeeze(1) + gated_fused  # Residual
        
        # Final fusion and prediction
        features = self.fusion_mlp(refined)
        output = self.output_head(features)
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        
        # Visual processing: reduce sequence length then project
        self.visual_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(64)  # [B, 1024, 64]
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Text processing
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention for fusion
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Self-attention for refined fusion
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim * 2, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Output head
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 2, 128),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
        # Learnable modality weights
        self.modality_gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, 2),
            nn.Softmax(dim=-1)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Process visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 64, 1024] -> [B, 64, hidden]
        visual = visual.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 1024, 256]
        visual = self.visual_pool(visual)  # [B, 1024, 64]
        visual = visual.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 64, 1024]
        visual_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 64, hidden]
        
        # Process text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden]
        text_feat = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, hidden]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        v_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(visual_feat, text_feat, text_feat)  # visual queries text
        t_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(text_feat, visual_feat, visual_feat)  # text queries visual
        
        # Pool enhanced features
        v_pooled = v_enhanced.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden]
        t_pooled = t_enhanced.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden]
        
        # Concatenate and apply gating
        concat_feat = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden*2]
        
        # Dynamic modality weighting
        gate_weights = self.modality_gate(concat_feat)  # [B, 2]
        
        # Weighted combination
        v_weighted = v_pooled * gate_weights[:, 0:1]
        t_weighted = t_pooled * gate_weights[:, 1:2]
        fused = torch.cat([v_weighted, t_weighted], dim=-1)
        
        # Final fusion and prediction
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused)
        output = self.output_head(fused)
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 256
        
        # Visual projection: flatten spatial then project
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        
        # Text projection
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        
        # Adaptive pooling to fixed size
        self.visual_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(32)
        self.text_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(32)
        
        # Cross attention
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Fusion layers
        self.fusion = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 128),
            nn.LayerNorm(128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)
        
        # Process text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Transpose for pooling: [B, C, L]
        v_feat_t = v_feat.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, hidden_dim, 256]
        t_feat_t = t_feat.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, hidden_dim, 77]
        
        # Pool to same length
        v_pooled = self.visual_pool(v_feat_t)  # [B, hidden_dim, 32]
        t_pooled = self.text_pool(t_feat_t)    # [B, hidden_dim, 32]
        
        # Transpose back: [B, 32, hidden_dim]
        v_seq = v_pooled.transpose(1, 2)
        t_seq = t_pooled.transpose(1, 2)
        
        # Cross attention: visual queries, text keys/values
        cross_out, _ = self.cross_attn(v_seq, t_seq, t_seq)  # [B, 32, hidden_dim]
        
        # Global average pooling
        v_global = v_seq.mean(dim=1)      # [B, hidden_dim]
        t_global = t_seq.mean(dim=1)      # [B, hidden_dim]
        cross_global = cross_out.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Combine features
        combined = torch.cat([v_global, t_global], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim*2]
        
        # Fuse and classify
        fused = self.fusion(combined)
        output = self.classifier(fused)
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 384
        
        # Visual processing with attention pooling
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        self.visual_attn = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 64),
            nn.Tanh(),
            nn.Linear(64, 1)
        )
        
        # Text processing with attention pooling
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        self.text_attn = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 64),
            nn.Tanh(),
            nn.Linear(64, 1)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        self.cross_q = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.fused_dim)
        self.cross_k = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.fused_dim)
        self.cross_v = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.fused_dim)
        self.cross_scale = self.fused_dim ** -0.5
        
        # Gated fusion
        self.gate_visual = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.fused_dim)
        self.gate_text = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.fused_dim)
        self.gate_bias = nn.Parameter(torch.zeros(self.fused_dim))
        
        # Deep fusion network
        self.fusion_net = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        
        # Output head with residual connections
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim // 2, 128),
            nn.LayerNorm(128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.05),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
        self._init_weights()
    
    def _init_weights(self):
        for m in self.modules():
            if isinstance(m, nn.Linear):
                nn.init.xavier_uniform_(m.weight)
                if m.bias is not None:
                    nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
            elif isinstance(m, nn.LayerNorm):
                nn.init.ones_(m.weight)
                nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual features [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, hidden_dim]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_attn = self.visual_attn(v_feat).squeeze(-1)  # [B, 256]
        v_attn = F.softmax(v_attn, dim=-1)  # [B, 256]
        v_pooled = torch.bmm(v_attn.unsqueeze(1), v_feat).squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Process text features [B, 77, 768] -> [B, hidden_dim]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_attn = self.text_attn(t_feat).squeeze(-1)  # [B, 77]
        t_attn = F.softmax(t_attn, dim=-1)  # [B, 77]
        t_pooled = torch.bmm(t_attn.unsqueeze(1), t_feat).squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention (visual queries, text keys/values)
        v_q = self.cross_q(v_pooled).unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, fused_dim]
        t_k = self.cross_k(t_pooled).unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, fused_dim]
        t_v = self.cross_v(t_pooled).unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, fused_dim]
        
        cross_attn = torch.bmm(v_q, t_k.transpose(1, 2)) * self.cross_scale  # [B, 1, 1]
        cross_attn = F.softmax(cross_attn, dim=-1)
        cross_feat = torch.bmm(cross_attn, t_v).squeeze(1)  # [B, fused_dim]
        
        # Gated fusion
        v_gate = torch.sigmoid(self.gate_visual(v_pooled) + self.gate_bias)  # [B, fused_dim]
        t_gate = torch.sigmoid(self.gate_text(t_pooled))  # [B, fused_dim]
        
        v_fused = v_gate * self.cross_q(v_pooled)  # [B, fused_dim]
        t_fused = t_gate * cross_feat  # [B, fused_dim]
        
        # Concatenate and fuse
        fused = torch.cat([v_fused, t_fused], dim=-1)  # [B, fused_dim * 2]
        fused = self.fusion_net(fused)  # [B, fused_dim // 2]
        
        # Residual connection and output
        output = self.output_head(fused)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 384
        
        # Visual processing with pooling attention
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Text processing
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention for visual->text and text->visual
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Self-attention on fused features
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim * 2, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Fusion layers
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 4, self.fused_dim * 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        
        # Output head with residual connections
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 128),
            nn.LayerNorm(128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism
        self.gate_v = nn.Sequential(nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 1), nn.Sigmoid())
        self.gate_t = nn.Sequential(nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 1), nn.Sigmoid())
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Project inputs
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)      # [B, 77, hidden]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        v_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(v_feat, t_feat, t_feat)  # [B, 256, hidden]
        t_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(t_feat, v_feat, v_feat)  # [B, 77, hidden]
        
        # Gated aggregation
        v_gate = self.gate_v(v_attended.mean(dim=1, keepdim=True))  # [B, 1, 1]
        t_gate = self.gate_t(t_attended.mean(dim=1, keepdim=True))  # [B, 1, 1]
        
        # Weighted pooling
        v_pooled = (v_attended * v_gate).sum(dim=1) / (v_gate.sum(dim=1) + 1e-6)  # [B, hidden]
        t_pooled = (t_attended * t_gate).sum(dim=1) / (t_gate.sum(dim=1) + 1e-6)  # [B, hidden]
        
        # Alternative: max pooling for diversity
        v_max = v_attended.max(dim=1)[0]  # [B, hidden]
        t_max = t_attended.max(dim=1)[0]  # [B, hidden]
        
        # Concatenate multiple representations
        concat_feat = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled, v_max, t_max], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden*4]
        
        # Fusion MLP
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(concat_feat)  # [B, fused_dim]
        
        # Output
        output = self.output_head(fused)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 384
        
        # Visual processing with pooling attention
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        self.visual_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Text processing
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        self.text_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Cross-modal fusion
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Gated fusion
        self.gate_v = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim)
        self.gate_t = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.fused_dim * 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        
        # Output head with residual connections
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 128),
            nn.LayerNorm(128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
        # Skip connection projection
        self.skip_proj = nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 4)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual features [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)
        v_feat, _ = self.visual_attn(v_feat, v_feat, v_feat)
        v_pooled = v_feat.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Process text features [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)
        t_feat, _ = self.text_attn(t_feat, t_feat, t_feat)
        t_pooled = t_feat.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        v_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(v_feat, t_feat, t_feat)
        t_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(t_feat, v_feat, v_feat)
        
        v_cross_pooled = v_cross.mean(dim=1)
        t_cross_pooled = t_cross.mean(dim=1)
        
        # Gated combination
        gate_v_val = torch.sigmoid(self.gate_v(torch.cat([v_pooled, v_cross_pooled], dim=-1)))
        gate_t_val = torch.sigmoid(self.gate_t(torch.cat([t_pooled, t_cross_pooled], dim=-1)))
        
        v_fused = gate_v_val * v_pooled + (1 - gate_v_val) * v_cross_pooled
        t_fused = gate_t_val * t_pooled + (1 - gate_t_val) * t_cross_pooled
        
        # Final fusion
        fused = torch.cat([v_fused, t_fused], dim=-1)
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused)
        
        # Output with skip
        out = self.output_head(fused) + self.skip_proj(fused)
        
        return out

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 768
        
        # Visual processing with pooling attention
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Text processing
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention for visual->text and text->visual
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Self-attention on fused features
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim * 2, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 4, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 256),
            nn.LayerNorm(256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 4)
        )
        
        # Learnable pooling weights
        self.visual_pool_weight = nn.Parameter(torch.ones(1))
        self.text_pool_weight = nn.Parameter(torch.ones(1))
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project visual [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)
        
        # Project text [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        v_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(v_feat, t_feat, t_feat)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        t_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(t_feat, v_feat, v_feat)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        
        # Weighted mean pooling
        v_pooled = (v_enhanced * F.softmax(self.visual_pool_weight, dim=0)).mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        t_pooled = (t_enhanced * F.softmax(self.text_pool_weight, dim=0)).mean(dim=1)   # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Concatenate pooled features
        concat_feat = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim*2]
        
        # Expand for self-attention
        concat_seq = concat_feat.unsqueeze(1).expand(-1, 16, -1)  # [B, 16, hidden_dim*2]
        
        # Self-attention
        attended, _ = self.self_attn(concat_seq, concat_seq, concat_seq)  # [B, 16, hidden_dim*2]
        attended_pooled = attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim*2]
        
        # Final fusion with residual
        fusion_input = torch.cat([
            attended_pooled,
            v_pooled,
            t_pooled
        ], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim*4]
        
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fusion_input)  # [B, fused_dim]
        
        # Classify
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 384
        
        # Visual processing: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, hidden_dim]
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        self.visual_attn_pool = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 1),
        )
        
        # Text processing: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, hidden_dim]
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        self.text_attn_pool = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 1),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Output head
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim // 2, 4),
        )
        
        self._init_weights()
    
    def _init_weights(self):
        for m in self.modules():
            if isinstance(m, nn.Linear):
                nn.init.xavier_uniform_(m.weight)
                if m.bias is not None:
                    nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
            elif isinstance(m, nn.LayerNorm):
                nn.init.ones_(m.weight)
                nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        v_weights = F.softmax(self.visual_attn_pool(v_feat), dim=1)  # [B, 256, 1]
        v_global = (v_feat * v_weights).sum(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, 512]
        t_weights = F.softmax(self.text_attn_pool(t_feat), dim=1)  # [B, 77, 1]
        t_global = (t_feat * t_weights).sum(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Expand for cross-attention
        v_seq = v_global.unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, 512]
        t_seq = t_global.unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, 512]
        
        # Concatenate as sequence for cross-attention
        combined = torch.cat([v_seq, t_seq], dim=1)  # [B, 2, 512]
        
        # Self-attention on combined representation
        attn_out, _ = self.cross_attn(combined, combined, combined)  # [B, 2, 512]
        attn_out = attn_out + combined  # Residual
        
        # Pool both representations
        v_enhanced = attn_out[:, 0, :]  # [B, 512]
        t_enhanced = attn_out[:, 1, :]  # [B, 512]
        
        # Concatenate and fuse
        fused_input = torch.cat([v_enhanced, t_enhanced], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused_input)  # [B, 384]
        
        # Output
        output = self.output_head(fused)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 384
        
        # Visual processing with pooling attention
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Spatial attention for visual features
        self.visual_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Text processing
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        self.cross_attn_tv = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        self.cross_attn_vt = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Gated fusion
        self.gate_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15)
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 128),
            nn.LayerNorm(128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
        self._init_weights()
    
    def _init_weights(self):
        for m in self.modules():
            if isinstance(m, nn.Linear):
                nn.init.xavier_uniform_(m.weight)
                if m.bias is not None:
                    nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
            elif isinstance(m, nn.LayerNorm):
                nn.init.ones_(m.weight)
                nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)
        
        # Self-attention on visual
        v_feat, _ = self.visual_attn(v_feat, v_feat, v_feat)
        
        # Process text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        # Text queries attend to visual keys/values
        t_cross_v, _ = self.cross_attn_tv(t_feat, v_feat, v_feat)
        
        # Visual queries attend to text keys/values  
        v_cross_t, _ = self.cross_attn_vt(v_feat, t_feat, t_feat)
        
        # Global average pooling
        v_pooled = v_cross_t.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        t_pooled = t_cross_v.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Concatenate for gating
        combined = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)
        gate = self.gate_proj(combined)
        
        # Gated fusion
        fused = gate * v_pooled + (1 - gate) * t_pooled
        
        # Refine through MLP
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused)
        
        # Classification
        output = self.classifier(fused)
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        self.vis_dim = 1024
        self.txt_dim = 768
        self.common_dim = 512
        
        # Visual projection with pooling
        self.vis_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.vis_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Text projection
        self.txt_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.txt_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Cross-attention layers
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.common_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Fusion network
        self.fusion = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim, self.common_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        
        # Classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Linear(self.common_dim // 2, 4)
        
        self.ln_vis = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim)
        self.ln_txt = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project visual [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, 512]
        vis_feat = self.vis_proj(visual)
        
        # Project text [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, 512]
        txt_feat = self.txt_proj(text)
        
        # Mean pool visual to reduce sequence length
        vis_pooled = vis_feat.mean(dim=1, keepdim=True)  # [B, 1, 512]
        
        # Cross-attention: pooled visual attends to text
        vis_cross, _ = self.cross_attn(vis_pooled, txt_feat, txt_feat)
        vis_cross = self.ln_vis(vis_cross + vis_pooled).squeeze(1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Mean pool text
        txt_pooled = txt_feat.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Cross-attention: pooled text attends to visual
        txt_pooled_expanded = txt_pooled.unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, 512]
        txt_cross, _ = self.cross_attn(txt_pooled_expanded, vis_feat, vis_feat)
        txt_cross = self.ln_txt(txt_cross + txt_pooled_expanded).squeeze(1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Concatenate cross-attended features
        fused_input = torch.cat([vis_cross, txt_cross], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Fusion and classification
        fused = self.fusion(fused_input)  # [B, 256]
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 384
        
        # Visual processing with pooling attention
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Text processing
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention for visual->text and text->visual
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Self-attention for refined fusion
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim * 2, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 4, self.fused_dim * 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 128),
            nn.LayerNorm(128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
        # Learnable temperature for attention scaling
        self.temperature = nn.Parameter(torch.ones(1) * 0.07)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project inputs
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)       # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        v_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(
            v_feat, t_feat, t_feat,
            need_weights=False
        )  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual  
        t_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(
            t_feat, v_feat, v_feat,
            need_weights=False
        )  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        
        # Pool with attention weights
        v_pooled = v_enhanced.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        t_pooled = t_enhanced.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Concatenate for joint representation
        joint = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim*2]
        
        # Expand for self-attention (treat as sequence of 1)
        joint_seq = joint.unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, hidden_dim*2]
        
        # Self-attention refinement
        joint_refined, _ = self.self_attn(joint_seq, joint_seq, joint_seq, need_weights=False)
        joint_refined = joint_refined.squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden_dim*2]
        
        # Combine original and refined with residual
        joint_combined = joint + joint_refined
        
        # Multi-scale feature combination
        v_max = v_enhanced.max(dim=1)[0]
        t_max = t_enhanced.max(dim=1)[0]
        
        # Final fusion features
        fused_input = torch.cat([
            joint_combined,           # [B, hidden_dim*2]
            v_pooled * t_pooled,      # [B, hidden_dim] - element-wise interaction
            v_max + t_max             # [B, hidden_dim] - max pooled aggregation
        ], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim*4]
        
        # Fusion processing
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused_input)  # [B, fused_dim]
        
        # Classification
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.vis_dim = 1024
        self.txt_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 384
        
        # Visual processing: reduce spatial tokens and project
        self.vis_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.vis_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        self.vis_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(32)  # Reduce 256 -> 32 tokens
        
        # Text processing: project and pool
        self.txt_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.txt_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        self.txt_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(16)  # Reduce 77 -> 16 tokens
        
        # Cross-modal attention (visual attends to text)
        self.cross_attn_vis = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        self.cross_attn_txt = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Self-attention for fused representation
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.fused_dim, num_heads=6, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Fusion MLPs
        self.vis_fusion = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        self.txt_fusion = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        
        # Gated fusion
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Deep classification head with residual connections
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 256),
            nn.LayerNorm(256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(256, 128),
            nn.LayerNorm(128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 64),
            nn.LayerNorm(64),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Linear(64, 4)
        )
        
        # Skip connection projection
        self.skip_proj = nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 4)
        
        self._init_weights()
    
    def _init_weights(self):
        for m in self.modules():
            if isinstance(m, nn.Linear):
                nn.init.xavier_uniform_(m.weight)
                if m.bias is not None:
                    nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
            elif isinstance(m, nn.LayerNorm):
                nn.init.ones_(m.weight)
                nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Process visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        vis = self.vis_proj(visual)
        # Transpose for pooling: [B, hidden_dim, 256] -> [B, hidden_dim, 32]
        vis = vis.transpose(1, 2)
        vis = self.vis_pool(vis)
        vis = vis.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 32, hidden_dim]
        
        # Process text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        txt = self.txt_proj(text)
        txt = txt.transpose(1, 2)
        txt = self.txt_pool(txt)
        txt = txt.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 16, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        vis_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_vis(vis, txt, txt)  # [B, 32, hidden_dim]
        txt_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_txt(txt, vis, vis)  # [B, 16, hidden_dim]
        
        # Fuse to common dimension
        vis_fused = self.vis_fusion(vis_attended)  # [B, 32, fused_dim]
        txt_fused = self.txt_fusion(txt_attended)  # [B, 16, fused_dim]
        
        # Concatenate along sequence dimension
        fused = torch.cat([vis_fused, txt_fused], dim=1)  # [B, 48, fused_dim]
        
        # Self-attention
        fused, _ = self.self_attn(fused, fused, fused)  # [B, 48, fused_dim]
        
        # Global average pooling
        pooled = fused.mean(dim=1)  # [B, fused_dim]
        
        # Gated residual for stability
        gate_val = self.gate(torch.cat([pooled, pooled], dim=-1))
        gated = gate_val * pooled
        
        # Classification with skip
        out = self.classifier(gated)
        skip = self.skip_proj(pooled)
        return out + 0.3 * skip

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        
        # Visual processing: reduce sequence length then project
        self.visual_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(64)  # [B, 1024, 64]
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Text processing: pool and project
        self.text_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(32)  # [B, 768, 32]
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention for fusion
        self.cross_attn_visual = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.cross_attn_text = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Self-attention for refined fusion
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim * 2, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Fusion MLP with residual connections
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 2, 4)
        )
        
        # Layer norms for stability
        self.norm_v = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.norm_t = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.norm_fused = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim * 2)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 64, 1024] -> [B, 64, hidden]
        v = visual.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 1024, 256]
        v = self.visual_pool(v)     # [B, 1024, 64]
        v = v.transpose(1, 2)       # [B, 64, 1024]
        v = self.visual_proj(v)     # [B, 64, hidden]
        v = self.norm_v(v)
        
        # Process text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 32, 768] -> [B, 32, hidden]
        t = text.transpose(1, 2)    # [B, 768, 77]
        t = self.text_pool(t)       # [B, 768, 32]
        t = t.transpose(1, 2)       # [B, 32, 768]
        t = self.text_proj(t)       # [B, 32, hidden]
        t = self.norm_t(t)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: each attends to the other
        v_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_visual(v, t, t)  # [B, 64, hidden]
        t_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_text(t, v, v)    # [B, 32, hidden]
        
        # Pool attended features
        v_pooled = v_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden]
        t_pooled = t_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden]
        
        # Concatenate and expand for self-attention
        fused = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden*2]
        fused_expanded = fused.unsqueeze(1).expand(-1, 16, -1)  # [B, 16, hidden*2]
        
        # Self-attention on fused representation
        fused_attended, _ = self.self_attn(fused_expanded, fused_expanded, fused_expanded)
        fused_pooled = fused_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden*2]
        fused_pooled = self.norm_fused(fused_pooled)
        
        # Residual connection and MLP fusion
        fused_out = self.fusion_mlp(fused_pooled + fused)  # [B, hidden]
        
        # Final classification
        output = self.classifier(fused_out)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 384
        
        # Visual processing with attention pooling
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        self.visual_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Text processing with attention pooling
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        self.text_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Cross-modal fusion
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Fusion layers
        self.fusion_norm = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim * 2)
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        
        # Output head
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 128),
            nn.LayerNorm(128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
        # Learnable query tokens for pooling
        self.visual_query = nn.Parameter(torch.randn(1, 1, self.hidden_dim))
        self.text_query = nn.Parameter(torch.randn(1, 1, self.hidden_dim))
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project visual features [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        visual_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)
        
        # Project text features [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        text_feat = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Attention-based pooling with learnable queries
        v_query = self.visual_query.expand(B, -1, -1)
        t_query = self.text_query.expand(B, -1, -1)
        
        # Pool visual features
        vis_pooled, _ = self.visual_attn(v_query, visual_feat, visual_feat)
        vis_pooled = vis_pooled.squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Pool text features  
        txt_pooled, _ = self.text_attn(t_query, text_feat, text_feat)
        txt_pooled = txt_pooled.squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention for enhanced interaction
        vis_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(vis_pooled.unsqueeze(1), text_feat, text_feat)
        txt_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(txt_pooled.unsqueeze(1), visual_feat, visual_feat)
        
        vis_enhanced = vis_pooled + vis_cross.squeeze(1) * 0.5
        txt_enhanced = txt_pooled + txt_cross.squeeze(1) * 0.5
        
        # Concatenate and fuse
        fused = torch.cat([vis_enhanced, txt_enhanced], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim*2]
        fused = self.fusion_norm(fused)
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, fused_dim]
        
        # Final prediction
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768
        self.vis_seq_len, self.vis_dim = 256, 1024
        self.txt_seq_len, self.txt_dim = 77, 768
        
        # Project to common dimension with efficient sizes
        self.common_dim = 512
        
        # Visual projection with sequence pooling preparation
        self.vis_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.vis_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Text projection
        self.txt_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.txt_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Learnable query tokens for cross-attention aggregation
        self.num_queries = 8
        self.query_tokens = nn.Parameter(torch.randn(1, self.num_queries, self.common_dim))
        
        # Cross-attention layers (visual queries attend to text, then fused)
        self.cross_attn_vis2txt = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            self.common_dim, num_heads=8, dropout=0.1, batch_first=True
        )
        self.cross_attn_txt2vis = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            self.common_dim, num_heads=8, dropout=0.1, batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Self-attention on fused representation
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            self.common_dim, num_heads=8, dropout=0.1, batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Feed-forward networks
        self.ffn_vis = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim, self.common_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim)
        )
        self.ffn_txt = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim, self.common_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim)
        )
        self.ffn_fused = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim, self.common_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim)
        )
        
        # Layer norms
        self.ln_vis1 = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim)
        self.ln_vis2 = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim)
        self.ln_txt1 = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim)
        self.ln_txt2 = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim)
        self.ln_fused1 = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim)
        self.ln_fused2 = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim)
        
        # Final classification head with deep fusion
        self.fusion_pool = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * self.num_queries, self.common_dim * 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2)
        )
        
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2 + self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim, self.common_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim // 2, 4)
        )
        
        # Auxiliary pooling for global features
        self.vis_global_pool = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.Tanh()
        )
        self.txt_global_pool = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.Tanh()
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project inputs
        vis = self.vis_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        txt = self.txt_proj(text)    # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Global pooled features for auxiliary path
        vis_pooled = vis.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        txt_pooled = txt.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        vis_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_vis2txt(
            self.ln_vis1(vis), self.ln_txt1(txt), self.ln_txt1(txt)
        )
        vis = vis + vis_attended
        vis = self.ln_vis2(vis + self.ffn_vis(vis))
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        txt_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_txt2vis(
            self.ln_txt1(txt), self.ln_vis1(vis), self.ln_vis1(vis)
        )
        txt = txt + txt_attended
        txt = self.ln_txt2(txt + self.ffn_txt(txt))
        
        # Use learnable queries to aggregate cross-modal info
        queries = self.query_tokens.expand(B, -1, -1)  # [B, 8, 512]
        
        # Queries attend to both modalities
        combined = torch.cat([vis, txt], dim=1)  # [B, 333, 512]
        fused, _ = self.self_attn(queries, combined, combined)
        fused = self.ln_fused1(fused + self.ffn_fused(fused))
        fused = self.ln_fused2(fused)
        
        # Flatten queries and process
        fused_flat = fused.reshape(B, -1)  # [B, 4096]
        fused_repr = self.fusion_pool(fused_flat)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Global modality features
        vis_global = self.vis_global_pool(vis_pooled)  # [B, 512]
        txt_global = self.txt_global_pool(txt_pooled)  # [B, 512]
        global_concat = torch.cat([vis_global, txt_global], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Final concatenation and classification
        final_repr = torch.cat([fused_repr, global_concat], dim=-1)  # [B, 2048]
        output = self.classifier(final_repr)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 256
        
        # Visual projection: flatten spatial then project
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        
        # Text projection
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Fusion layers
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 64),
            nn.LayerNorm(64),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        
        # Classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Linear(64, 4)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)
        
        # Project text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Global average pooling for visual
        v_global = v_feat.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Use visual as query to attend to text
        v_expanded = v_global.unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross attention: visual global attends to text features
        attn_out, _ = self.cross_attn(v_expanded, t_feat, t_feat)  # [B, 1, hidden_dim]
        t_enhanced = attn_out.squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Concatenate and fuse
        fused = torch.cat([v_global, t_enhanced], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim*2]
        
        # MLP fusion
        feat = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, 64]
        
        # Output
        output = self.classifier(feat)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 384
        
        # Visual processing with pooling attention
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Text processing
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention for visual->text and text->visual
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Self-attention for refinement
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim * 2, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 4, self.fused_dim * 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        
        # Output classifier with residual connections
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 128),
            nn.LayerNorm(128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
        # Skip connection projection
        self.skip_proj = nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 4)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project inputs
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)       # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        v_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(v_feat, t_feat, t_feat)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual  
        t_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(t_feat, v_feat, v_feat)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        
        # Global pooling with attention weights
        v_pooled = v_enhanced.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        t_pooled = t_enhanced.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Concatenate and refine
        fused = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim*2]
        
        # Expand for self-attention processing
        fused_expanded = fused.unsqueeze(1).expand(-1, 4, -1)  # [B, 4, hidden_dim*2]
        
        # Self-attention refinement
        refined, _ = self.self_attn(fused_expanded, fused_expanded, fused_expanded)  # [B, 4, hidden_dim*2]
        
        # Aggregate and combine with original features
        refined_global = refined.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim*2]
        combined = torch.cat([fused, refined_global], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim*4]
        
        # Final fusion
        fused_out = self.fusion_mlp(combined)  # [B, fused_dim]
        
        # Classifier with skip
        out = self.classifier(fused_out) + 0.1 * self.skip_proj(fused_out)
        
        return out

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 384
        
        # Visual processing with pooling attention
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Text processing
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention for visual->text and text->visual
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Self-attention for refined fusion
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim * 2, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 128),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
        # Learnable temperature for attention scaling
        self.temp_visual = nn.Parameter(torch.ones(1))
        self.temp_text = nn.Parameter(torch.ones(1))
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project visual features [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        
        # Project text features [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Global average pooling for compact representations
        v_global = v_feat.mean(dim=1, keepdim=True)  # [B, 1, 512]
        t_global = t_feat.mean(dim=1, keepdim=True)  # [B, 1, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention with temperature scaling
        v_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(
            v_global, t_feat, t_feat,
            need_weights=False
        )  # [B, 1, 512]
        
        t_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(
            t_global, v_feat, v_feat,
            need_weights=False
        )  # [B, 1, 512]
        
        # Concatenate enhanced features
        fused = torch.cat([v_enhanced.squeeze(1), t_enhanced.squeeze(1)], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        fused = fused.unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, 1024]
        
        # Self-attention refinement
        fused_refined, _ = self.self_attn(fused, fused, fused, need_weights=False)  # [B, 1, 1024]
        
        # Fusion MLP
        fused_out = self.fusion_mlp(fused_refined.squeeze(1))  # [B, 384]
        
        # Final classification
        output = self.classifier(fused_out)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output
