import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 384
        
        # Visual processing with efficient pooling
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Text processing
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention (visual attends to text)
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            dropout=0.1,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention (text attends to visual)
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            dropout=0.1,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Self-attention for refinement
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim * 2,
            num_heads=8,
            dropout=0.1,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        
        # Output head with residual connections
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 128),
            nn.LayerNorm(128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
        # Initialize weights
        self._init_weights()
    
    def _init_weights(self):
        for m in self.modules():
            if isinstance(m, nn.Linear):
                nn.init.xavier_uniform_(m.weight)
                if m.bias is not None:
                    nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
            elif isinstance(m, nn.LayerNorm):
                nn.init.ones_(m.weight)
                nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        """
        visual: [B, 256, 1024]
        text: [B, 77, 768]
        """
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project visual features [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        
        # Project text features [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual queries attend to text keys/values
        v_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(
            query=v_feat,
            key=t_feat,
            value=t_feat
        )  # [B, 256, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries attend to visual keys/values
        t_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(
            query=t_feat,
            key=v_feat,
            value=v_feat
        )  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Global average pooling with learned attention weights
        v_pooled = v_enhanced.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        t_pooled = t_enhanced.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Concatenate and add residual from original projections
        v_orig = v_feat.mean(dim=1)
        t_orig = t_feat.mean(dim=1)
        
        fused = torch.cat([
            v_pooled + 0.3 * v_orig,
            t_pooled + 0.3 * t_orig
        ], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Reshape for self-attention (treat as sequence of 1)
        fused_seq = fused.unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, 1024]
        
        # Self-attention refinement
        refined, _ = self.self_attn(fused_seq, fused_seq, fused_seq)
        refined = refined.squeeze(1) + fused  # Residual [B, 1024]
        
        # Fusion MLP
        fused_out = self.fusion_mlp(refined)  # [B, 384]
        
        # Final output
        output = self.output_head(fused_out)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 768
        
        # Visual processing with pooling attention
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Text processing
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention for visual->text and text->visual
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Self-attention on fused features
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim * 2, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 4, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 256),
            nn.LayerNorm(256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 4)
        )
        
        # Learnable pooling weights
        self.visual_pool_weight = nn.Parameter(torch.ones(1))
        self.text_pool_weight = nn.Parameter(torch.ones(1))
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project visual features [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        
        # Project text features [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        v_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(v_feat, t_feat, t_feat)  # [B, 256, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        t_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(t_feat, v_feat, v_feat)  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Weighted mean pooling with learnable temperature
        v_pooled = torch.mean(v_enhanced, dim=1) * torch.sigmoid(self.visual_pool_weight)  # [B, 512]
        t_pooled = torch.mean(t_enhanced, dim=1) * torch.sigmoid(self.text_pool_weight)   # [B, 512]
        
        # Max pooling for salient features
        v_max = torch.max(v_enhanced, dim=1)[0]  # [B, 512]
        t_max = torch.max(t_enhanced, dim=1)[0]  # [B, 512]
        
        # Concatenate multiple views
        fused = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled, v_max, t_max], dim=-1)  # [B, 2048]
        
        # Fusion MLP
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, 768]
        
        # Final classification
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 768
        
        # Visual processing: reduce spatial dimension then project
        self.visual_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(64)  # [B, 1024, 64]
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(1024, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Text processing: pool and project
        self.text_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(64)  # [B, 768, 64]
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(768, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention for fusion
        self.cross_attn_visual = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        self.cross_attn_text = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Self-attention on fused representation
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim * 2, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15)
        )
        
        # Output head with residual connections
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 256),
            nn.LayerNorm(256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 64),
            nn.LayerNorm(64),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Linear(64, 4)
        )
        
        # Skip connection projection
        self.skip_proj = nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 4)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 64, 1024] -> [B, 64, hidden_dim]
        visual = visual.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 1024, 256]
        visual = self.visual_pool(visual)  # [B, 1024, 64]
        visual = visual.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 64, 1024]
        visual_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 64, hidden_dim]
        
        # Process text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 64, 768] -> [B, 64, hidden_dim]
        text = text.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 768, 77]
        text = self.text_pool(text)  # [B, 768, 64]
        text = text.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 64, 768]
        text_feat = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 64, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        visual_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_visual(visual_feat, text_feat, text_feat)
        text_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_text(text_feat, visual_feat, visual_feat)
        
        # Combine with residual
        visual_enhanced = visual_feat + visual_attended
        text_enhanced = text_feat + text_attended
        
        # Concatenate and fuse
        fused = torch.cat([visual_enhanced, text_enhanced], dim=-1)  # [B, 64, hidden_dim*2]
        
        # Self-attention on fused features
        fused_attended, _ = self.self_attn(fused, fused, fused)
        fused = fused + fused_attended
        
        # Global average pooling
        fused_pooled = fused.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim*2]
        
        # Fusion MLP
        fused_out = self.fusion_mlp(fused_pooled)  # [B, fused_dim]
        
        # Output with skip connection
        output = self.output_head(fused_out) + self.skip_proj(fused_out)
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        
        # Cross-modal attention for visual -> text
        self.v_to_t_query = nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.v_to_t_key = nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.v_to_t_value = nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal attention for text -> visual
        self.t_to_v_query = nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.t_to_v_key = nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.t_to_v_value = nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Self-attention for fused features
        self.fusion_dim = self.hidden_dim * 2
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.fusion_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Gated fusion
        self.gate_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fusion_dim, self.fusion_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Deep classification head with residual connections
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fusion_dim),
            nn.Linear(self.fusion_dim, 768),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(768, 512),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Linear(256, 4)
        )
        
        # Skip connection projection
        self.skip_proj = nn.Linear(self.fusion_dim, 4)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Global average pooling as query representations
        v_global = visual.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 1024]
        t_global = text.mean(dim=1)    # [B, 768]
        
        # Cross-attention: visual attends to text
        v_query = self.v_to_t_query(v_global).unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, hidden]
        t_keys = self.v_to_t_key(text)                      # [B, 77, hidden]
        t_values = self.v_to_t_value(text)                  # [B, 77, hidden]
        
        scores_vt = torch.matmul(v_query, t_keys.transpose(-2, -1)) / (self.hidden_dim ** 0.5)
        attn_vt = F.softmax(scores_vt, dim=-1)
        v_fused = torch.matmul(attn_vt, t_values).squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden]
        
        # Cross-attention: text attends to visual
        t_query = self.t_to_v_query(t_global).unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, hidden]
        v_keys = self.t_to_v_key(visual)                    # [B, 256, hidden]
        v_values = self.t_to_v_value(visual)                # [B, 256, hidden]
        
        scores_tv = torch.matmul(t_query, v_keys.transpose(-2, -1)) / (self.hidden_dim ** 0.5)
        attn_tv = F.softmax(scores_tv, dim=-1)
        t_fused = torch.matmul(attn_tv, v_values).squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden]
        
        # Concatenate cross-modal features
        fused = torch.cat([v_fused, t_fused], dim=-1)  # [B, fusion_dim]
        fused = fused.unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, fusion_dim] for self-attention
        
        # Self-attention with residual
        attn_out, _ = self.self_attn(fused, fused, fused)
        fused = fused + attn_out
        fused = fused.squeeze(1)  # [B, fusion_dim]
        
        # Gated feature modulation
        gate = self.gate_proj(fused)
        fused = fused * gate + fused * (1 - gate) * 0.5
        
        # Classification with skip connection
        out = self.classifier(fused)
        skip = self.skip_proj(fused)
        
        return out + skip * 0.3

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 768
        
        # Visual processing with efficient pooling
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15)
        )
        
        # Text processing
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention for fusion
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, dropout=0.1, batch_first=True)
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, dropout=0.1, batch_first=True)
        
        # Self-attention for refined representation
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim * 2, num_heads=8, dropout=0.1, batch_first=True)
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 256),
            nn.LayerNorm(256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(256, 4)
        )
        
        # Learnable temperature for attention scaling
        self.temperature = nn.Parameter(torch.ones(1) * 0.07)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project visual features: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)
        
        # Project text features: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        v_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(
            query=v_feat,
            key=t_feat,
            value=t_feat
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        t_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(
            query=t_feat,
            key=v_feat,
            value=v_feat
        )
        
        # Pool enhanced features
        v_pooled = v_enhanced.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        t_pooled = t_enhanced.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Concatenate and add residual
        fused = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim*2]
        
        # Expand for self-attention processing
        fused_expanded = fused.unsqueeze(1).expand(-1, 16, -1)  # [B, 16, hidden_dim*2]
        
        # Self-attention for feature interaction
        fused_attended, _ = self.self_attn(fused_expanded, fused_expanded, fused_expanded)
        
        # Pool back and combine with original
        fused_pooled = fused_attended.mean(dim=1)
        fused_combined = fused_pooled + fused  # Residual connection
        
        # Final fusion MLP
        fused_out = self.fusion_mlp(fused_combined)
        
        # Classification
        output = self.classifier(fused_out)
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768
        self.vis_seq_len, self.vis_dim = 256, 1024
        self.txt_seq_len, self.txt_dim = 77, 768
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.common_dim = 512
        
        # Visual projection with spatial pooling attention
        self.vis_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.vis_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        
        # Text projection
        self.txt_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.txt_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention for fusion
        self.cross_attn_vis = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.common_dim, num_heads=8, dropout=0.1, batch_first=True)
        self.cross_attn_txt = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.common_dim, num_heads=8, dropout=0.1, batch_first=True)
        
        # Self-attention for refined fusion
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.common_dim, num_heads=8, dropout=0.1, batch_first=True)
        
        # Feed-forward networks
        self.ffn_vis = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim, self.common_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
        )
        self.ffn_txt = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim, self.common_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
        )
        
        # Layer norms
        self.ln_vis1 = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim)
        self.ln_vis2 = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim)
        self.ln_txt1 = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim)
        self.ln_txt2 = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim)
        self.ln_fusion = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim)
        
        # Gated fusion
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Final classifier with deep projection
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.LayerNorm(256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(256, 4)
        )
        
        # Initialize weights
        self._init_weights()
    
    def _init_weights(self):
        for m in self.modules():
            if isinstance(m, nn.Linear):
                nn.init.xavier_uniform_(m.weight)
                if m.bias is not None:
                    nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
            elif isinstance(m, nn.LayerNorm):
                nn.init.ones_(m.weight)
                nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Project inputs
        vis_feat = self.vis_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        txt_feat = self.txt_proj(text)    # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        vis_residual = vis_feat
        vis_feat = self.ln_vis1(vis_feat)
        vis_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_vis(vis_feat, txt_feat, txt_feat)
        vis_feat = vis_residual + vis_attended
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        txt_residual = txt_feat
        txt_feat = self.ln_txt1(txt_feat)
        txt_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_txt(txt_feat, vis_feat, vis_feat)
        txt_feat = txt_residual + txt_attended
        
        # FFN
        vis_feat = vis_feat + self.ffn_vis(self.ln_vis2(vis_feat))
        txt_feat = txt_feat + self.ffn_txt(self.ln_txt2(txt_feat))
        
        # Global pooling with attention weights
        vis_pooled = vis_feat.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        txt_pooled = txt_feat.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Gated fusion
        concat_feat = torch.cat([vis_pooled, txt_pooled], dim=-1)
        gate_weight = self.gate(concat_feat)
        fused = gate_weight * vis_pooled + (1 - gate_weight) * txt_pooled
        
        # Self-attention refinement on pooled features (expand then pool)
        fused_expanded = fused.unsqueeze(1).repeat(1, 4, 1)  # [B, 4, 512]
        fused_residual = fused_expanded
        fused_expanded = self.ln_fusion(fused_expanded)
        fused_attended, _ = self.self_attn(fused_expanded, fused_expanded, fused_expanded)
        fused_refined = (fused_residual + fused_attended).mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Residual connection
        fused_final = fused + fused_refined
        
        # Classify
        output = self.classifier(fused_final)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.vis_dim = 1024
        self.txt_dim = 768
        
        # Cross-modal attention dimensions
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.num_heads = 8
        
        # Visual projection and pooling
        self.vis_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.vis_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15)
        )
        
        # Text projection and pooling
        self.txt_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.txt_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15)
        )
        
        # Cross-attention: text attends to visual
        self.cross_attn_txt2vis = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            self.hidden_dim, self.num_heads, dropout=0.1, batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Cross-attention: visual attends to text
        self.cross_attn_vis2txt = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            self.hidden_dim, self.num_heads, dropout=0.1, batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Self-attention for refined fusion
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            self.hidden_dim * 2, self.num_heads, dropout=0.1, batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15)
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 2, 128),
            nn.LayerNorm(128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
        # Learnable temperature for attention scaling
        self.temperature = nn.Parameter(torch.ones(1) * 0.07)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project and pool visual features [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 64, hidden_dim]
        vis = self.vis_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        # Adaptive pooling to reduce sequence length
        vis_pooled = F.adaptive_avg_pool1d(
            vis.transpose(1, 2), 64
        ).transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 64, hidden_dim]
        
        # Project text features [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        txt = self.txt_proj(text)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention with temperature scaling
        temp = torch.clamp(self.temperature, min=0.01, max=1.0)
        
        # Text queries attend to visual keys/values
        txt_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn_txt2vis(
            query=txt,
            key=vis_pooled,
            value=vis_pooled,
            need_weights=False
        )
        txt_enhanced = txt_enhanced / temp
        
        # Visual queries attend to text keys/values
        vis_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn_vis2txt(
            query=vis_pooled,
            key=txt,
            value=txt,
            need_weights=False
        )
        vis_enhanced = vis_enhanced / temp
        
        # Global average pooling for both modalities
        txt_global = txt_enhanced.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        vis_global = vis_enhanced.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Concatenate global representations
        fused = torch.cat([vis_global, txt_global], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim*2]
        
        # Add residual connection through self-attention on expanded dims
        fused_expanded = fused.unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, hidden_dim*2]
        fused_attn, _ = self.self_attn(fused_expanded, fused_expanded, fused_expanded)
        fused_residual = fused + fused_attn.squeeze(1) * 0.5
        
        # Final fusion and classification
        fused_out = self.fusion_mlp(fused_residual)  # [B, hidden_dim//2]
        output = self.classifier(fused_out)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.vis_dim = 1024
        self.txt_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 768
        
        # Visual processing with efficient pooling
        self.vis_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.vis_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15)
        )
        
        # Text processing
        self.txt_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.txt_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention (visual attends to text)
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            dropout=0.1,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention (text attends to visual)
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            dropout=0.1,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Self-attention for refinement
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim * 2,
            num_heads=8,
            dropout=0.1,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 4, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.25),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2)
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 256),
            nn.LayerNorm(256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.3),
            nn.Linear(256, 4)
        )
        
        # Learnable temperature for attention scaling
        self.temperature = nn.Parameter(torch.ones(1) * 0.07)
        
        self._init_weights()
    
    def _init_weights(self):
        for m in self.modules():
            if isinstance(m, nn.Linear):
                nn.init.xavier_uniform_(m.weight)
                if m.bias is not None:
                    nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
            elif isinstance(m, nn.LayerNorm):
                nn.init.ones_(m.weight)
                nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project and pool visual features [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 64, hidden_dim]
        vis_tokens = self.vis_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        # Adaptive pooling to reduce sequence length
        vis_pooled = F.adaptive_avg_pool1d(
            vis_tokens.transpose(1, 2), 64
        ).transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 64, hidden_dim]
        
        # Project text features [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        txt_tokens = self.txt_proj(text)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention with temperature scaling
        temp = F.softplus(self.temperature) + 1e-6
        
        # Visual attends to text
        v2t_out, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(
            query=vis_pooled / temp,
            key=txt_tokens / temp,
            value=txt_tokens
        )  # [B, 64, hidden_dim]
        
        # Text attends to visual
        t2v_out, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(
            query=txt_tokens / temp,
            key=vis_pooled / temp,
            value=vis_pooled
        )  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        
        # Pool cross-attended features
        v2t_pooled = v2t_out.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        t2v_pooled = t2v_out.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Also compute max pooling for diversity
        v2t_max = v2t_out.max(dim=1)[0]  # [B, hidden_dim]
        t2v_max = t2v_out.max(dim=1)[0]  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Concatenate multiple representations
        fused = torch.cat([
            v2t_pooled, t2v_pooled, 
            v2t_max, t2v_max
        ], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim * 4]
        
        # Fusion MLP
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, fused_dim]
        
        # Final classification
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768
        self.vis_seq_len = 256
        self.vis_dim = 1024
        self.txt_seq_len = 77
        self.txt_dim = 768
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.common_dim = 512
        
        # Visual projection with spatial reduction
        self.vis_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.vis_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Text projection
        self.txt_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.txt_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention layers
        self.num_heads = 8
        self.cross_attn_vis2txt = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            self.common_dim, self.num_heads, dropout=0.1, batch_first=True
        )
        self.cross_attn_txt2vis = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            self.common_dim, self.num_heads, dropout=0.1, batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Self-attention for refinement
        self.self_attn_vis = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            self.common_dim, self.num_heads, dropout=0.1, batch_first=True
        )
        self.self_attn_txt = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            self.common_dim, self.num_heads, dropout=0.1, batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Layer norms
        self.ln_vis_cross = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim)
        self.ln_txt_cross = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim)
        self.ln_vis_self = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim)
        self.ln_txt_self = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim)
        
        # FFNs
        self.ffn_vis = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim, self.common_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        self.ffn_txt = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim, self.common_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        self.ln_vis_ffn = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim)
        self.ln_txt_ffn = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim)
        
        # Spatial pooling for visual (reduce 256 tokens)
        self.vis_pool = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.vis_seq_len, 16),  # 256 -> 16
            nn.ReLU()
        )
        
        # Temporal pooling for text (reduce 77 tokens)  
        self.txt_pool = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.txt_seq_len, 16),  # 77 -> 16
            nn.ReLU()
        )
        
        # Final fusion MLP
        self.fusion_dim = self.common_dim * 32  # 16*2 * 512 / something, actually 16+16=32 tokens
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 32, 1024),
            nn.LayerNorm(1024),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(1024, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(512, 128),
            nn.LayerNorm(128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
        # Initialize weights
        self._init_weights()
    
    def _init_weights(self):
        for m in self.modules():
            if isinstance(m, nn.Linear):
                nn.init.xavier_uniform_(m.weight)
                if m.bias is not None:
                    nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
            elif isinstance(m, nn.LayerNorm):
                nn.init.ones_(m.weight)
                nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project to common space
        vis = self.vis_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        txt = self.txt_proj(text)    # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        vis_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_vis2txt(
            vis, txt, txt, need_weights=False
        )
        vis = self.ln_vis_cross(vis + vis_cross)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        txt_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_txt2vis(
            txt, vis, vis, need_weights=False
        )
        txt = self.ln_txt_cross(txt + txt_cross)
        
        # Self-attention refinement
        vis_self, _ = self.self_attn_vis(vis, vis, vis, need_weights=False)
        vis = self.ln_vis_self(vis + vis_self)
        vis = self.ln_vis_ffn(vis + self.ffn_vis(vis))
        
        txt_self, _ = self.self_attn_txt(txt, txt, txt, need_weights=False)
        txt = self.ln_txt_self(txt + txt_self)
        txt = self.ln_txt_ffn(txt + self.ffn_txt(txt))
        
        # Transpose for pooling: [B, seq, dim] -> [B, dim, seq]
        vis_t = vis.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 512, 256]
        txt_t = txt.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 512, 77]
        
        # Pool to fixed size
        vis_pooled = self.vis_pool(vis_t)  # [B, 512, 16]
        txt_pooled = self.txt_pool(txt_t)  # [B, 512, 16]
        
        # Concatenate and flatten
        fused = torch.cat([vis_pooled, txt_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, 512, 32]
        fused = fused.reshape(B, -1)  # [B, 512 * 32 = 16384]
        
        # Final prediction
        out = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, 4]
        
        return out

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        
        # Visual projection with attention pooling
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Text projection with attention pooling
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, dropout=0.1, batch_first=True)
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, dropout=0.1, batch_first=True)
        
        # Self-attention for refinement
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim * 2, num_heads=8, dropout=0.1, batch_first=True)
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 4, self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Output head
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 128),
            nn.LayerNorm(128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.05),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
        # Learnable queries for pooling
        self.visual_query = nn.Parameter(torch.randn(1, 1, self.hidden_dim))
        self.text_query = nn.Parameter(torch.randn(1, 1, self.hidden_dim))
        
        self._init_weights()
    
    def _init_weights(self):
        for m in self.modules():
            if isinstance(m, nn.Linear):
                nn.init.xavier_uniform_(m.weight)
                if m.bias is not None:
                    nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
            elif isinstance(m, nn.LayerNorm):
                nn.init.ones_(m.weight)
                nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project visual features: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, hidden]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        
        # Project text features: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Expand learnable queries
        v_query = self.visual_query.expand(B, -1, -1)  # [B, 1, 512]
        t_query = self.text_query.expand(B, -1, -1)    # [B, 1, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        v_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(v_query, t_feat, t_feat)  # [B, 1, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        t_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(t_query, v_feat, v_feat)  # [B, 1, 512]
        
        # Global average pooling as additional features
        v_pooled = v_feat.mean(dim=1, keepdim=True)  # [B, 1, 512]
        t_pooled = t_feat.mean(dim=1, keepdim=True)  # [B, 1, 512]
        
        # Concatenate all representations
        fused = torch.cat([
            v_cross.squeeze(1),      # [B, 512]
            t_cross.squeeze(1),      # [B, 512]
            v_pooled.squeeze(1),     # [B, 512]
            t_pooled.squeeze(1)      # [B, 512]
        ], dim=-1)  # [B, 2048]
        
        # Fusion MLP
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Output
        output = self.output_head(fused)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 256
        
        # Visual projection with pooling first to reduce sequence length
        self.visual_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(64)  # Reduce 256 -> 64
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Text projection
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Bidirectional cross attention
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=4,
            dropout=0.1,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Gated fusion
        self.gate_v = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim)
        self.gate_t = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Output MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(512, 128),
            nn.LayerNorm(128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Pool visual features: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 64, 1024]
        visual = visual.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 1024, 256]
        visual = self.visual_pool(visual)  # [B, 1024, 64]
        visual = visual.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 64, 1024]
        
        # Project both modalities
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 64, hidden_dim]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross attention: visual attends to text
        v_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn(v_feat, t_feat, t_feat, need_weights=False)
        
        # Cross attention: text attends to visual  
        t_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn(t_feat, v_feat, v_feat, need_weights=False)
        
        # Global average pooling
        v_pooled = v_enhanced.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        t_pooled = t_enhanced.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Concatenate for gating
        v_gate_input = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)
        t_gate_input = torch.cat([t_pooled, v_pooled], dim=-1)
        
        # Compute gates
        gate_v = torch.sigmoid(self.gate_v(v_gate_input))
        gate_t = torch.sigmoid(self.gate_t(t_gate_input))
        
        # Apply gates and combine
        v_fused = gate_v * v_pooled + (1 - gate_v) * t_pooled
        t_fused = gate_t * t_pooled + (1 - gate_t) * v_pooled
        
        # Final concatenation
        fused = torch.cat([v_fused, t_fused], dim=-1)
        
        # Classification
        output = self.fusion_mlp(fused)
        
        return output

import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768
        self.vis_seq_len = 256
        self.vis_dim = 1024

        self.common_dim = 512
        
        # Visual projection with spatial reduction
        self.vis_proj = nn.Sequential(

            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Text projection
        self.txt_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.txt_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention - visual attends to text
